subject: We’re falling behind.

body:
| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=2659334db3ae40978ebe9a397954d99f&_e=0gvL3AfvVH57O171jQXKPkKV7QIiYsj4j7F7FMguUy1MECD7MMzfcwVAhpBPovcbULWaqBOlXS0iEiqOxji_foxcgN_9_TyY5Yhma6BplDw6J0YE41QKaYhs_lKfd86OWEJqv0vd3nAaRjnGTb6AcWZ1mrTk4LSYZMNthVDzlTWH-JFnsnfu4yiuKlZToEKaP4J2NDS4K70DRoftTMUVvQVlt-FUYtcecIC-tDCxWbTW5RinPXRQ2NBcek_M-VQt9Bf8y2VbVXAcu8Q-g-a-HXafdyBkJdzxXiYOkd9WVd9IOjG_Ha09PwY__Y5Gucbz)

Friend,

I just talked to Senator Grassley's Finance Manager, and I'm worried!

Things haven't been going great for Republicans recently. We lost in Kentucky, Virginia, New York, and Ohio. We must WIN in 2024.

The election is just months away, and our opponents are outraising Republicans across the board -- and we're running out of time to catch up!

**[Can you chip NOW to help get us back on track?](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=2659334db3ae40978ebe9a397954d99f&_e=0gvL3AfvVH57O171jQXKPkKV7QIiYsj4j7F7FMguUy1MECD7MMzfcwVAhpBPovcbULWaqBOlXS0iEiqOxji_foxcgN_9_TyY5Yhma6BplDxOWV_Xnscc1tcpAQ1UdDGVnjavZzZLNc7yOxcRSZRAyaUGgQoIRxZyI5HEWETRwnjbSIYjC6Nr_z6UqKs95RRVWMDjTBxMY72mqJjqCaQLC1Zw0lFyaPWxz3bB7HK_uIhMdaEK8A9kLgjKwBxBqFXJOQDIGqkIxQMS2eTJwIoZEQXFxLHRk6djmCmcc03nDLZ97X5qn02ggjOS7ibBD02H)**

Millions of dollars have been flooding into the left's radical campaigns -- and they continue to outraise us.

**If we lose in 2024, Democrats will keep control of the Senate. Any hope of making substantial changes in this country will be lost. We 've got to get our act together!**

Senator Grassley has an important deadline coming up, and I encourage you to chip in now to help Republicans win in 2024. Can you rush $10 or $20 to help us WIN in November?

We are counting on grassroots patriots like you to fuel our success, not coastal elites and millionaires... **Can we count on you to contribute to Republican victories up and down the ballot?**

name: James Comer
subject: There’s no more hiding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
The “ongoing investigation” is over
| | [ ](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=a7709ac6e92b4c7ab5a83a248ba77416&_e=nWyEtt-b4AyUSrZwMrQJ78UiV35-1Otx2bwj0jryDafSrjNzoNlhTVgpzPgoOWSo7m-sJjH_1qMFLB7NkzUBonK1sxFjlApuCbI3ZpXjnf4oefdaVlwlAGozGbBZBOPY7lTmDtsBWxz94D6vasSvUPUNPtoaSsUDWwT9_y8bPHjypeAMDGS-b1oy0FmE_7WZo4zOPc-tN8v5LlyowWa4ep0vjvcszpVo7vOOVGxYTBap7YCmJOiWk1CuGFrAScLqbdu3AgYe6Jz267uyv0PHqyJt0gWHjm2QhH-0r7j0xLkzuTT9IrZR4DHKk3yBMrDg)
---
Friend, Special Counsel Robert Hur released a bombshell report in which he decided not to charge President Biden for mishandling classified documents... **_even though it concluded that he did in fact break the law!_** The fact that the Special Counsel all but deemed President Biden mentally unfit to stand trial, is astoundingly shocking in and of itself, but that's not all the report included. **Hidden within the document, is evidence that the classified documents that Biden mishandled were about Ukraine and China, exactly where the Biden family conducted their shady business dealings!** I've demanded the Department of Justice produce any and all transcripts, recordings, notes, and/or summaries of the interview with Biden for our Impeachment Inquiry... and they no longer have an "ongoing investigation" to use as a reason to cover for Biden anymore. After Biden's disastrous press conference where he mumbled and bumbled lie after lie denying his wrongdoing, even Democrats are admitting the Biden Presidency is on life support. While the media is telling you not to believe your lying eyes, more Americans are seeing the truth:
1. Biden spent his entire career influence peddling and raking in millions from our foreign adversaries.
2. His mental fitness is rapidly deteriorating for everyone to see as the world descends further and further into chaos.
3. He is launching a desperate last ditch effort to avoid accountability.

**Biden 's Presidency is on life support, and I'm the one man who is methodically and relentlessly exposing the truth about his family's criminal enterprise.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=a7709ac6e92b4c7ab5a83a248ba77416&_e=nWyEtt-b4AyUSrZwMrQJ78UiV35-1Otx2bwj0jryDafSrjNzoNlhTVgpzPgoOWSo7m-sJjH_1qMFLB7NkzUBonK1sxFjlApuCbI3ZpXjnf4oefdaVlwlAGozGbBZBOPY7lTmDtsBWxz94D6vasSvUPUNPtoaSsUDWwT9_y8bPHiHrt-Z7dWl7L2UnWfYrOpeF91_x3Uqt4ITDjuICnB5ExywPJbc2BtFD6K72xO34kB1OA0h9FMm2HWJqtUpg7xJx_GUXMMcOqXT-Oessogqnla-UpUsneTIz5ra3mwozzFDpSw2Y65taagXqvMU8fpm)
---
BUT, while I'm working in Washington DC to clean up the corruption and hold the Biden's accountable, the Democrats are running a top tier political campaign to destroy my investigation and defeat me in November. [**It 's the only chance Biden has, and his dark money allies are going all-in to defeat me.**](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=a7709ac6e92b4c7ab5a83a248ba77416&_e=nWyEtt-b4AyUSrZwMrQJ78UiV35-1Otx2bwj0jryDafSrjNzoNlhTVgpzPgoOWSo7m-sJjH_1qMFLB7NkzUBonK1sxFjlApuCbI3ZpXjnf4oefdaVlwlAGozGbBZBOPY7lTmDtsBWxz94D6vasSvUPUNPtoaSsUDWwT9_y8bPHgbQ0QnLGLgShw3UKczxIwjI-tv1tjZRac30_L3hXdaHemRIX7TNeLFhHBBZkXwouk8NbJ5Cx90d8ushwotsGFat7qXTZHdKquBrEw1p1TglwrRA99ncq5gNdESxUR5rdE3CAtfthm7sc9AUOVvpvEp) **I 'm under siege from all fronts and need to make sure I'm prepared to see my work through, but I can only do that if I'm able to win re-election in November.** If you're able, I'd be humbled to have your support as we fight to restore honesty and integrity in our government.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=a7709ac6e92b4c7ab5a83a248ba77416&_e=nWyEtt-b4AyUSrZwMrQJ78UiV35-1Otx2bwj0jryDafSrjNzoNlhTVgpzPgoOWSo7m-sJjH_1qMFLB7NkzUBonK1sxFjlApuCbI3ZpXjnf4oefdaVlwlAGozGbBZBOPY7lTmDtsBWxz94D6vasSvUPUNPtoaSsUDWwT9_y8bPHhAspUE4wdKqDTnnrM7tGudufVLS-CpX_xhHBDFy84tJozyUCgWjmxHkRAZXgfqW31LRsNKw0huNP5uESEa-1DsXd_bROD9Y0sEUdlwLIiNE4g3HJaC2slkVHrsOnOfW_Y89DG5NNuipLxV7x-YP2Qq)
---
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee
| [ ](http://links.gopwinning.org/u/click?_t=ea36c899de41479ca8c7218c6a20a10b&_m=a7709ac6e92b4c7ab5a83a248ba77416&_e=nWyEtt-b4AyUSrZwMrQJ78UiV35-1Otx2bwj0jryDafSrjNzoNlhTVgpzPgoOWSo7m-sJjH_1qMFLB7NkzUBonK1sxFjlApuCbI3ZpXjnf4oefdaVlwlAGozGbBZBOPY7lTmDtsBWxz94D6vasSvUPUNPtoaSsUDWwT9_y8bPHiox-9c3uSFlASiAZef5fgGaaWt4hEpAN7a4zkUFhhMcWn2uqIsJXz8BTSIAnuiDEpnS316pnMZQS_eDPHl-WbS8n6P-Kxk5iT8_rcpjI7mfbqw8CPUiHUBClRszomSW23sOzhp5UacWvLpM8jhybyc)

name: Friends of Chuck Morse
subject: Catching up with Chuck Morse
body:
| |

| | |

|
---
---
| | | Catching Up With Chuck Morse!
---
| |
---
| Exclusive Updates and Behind-the-Scenes Snaps from Chuck's Campaign Journey

---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Senator Pearl and I had an amazing experience touring Associated Grocers of New England, the largest retailer-owned wholesale grocery distribution center in New England!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Great to spend Valentines Day with the love of my life Susan!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
| **It was fantastic to meet with the senior leadership at Saint Joseph’s Hospital in Nashua and take a tour of the facilities!** **Thank you Jim Merrill for the invitation to visit!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
---
---
| |
---
| **Had a blast celebrating our new Mayor of Manchester, Jay Ruais!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Thank you Gary and Lucy for hosting me in your home and for giving me a tour of your famous Barbershop in Wolfeboro!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Great to Join UNH College Republicans for our pizza and policy event!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **A pleasure to meet Gus Stratton of Brookfield and take a tour of Equanimity Farm!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Enjoyed a fantastic morning at the Merrimack Branch YMCA, home to the largest YMCA childcare center in the country!**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **Had a fantastic day touring and getting to know employees over at Jackson Lumber!** **As a small business owner, I understand the value of hard work and meeting payroll. This firsthand experience is what’s needed in our next governor, and I'm committed to delivering it.**
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **I joined Winnipesaukee Republicans for an important conversation on guiding our conservative agenda in NH. I've successfully led on the passage of constitutional carry, education freedom, tax cuts, and promoting local control.** **As Governor, I'll continue to stand up for these values while maintaining an open-door policy, ensuring there's always a seat at the table for meaningful discussions.**
---

name: Anthony D'Esposito
subject: They want us to live in fear
body:
Peter,

As we witness the escalating crisis of safety and order in our city, driven by radical Democratic policies, the need for our collective action has never been more critical.

As a retired NYPD detective, I've seen firsthand the consequences of these failed policies—consequences that are now threatening to extend into our Long Island community. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear]

HELP ME FIGHT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear]

Two recent attacks on NYPD officers, one near Times Square and another on Randalls Island have laid bare the dangerous path we're being led down. In both instances, migrants attacked NYPD officers with a shocking level of violence. These assailants were released by Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg, only to commit more crimes, including a brazen robbery in California.

This cycle of violence, arrest, and release, followed by further criminal activity, starkly illustrates the lawlessness fostered by current leadership.

This moment demands more than passive observation; it requires urgent and decisive action. Your support is crucial. Together, we can combat the influx of radical funding, uphold the rule of law, and ensure that those who threaten our community face stringent consequences for their actions. DONATE NOW → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=first+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear]

I urgently need your help. Your donation will enable us to stand firm against these radical efforts, demand accountability from our leaders, and advocate for policies that protect our citizens and brave law enforcement officers.

Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or ANY AMOUNT today. We must send a resolute message that we will not stand by as our community is threatened by chaos and lawlessness. [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=link&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear]

CHIP IN $10 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=10&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear] CHIP IN $25 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=25&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear] CHIP IN $50 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=50&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear] CHIP IN $100 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=100&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear] CHIP IN $250 → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?amount=250&utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=amount+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear] ANY AMOUNT → [https://winred.despositoforcongress.com/d-esposito-for-new-york/email?utm_source=email&utm_medium=appeal&utm_content=other+button&utm_campaign=They+Want+Us+To+Live+In+Fear]

Let's unite to prevent the spread of radical policies to Long Island.

I'd like you to stand with me, leveraging my experience as a NYPD detective who knows the stakes involved. Please donate now to help us safeguard our community from the dangerous policies that have brought our city to the brink of chaos.

Sincerely,

Anthony

Unsubscribe https://despositoforcongress.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xdudtkd-dytjdljkkt-t/

body:
Jack Smith needs to know you stand with him
| **🚨 BREAKING 🚨
Jack Smith Fights “Unreasonable Legal Hurdles” to Hold Trump Accountable** Trump will do anything to SHUT DOWN Jack Smith’s investigation — he knows a conviction would DESTROY his reelection chances!

Trump and his MAGA mob won’t back down unless we step up: So we need to make sure EVERY Democrat has Jack Smith’s back!

[**You’ve been PERSONALLY selected to sign our thank you card, , so please don’t let us down: Add your name to thank Jack Smith now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62788?t=6&akid=13120%2E878179%2EMidUfB) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62788?t=7&akid=13120%2E878179%2EMidUfB)

TO: Special Counsel Jack Smith
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear Special Counsel Jack Smith,**

**_Thank you for all your hard work defending our democracy!_**

After Trump tried to OVERTURN President Biden’s victory and incited the deadly January 6th insurrection, you’ve fought tirelessly to bring him to justice.

Trump’s escalating threats to silence you before the election are DESPICABLE — and now, his far-right Supreme Court Justices could let him off scot-free.

**But as a dedicated Democratic supporter, please know that I’ll have your back in this fight every step of the way.**

[**I can’t thank you enough for indicting Donald Trump for his treasonous crimes! So I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing incredible Democrats who will save our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62788?t=8&akid=13120%2E878179%2EMidUfB) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62788?t=9&akid=13120%2E878179%2EMidUfB)

TRUMP: Friend - tomorrow we WIN SOUTH CAROLINA! #1 The media said we’d be done by now. #2 Biden’s DEEP STATE did everything they could to interfere in our election and STOP US! #3 But because of YOUR SUPPORT, we are WINNING WINNING WINNING! Through thick & thin, I always knew I could count on YOU to have my back. And for standing with me, I have just one thing to say: THANK YOU! Our fight to win back the White House is far from over. Joe Biden is bankrolled by HATE AMERICA liberal billionaires. If we’re going to defeat him, it will all come down to the support I receive from Patriots like YOU! | The entire political establishment expected that you’d ABANDON me by now. BUT I KNOW THAT WILL NEVER HAPPEN! WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, | | Donald J. subject: Dellicker & the Democrats at it again!

body:
Mackenzie For Congress | | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=8f0ef45184&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---

Dear Friends,
Last night I had a great time talking to the Patriots of the Constitution, and the night before I spoke at the Carbon County GOP meeting.
Sadly, in addition to the Democrat-aligned Super PACs attacking me (which was proven in a LehighValleyNews.com article this week), liberals also sent a “tracker” to this week’s events. (A tracker is a Democrat who infiltrates Republican events trying to get “gotcha comments” on video.) Thankfully the Democrat tracker was removed from the event last night before it started.
An odd thing happened though after the Democrat tracker was removed. Kevin Dellicker’s supporters repeated all the same talking points from the Democrat-aligned Super PACs - literally the exact same talking points verbatim - and Dellicker’s campaign staff were at the ready to film me as I was speaking.
Kevin Dellicker and his team are now using the same Democrat propaganda and the same Democrat campaign tactics. We can and should now expect some of Dellicker's edited video to be used by the Democrats as they continue to attack me.
None of this will deter me. As an America First conservative, I am used to battling the Democrats and the RINOs all the time. It’s the price to pay for standing up for you, the American people.
-Ryan
*****REMEMBER, BEWARE OF THESE DEMOCRAT-ALIGNED SUPER PACS***** Integrity Leadership FundLehigh Valley Republican Congressional Leadership FundPA Congressional Conservatives Fund

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: What Capital One and Discover are trying to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Our economy doesn’t need this right now.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1940%2E4032634%2EguhAyv)
---
You know what our economy _doesn’t_ need right now? A big corporate merger that would make our financial system less stable, reduce competition, and increase fees and credit costs for American families. I’m talking about **the recently proposed merger of two credit card giants, Capital One and Discover.** [**This Wall Street deal is dangerous. It would harm working people. And I’m calling on regulators to block it immediately. Add your name if you agree, and say you’re in this fight for a more competitive economy that works for families, not giant corporations.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-merger/?source=EMZ19O_FIN_E_20240223_V1S1&t=8&akid=1940%2E4032634%2EguhAyv) All over our economy, we see the painful consequences of corporate giants being allowed to gobble up other corporate giants. From the airline industry to grocery stores to agribusinesses to Big Tech to Ticketmaster, a smaller number of giants have gained more and more power, and they’ve used that power to stomp on workers and consumers. Once they control a bigger piece of the pie, they can control things like pricing — without any fear that their customers would go across the street for a cheaper price — because they own both sides of the street. The fewer firms in an industry, the easier it is for them to collude and fix prices. Why did we end up here? Here’s a big reason: for decades, regulators took their hands off the wheel and allowed corporate concentration to reach extreme heights. I’ve introduced legislation to help stomp out rampant corporate consolidation. And I’ve called on federal agencies to use all their tools to challenge big, harmful corporate mergers — mergers that can lead to lower wages, higher prices, worse service, and a less competitive economy. But I can’t get this done all by myself — we fight side by side as a grassroots movement. [**Add your name if you agree: We need to increase competition in our economy so small businesses, workers, and consumers can have a fighting chance — not just the big guys.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-merger/?source=EMZ19O_FIN_E_20240223_V1S1&t=9&akid=1940%2E4032634%2EguhAyv) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

subject: Join the Fight: Putting People Over Corporate Interests!

body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35171%2E120265%2EYrFCPt ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

I hope this message finds you well. As we gear up for the crucial battle
for IL-11's future, I want to speak to you heart-to-heart about the values
that drive our campaign.

I've always believed that our elected officials must be held accountable
for their actions. As a proud father of three in Illinois' 11th District,
I refuse to idly stand by while politicians like Bill Foster prioritize
the interests of mega-corporations, then turn around and vote against our
healthcare, our environment, and our financial stability.

[ ]Our newest campaign ad captures this belief.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/6149?t=1002&akid=35171%2E120265%2EYrFCPt ][IMG]

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. In my bid for the US Congress,
I've promised not to take a single penny from corporate PACs. Why? Because
I believe in putting the interests of our community first, not the special
interests of big corporations.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/6153?t=1003&akid=35171%2E120265%2EYrFCPt ]Contribute to our 100% people-funded movement. Justice can't wait.

Check out [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/700?t=1004&akid=35171%2E120265%2EYrFCPt ]our website to learn more about our campaign and find out how
you can get involved today.

Thank you for your unwavering support.

Sincerely,

— Qasim Rashid

Fellow Conservative, I’m organizing one of the most aggressive grassroots campaigns in the country. **That’s the only way we’ll flip the MOST contested Senate seat in the country.**

It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election, and that’s who I’m counting on -- unlike my Democrat opponent, who is relying on her network of coastal megadonors and D.C. insiders to buy this election.

To earn the Wisconsin Republican Party’s endorsement, [**I need to show I have the grassroots support to achieve victory in November by collecting 1,000 unique donations before March 31st.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviR_HOJ8v4BvbQEWh2O_yNiRDCMkKMb7_JjBwAUIoRA3elJ65DMUVpgbqfyLvPRTFnTXz7DzumWSdemUhwkn3JeojiS3oe93I03j-A2bNftvtJ5Gucrp43qQswdfhkYwleS9MEofzbWVPjCCpEnSN8Xw%3D%3D)

I just announced my campaign to defeat Democrat Tammy Baldwin two days ago! [**That gives me just over one month to hit my target.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviXgO0iT8rQ0pJjIrugKNaRg_NeLNIDF1J4DDRTUmjiIw9dPG0RTMHTwdXeA-Po25CtpoRoaVEOsee3773DrkOyWR4R87qntrdk-0MMwNPMKEEdiSjT2CFd_1eERVHtQUwHftUcytMahg7pedwTJ5eog%3D%3D) THAT'S NOT A LOT OF TIME!

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviVI2QZBFdEG1d7_VcIqvYOQq_2Nr90m9lK7_uTk_8z0Cf_EcFikkIiw-iWZbCxff3b_-_RKbiLDdx-q2nUA9TYchud2HhyYN2ASKBJ-V6dk5IGK_VAU5vm1niOYpChldvpCSQMDAq7Geeq8NKZVjTCA%3D%3D) | [**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviPTgMAHToex6oVfAHUpIzVoTFQLRDjFA991_ZlUw4RD2LTmKqybtnvBkvwdbpsP6uraN-WxH1QRCQbOrGIub1yELyGEeah3816jcQShlcBRaZnVgoPDuj3h6fTgjD6y6L-0e7_cBp83NdRf7sileciw%3D%3D)
---

Unlike my opponent, I am not a career politician with decades worth of campaign infrastructure or thousands of donors in my arsenal. _I am starting from scratch._

That’s why I’m coming to you today with a personal ask: [**Will you be one of the unique donors I need to secure the Wisconsin GOP's endorsement for the U.S. Senate?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviexCvTj_O05aBN7J3AqjOCqDvbqRghwmDtf6P3nmj63Vf8v2LVTYG_LEa8m7TyovDY6xGHjgiRXdWtTlXvlkDZmTZH7SOBGaWr7FsTssRTAsegvQmg5KsVRPgoJgA-hZHhHna9X6EQ5-u7BD4AOBvuQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekvifk9SfplitH6Q5EF46KDudJUYmWK6K33rWfz5DzQ6wU1kMFAJ-ljYHz1NobJB63EXAPZJabC5lTjDeMfsU9Op7g08ih_6tQoZ6qaPR_oOObs2vzrR8tvxcyPd8NUzz7YZLLfiy9syL41Po6-HBeOyYg%3D%3D)
[**No contribution is too small - every dollar donated gets us one step closer to achieving our fundraising goal.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=07aa1e6ac7df47c4b0334db9de8f244f&_e=X2roTKRnIHbPFTBjKXxkGJ7Wbg4f3NvbMmZt0uUO0yrt3Iiiy73ECOJS4qxJcYVpEwdmyyott0YazQXRm6tlgkODJBjG4Eg7Xdk1p85WSqKFm12TJIgwS497rgCDMmE_JwCzCp-3gdatFGOZCSULyeQDbkd1ywa-y_A7bA4p8exhWJjwoXKUaVpqlNuHt0OC3wPA728LYgtHD7wBIrXnjr4EhuxnUiZ0GvwytVkRYA_jJHGgMUMx2S27Z9u0ekviYAHtkKVffSlfo_xJkeXFpDq6hQ89XtZzlS10Wa_m3BxZqipbcnGCckbw1X0YcLYCpKAJWdMucano2tLtmFUIuCLSxjaxwxBENJAwGajdeHrOZmxdnZ0p93tF9_HgoBzzGo7tzvhgIQlKX7_-CSL3rQ%3D%3D)

The eyes of the entire country will be on Wisconsin this November. Our grassroots support at this early stage will give us the resources to compete with my opponent’s army of megadonors.

| | Dear Friend,

President Biden and Congressman Costa have been in politics for a combined 100 years--years of the same broken policies that have resulted in unprecedented amounts of fentanyl crossing our broken border, rising costs, and more challenges making ends meet. It's time for a change. I'm committed to making a positive change for our Valley and making sure that our voices are heard in Washington D.C.

As a Navy veteran and former law enforcement agent, I've developed the skills necessary to deliver for our community—deliver creative, common-sense solutions to the problems we face.

But, we must take action. If you haven't voted, yet, please mark your ballot and return it. **Voters must return their ballots on or before March 5th.** You can simply put them in the mail or return them to your nearest ballot drop-off location.
* Here's the link to find your Fresno County Ballot Drop Off—[Click HERE](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=36971f677f&e=1722d05e10)
* And the Tulare County Ballot Drop Off—[Click HERE](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=2de1a76dc1&e=1722d05e10)

We are working hard to make sure voters hear about our message of change, but we could use your help! [Will you make a $5 Friday contribution today?](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=5d21285c9d&e=1722d05e10) Your help will supply our volunteers with the necessary resources to get our message out to voters.

Please CLICK on the DONATE button below.

Fellow Conservative, I’m organizing one of the most aggressive grassroots campaigns in the country. **That’s the only way we’ll flip the MOST contested Senate seat in the country.**

It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election, and that’s who I’m counting on -- unlike my Democrat opponent, who is relying on her network of coastal megadonors and D.C. insiders to buy this election.

name: Hillary Clinton's Wish [UTS]
subject: Abolish the electoral college?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79612129/457015861/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_240233_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2NTI2YzFjLWIyZDItZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fz9UgIt8x0Rkw-w13-7cfm3y3Cuba4SJNOwBpVwLbRk=)
The Electoral College, a relic of the past, challenges the core principles of our democracy. It unfairly amplifies the influence of specific states, often muffling the authentic voice of the populace. And honestly, Peter, Hillary Clinton couldn't have said it better:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79612130/457015863/815532530?contactdata=qcQGon7N/EaTdJb007H6mfcHLexZBY2YHEB5TbbH7axGK6obgNtSQ8jLmifr5a7hBvxj4YfkAUJ4xhNECr5j8YcSRctidoBN3qu8dV9JYQw6IhKBg+9r8GMvFjogyIgAteV64RMa6FHrhrYbFVfYU3FTL48DdzL8uFBdOGej494=&refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_240233_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2NTI2YzFjLWIyZDItZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fz9UgIt8x0Rkw-w13-7cfm3y3Cuba4SJNOwBpVwLbRk=&emci=12fc3a8d-90d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=06526c1c-b2d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)
In every other election, the candidate with the most votes wins. So, why should the Presidency be any different? It's time for a change.
The Electoral College has significantly influenced numerous elections, including the hotly contested 2016 race. This system has the potential to override the majority's will, a fact underscored when Donald Trump ascended to the Presidency despite trailing by millions in the popular vote. This issue cuts to the heart of our democracy's integrity.
To ensure every American's vote carries equal weight, irrespective of their state, we must unite. Abolishing the Electoral College represents a monumental stride towards a more balanced and representative democracy.
[_**Will you add your name to our petition and stand with us in demanding an end to the Electoral College?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79612132/457015864/815532530?contactdata=qcQGon7N/EaTdJb007H6mfcHLexZBY2YHEB5TbbH7axGK6obgNtSQ8jLmifr5a7hBvxj4YfkAUJ4xhNECr5j8YcSRctidoBN3qu8dV9JYQw6IhKBg+9r8GMvFjogyIgAteV64RMa6FHrhrYbFVfYU3FTL48DdzL8uFBdOGej494=&refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_240233_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2NTI2YzFjLWIyZDItZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fz9UgIt8x0Rkw-w13-7cfm3y3Cuba4SJNOwBpVwLbRk=&emci=12fc3a8d-90d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=06526c1c-b2d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)
[Add Your Name »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79612133/457015866/815532530?contactdata=qcQGon7N/EaTdJb007H6mfcHLexZBY2YHEB5TbbH7axGK6obgNtSQ8jLmifr5a7hBvxj4YfkAUJ4xhNECr5j8YcSRctidoBN3qu8dV9JYQw6IhKBg+9r8GMvFjogyIgAteV64RMa6FHrhrYbFVfYU3FTL48DdzL8uFBdOGej494=&refcode=UTS_FR_FULL_240233_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA2NTI2YzFjLWIyZDItZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Fz9UgIt8x0Rkw-w13-7cfm3y3Cuba4SJNOwBpVwLbRk=&emci=12fc3a8d-90d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=06526c1c-b2d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=24268976)

clean_body: = The Electoral College, a relic of the past, challenges the core principles of our democracy. It unfairly amplifies the influence of specific states, often muffling the authentic voice of the populace. And honestly, Peter, Hillary Clinton couldn't have said it better: In every other election, the candidate with the most votes wins. So, why should the Presidency be any different? It's time for a change. The Electoral College has significantly influenced numerous elections, including the hotly contested 2016 race. This system has the potential to override the majority's will, a fact underscored when Donald Trump ascended to the Presidency despite trailing by millions in the popular vote. This issue cuts to the heart of our democracy's integrity. To ensure every American's vote carries equal weight, irrespective of their state, we must unite. Abolishing the Electoral College represents a monumental stride towards a more balanced and representative democracy. Together, we can ensure that future presidential elections truly reflect the will of the people. Let's make history and create a democracy where every vote holds equal power. Thank you for standing with us in this pivotal moment. — Upset the Setup | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and empower young, diverse Democratic candidates up and down the ballot, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. Peter, I’m organizing one of the most aggressive grassroots campaigns in the country. **That’s the only way we’ll flip the MOST contested Senate seat in the country.**

It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election, and that’s who I’m counting on -- unlike my Democrat opponent, who is relying on her network of coastal megadonors and D.C. insiders to buy this election.

To earn the Wisconsin Republican Party’s endorsement, [**I need to show I have the grassroots support to achieve victory in November by collecting 1,000 unique donations before March 31st.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9bf2ad74d1d148c09754ce06c7659801&_e=VNGoIzpKhEjrR8_B_MfDtpqD8xYiuNQMAQNrPK0Waogclbqeon5X5sZFwuU48f9G1Kpwxz5dJZzQsILTzr0MwBZWf2rV7votCL8UVIkUylmKTnXBoxcWyfA7N5czhk1hGi19E1WNBRHmRJ_pBDJjwqfuAA30MQJ5UVwkfErF2Hx1gkPF-ssVY75-lXxJU0GmkKKoQXr2_fnNucbLcVtAVcVGVSinjTPSlqKqiKUu7BC_E-v70ZtcQfi0tNL8e17pQqNCSrhvN_fzEw6mTRRwcOXlyvNfmF6qCTG_txh7laPF7SsAJ5kEorSiekLQbxPCeeBQbTgC6JdVf9wqPVOA3Qt1mpL8t5XSYHc5owMfRfT-t-MPSpJzP64mTI2U0CZz9-V2arVex830QUuwTf3v3Q%3D%3D)

I just announced my campaign to defeat Democrat Tammy Baldwin two days ago! [**That gives me just over one month to hit my target.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9bf2ad74d1d148c09754ce06c7659801&_e=VNGoIzpKhEjrR8_B_MfDtpqD8xYiuNQMAQNrPK0Waogclbqeon5X5sZFwuU48f9G1Kpwxz5dJZzQsILTzr0MwBZWf2rV7votCL8UVIkUylmKTnXBoxcWyfA7N5czhk1hGi19E1WNBRHmRJ_pBDJjwqfuAA30MQJ5UVwkfErF2Hx1gkPF-ssVY75-lXxJU0GmkKKoQXr2_fnNucbLcVtAVcVGVSinjTPSlqKqiKUu7BC_E-v70ZtcQfi0tNL8e17pn54pioOdaau92GXYN8zw-TpZugFRg6cwBk7FthzIpU4GLKZNJPIy8IJrjBuFQaoficxoNUwwW1xiphnJyUWOUc1taUxq9Jrs7lsGEjYHTEP2qS6caskRcFZB4SkdD-E8VIVTnZmcy1bMsZsK7bw7bA%3D%3D) THAT'S NOT A LOT OF TIME!

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: URGENT: MAGA Republicans plan MASSIVE attacks on our environment with only days left to avoid a government shutdown.
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv. ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-xg0~

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10653019&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2&spReportId=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10653019&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2&spReportId=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10653019&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2&spReportId=MTkyMDUxNDkyMAS2

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=51fa9eda4b9440d5868eb54039b23b9b&_e=wJafNYejJhC0d0R7CGyjgjyNyCYfcAQ6WFEI4-G80MNnNly-s8FRxsdMD8ieAn4eNPbACyYnMItgKnWY1FVT4fiYctr0G4ssqjfZy4sPGcbopOXPH6OkBU1Lba5ZvVr2PrI8uTLkOiNTkOMU97o96H1tbWdmebMyTfrGdK6bMrwJ67ziX31Y5KnxRWj2jFvf998HumtYwKymwOMVp-XNXYWVMSZPkHQHSBEoBGl36yHHvM3yxoTiXgqbcJYr5QMfO58eCTB_eTJxtDIulxtBXKfMIIa7PdM48lntiKNLhqIZYrYiYWuGqaxwLopzPfZ-VEFTnU5POxeG0OI4T5m7fcGa9D5Ljz0n-nER-AsemoUlyT5NiirPC4d72HsJZErrC6URD7AqxkmCTCIx_zQyOw%3D%3D)
I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=51fa9eda4b9440d5868eb54039b23b9b&_e=wJafNYejJhC0d0R7CGyjgjyNyCYfcAQ6WFEI4-G80MNnNly-s8FRxsdMD8ieAn4eNPbACyYnMItgKnWY1FVT4fiYctr0G4ssqjfZy4sPGcbopOXPH6OkBU1Lba5ZvVr2PrI8uTLkOiNTkOMU97o96H1tbWdmebMyTfrGdK6bMrwJ67ziX31Y5KnxRWj2jFvf998HumtYwKymwOMVp-XNXYWVMSZPkHQHSBEoBGl36yHHvM3yxoTiXgqbcJYr5QMfrBDtFG-nn2u_R6Am99TsD2wnzlXH0dddxTXrs5xlpI2VegThU9-042JbzMbarWXaZ8Eecu5otsCPNVE_z8mUoWwtUFz8nJgO5orFwOK8qrH5uicYO-7k-9bxTMYzFjHr4MtDw0fL20m3R1BiteYB5A%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

Earlier today, there was a panel discussion called “Adam Schiff Justice”
at the Conservative Political Action Conference (known as CPAC). And trust
me, it was not designed to be a flattering reference.

Then, MAGA House Republican leader Elise Stefanik spent her speaking time
at CPAC attacking me.

She called me a “Russia hoaxer” and denied the January 6th insurrection.

And only a few hours later, Donald Trump took the stage at a campaign
rally in South Carolina, where he once again lashed out at me.

He called me a “sleazebag” for investigating his blackmail threat to bribe
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to dig up dirt on Joe Biden. And
more.

Derek, all of
this happened today.

With only 11 days until our primary election, we can only expect more
attacks from here.

And while we’re spending our campaign resources on reaching voters, we
also need to be able to respond to these outrageous attacks against me.

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate [ ]Trump at a rally in South Carolina We are just 11 days away from the primary election, Derek — and MAGA Republicans are scaling up their attacks and insults like we’ve never seen before. Especially Donald Trump. [ ]Before I get into all the MAGA attacks I’ve dealt with today, will you pitch in $3 or any amount so we can respond and reach the crucial undecided voters we need to connect with before March 5th? [ ]DONATE Earlier today, there was a panel discussion called “Adam Schiff Justice” at the Conservative Political Action Conference (known as CPAC). And trust me, it was not designed to be a flattering reference. Then, MAGA House Republican leader Elise Stefanik spent her speaking time at CPAC attacking me. She called me a “Russia hoaxer” and denied the January 6th insurrection. And only a few hours later, Donald Trump took the stage at a campaign rally in South Carolina, where he once again lashed out at me. He called me a “sleazebag” for investigating his blackmail threat to bribe Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to dig up dirt on Joe Biden. And more. Derek, all of this happened today. With only 11 days until our primary election, we can only expect more attacks from here. And while we’re spending our campaign resources on reaching voters, we also need to be able to respond to these outrageous attacks against me. name: Ted Cruz
subject: SHOCK POLL: Allred within 2 points
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is shocking. We are so early in the campaign, and Colin Allred has gotten himself within two points of our campaign! | **CRUZ 42%**
**ALLRED 40%**
_I’m in shock._ We can’t let it happen, Peter.

Colin Allred is already within two points of our campaign! I’m sounding the alarm because the Democrats are coming to flip Texas BLUE.

And we already know that Colin Allred will be running an effective campaign, so we can’t count him out. He will be among the most formidable opponents I’ve ever faced in a general election.

This election is shaping up to be my most challenging race ever. I need all my best supporters with me to be successful. So, I must reach you by email, mail, and phone.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WwuKcCFih6mWZW8M%2bzsF5g&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30784%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4et4EPD4xPqJo7EIUMAlSw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30795%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aY8IbBDW9KjitdGzGyONHQ&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: John Kennedy
subject: We might as well enjoy it while it lasts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Can you imagine what would be in store if they won again next year?

| |

---
| | | As I always do, let me give it to you straight:

The Democrats JUST squeaked ahead in the polls and activated their army of Liberal megadonors to grow their lead even further. _**[Unfortunately, I'm left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgafav5ri2lih016esc6a77sd0srkaa6ne4reajo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob5c1h2bs "Unfortunately, I’m left with no other choice than to ask you for a small contribution before we lose everything.")**_

Look,

The Democrats are working from dawn 'til dusk to force-feed Liberal propaganda in our classrooms, trash the reputations of Conservative Supreme Court justices, re-up mask mandates, leave the border wide open, and woke-ify our military - that's enough to drive folks like you and me up a wall...

**But their Limousine Liberal buddies eat it up. And the huge checks roll in one after another. **

They'd love nothing more than to see the downfall of our House Majority. They know Conservatives would be powerless to stop them if they take full control of Congress.

_I know Mike Johnson reached out...
I know Steve Scalise reached out...
I know Kellyanne Conway reached out...
I know Newt Gingrich reached out...
I know Byron Donalds reached out...
And I know James Comer reached out..._

But now I'm reaching out ONE LAST TIME because the latest reports show the Radical Democrats with a devastating $8 million lead on us.

_**[If we don't get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That's why I'm asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8vt8v8arvp04kcir1tssvtj92cdik82q7m7bmkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob5c1h2bs "If we don’t get it together, the Democrats will be sitting pretty with complete control of the House, Senate, and White House before we know it. That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours.")**_

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Are you fed up with the leadership in D.C, friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR NICK BEGICH**
body:
I know I am.

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z66r19odd01fdej5kjdula8osvgh0o7r3a1j1qi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob5clh2bs)
---
Vivek Ramaswamy here.

_**Are you fed up with the leadership in D.C, John? I know I am.**_

D.C. is rampant with out-of-touch politicians forcing their agenda upon us all and expecting the American people to suffer in silence.

And if we want to bring a new generation of leaders into the Halls of Congress, **it starts right now.**

That’s why I have a critical favor to ask of you. **My friend, Nick Begich, needs your help.**

Nick is a conservative fighter who can win and flip Alaska **RED** on Election Day and, more importantly: help Republicans maintain the House majority.

**And as a pro-Trump, pro-America patriot, Democrats are doing everything they can to CRUSH his campaign.

** They know that in Congress, he’ll put the brakes on their radical leftist agenda, and they’re **terrified**.

I don’t think I can overstate this enough. If we want to turn our country around and rid D.C. of the Radical Left’s DISASTROUS leadership, then we must win key seats like Nick’s.

But the Radical Left Democrats aren’t sitting idly by; they’ve called in the big guns. Their dark money and Deep State donors are throwing millions at Nick’s handpicked establishment opponent.

**[I’ll be straight with you, John. Our country is on the line this November, and if we lose MUST-WIN seats like Nick’s, it’ll be all over.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7o1da0hcpe0epsr3852juepsgncfvet472ltijo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob5clh2bs)**

---
**[If we’re going to have any chance of bringing on the RED WAVE in 2024, it depends on the grassroots support from patriots like YOU, John.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zguk551aflnffjt1pe3vhcvn70bkcu0kesl1l2bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob5clh2bs)**

name: Eric Hovde
subject: I’m behind my donor goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election...

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z58o1sqfbes5r3vi3k0dbhekn7f8j12n2v1392u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)

---

Fellow Conservative, I’m organizing one of the most aggressive grassroots campaigns in the country. **That’s the only way we’ll flip the MOST contested Senate seat in the country.**

It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election, and that’s who I’m counting on -- unlike my Democrat opponent, who is relying on her network of coastal megadonors and D.C. insiders to buy this election.

To earn the Wisconsin Republican Party’s endorsement, [**I need to show I have the grassroots support to achieve victory in November by collecting 1,000 unique donations before March 31st.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr2eeu4amcftk06872bh2btq8hra7r9200p35dg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)

I just announced my campaign to defeat Democrat Tammy Baldwin two days ago! [**That gives me just over one month to hit my target.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhgbeqce29q4gv7q8tspmcfbs32o96r6i40duq9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs) THAT'S NOT A LOT OF TIME!

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt1qtcoppc0bkblqaphh355r303rokjvjq080qbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs) | [**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7ca9g2nfsm62gq4b7qnmd1mad61fcij1huo04rg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)
---

Unlike my opponent, I am not a career politician with decades worth of campaign infrastructure or thousands of donors in my arsenal. _I am starting from scratch._

That’s why I’m coming to you today with a personal ask: [**Will you be one of the unique donors I need to secure the Wisconsin GOP's endorsement for the U.S. Senate?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zont0ufgnvfsvcrh60riuidciiaqcdg9aun4aup0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)

[**No contribution is too small - every dollar donated gets us one step closer to achieving our fundraising goal.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3mvrg9e25h83tbjshnqvp30lgqhcfepaqjab30_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)

The eyes of the entire country will be on Wisconsin this November. Our grassroots support at this early stage will give us the resources to compete with my opponent’s army of megadonors.

[**Will you help me get earn the Wisconsin GOP’s endorsement by pushing us over our 1,000 donor threshold? Take advantage of this opportunity to be among our FIRST 1,000 elite grassroots contributors!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8bv8s8mtdmnj18no6vdk4n9joa1ovka4k7tsmn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)

Sincerely,
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z06peqc1imni6uc5drrpe8igdh8nc938mr0tr338_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)
Eric Hovde
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze0n46ulv9hodrd28l9db0o1rogdfc3i8smq1eb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob1clh2bs)
---

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

name: Trump Train News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoftjn22v6ekecp7ea1nqnp6o47en7ivt57jv2sg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob7cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvi29a6pmvojumr8iape65eeigdchlr4fm25h5bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30stjm4ob7cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: poisoned drinking water?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

_How would you feel if you found out aborted fetal remains and traces of Chemical Abortion Pills were in your drinking water?_

**_Well, they are_.**

And when _Students for Life Action_ tells people, _especially health-conscious young people,_ that fact, _they IMMEDIATELY recoil in horror_.

In fact, it’s one of the most effective ways we’ve found yet to turn Americans away from President Biden’s radical pro-abortion agenda and become pro-life.

**That’s why we’re doing everything possible to EXPOSE to the American people how the Abortion Lobby is poisoning America’s water supply.**

**[And it’s why I’m counting on you to please co-sign the demand letter we just sent to President Biden’s EPA](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shhhiht-duchtdja-y/).**

As you’ll see, this demand letter insists that the EPA _investigate_ and _PUBLICIZE_ the damage Chemical Abortion Pills are inflicting on America’s water supply.

The sad reality is, since the fall of _Roe v. Wade,_ the Abortion Lobby has sought to flood America with Chemical Abortion Pills – _even in states with pro-life laws_.

In fact, the Biden Administration even recently ruled that the Post Office can legally mail these pills into states with abortion prevention laws!

Once these Chemical Abortion Pills are ingested, they starve preborn babies of vital nutrients.

_Then, after a painful labor at home, their corpses are then usually dropped in toilets – along with trace chemicals of these pills_.

Since wastewater treatment plants don’t treat for human remains or Chemical Abortion Pills, America’s drinking water is being poisoned.

Today, well over half of all abortions are committed with the Abortion Lobby’s deadly cocktail of drugs.

You should see the SHOCK on students’ faces when we tell them all of this – _and then ask them if they’d like a drink of tap water_ . . .

Last year, we converted 19% of the pro-abortion/on-the-fence young people we talked to about abortion using this issue!

**[So, will you please click here to co-sign the demand letter we just sent to the EPA](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shhhiht-duchtdja-j/)?**

The more signatures I can gather, the more of a public spotlight we can shine on what President Biden is doing to America’s water supply – just because they want to kill more precious little preborn boys and girls.

And the more public we make this, the stronger our movement can grow as more Americans will join our ranks.

Here’s the truth:

**>>> The hundreds of thousands of preborn babies who are killed by Chemical Abortion Pills every year are killed by starvation;**

**>>> At least 28 mothers, that we know of, have died from complications from Chemical Abortion Pills.** The REAL number is likely far more as there is no national reporting standard, proving the pro-abortion Left doesn’t really care about women as they claim;

**>>> Women with certain blood types can become infertile if they have these abortions at home, which are being encouraged by the Biden Aministration.** Not long ago, a man we met on one of our door knocking campaigns told us a heartbreaking story about how his cousin can’t have children after undergoing a chemical abortion; and

**>>> Human remains and traces of abortion chemicals are making their way into our water supply as the precious preborn babies who’ve been killed by chemical abortions are usually just flushed down toilets.** Wastewater treatment plants don’t treat for human remains or abortion drugs. And the FDA has never released any studies on environmental impact.
**[So please, co-sign our demand letter to the EPA right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shhhiht-duchtdja-i/).**

And then could you forward this to three pro-life friends just like you so they can also sign?

**[And then, if you possibly can, please agree to your most generous contribution – whether that’s $500, $250, or $100](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shhhiht-duchtdja-d/).**

With your generosity, we’ll gather even more signers to help EXPOSE how the Biden administration is poisoning our water supply on behalf of Planned Parenthood.

If that’s too much, please agree to $50 or $25.

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

**[Sign the demand letter to the EPA<<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-shhhiht-duchtdja-h/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Eric Hovde
subject: I’m behind my donor goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election...

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30792%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OairnT3wp7Wv5vGYPq2v%2fA&sysid=1)

---

Fellow Conservative, I’m organizing one of the most aggressive grassroots campaigns in the country. **That’s the only way we’ll flip the MOST contested Senate seat in the country.**

It’s hardworking Americans who are going to win us this election, and that’s who I’m counting on -- unlike my Democrat opponent, who is relying on her network of coastal megadonors and D.C. insiders to buy this election.

To earn the Wisconsin Republican Party’s endorsement, [**I need to show I have the grassroots support to achieve victory in November by collecting 1,000 unique donations before March 31st.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30793%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9uQBRJXUCBF79%2fYqqHjF8A&sysid=1)

I just announced my campaign to defeat Democrat Tammy Baldwin two days ago! [**That gives me just over one month to hit my target.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30794%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tZ%2b5V4N7sbFY7EfHVOfb7A&sysid=1) THAT'S NOT A LOT OF TIME!

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30705%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EmGh4ivkI%2fnAkIGGBRuC%2bA&sysid=1) | [**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30706%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=56bZNP19u34D0dg%2b%2bOESkg&sysid=1)
---

Unlike my opponent, I am not a career politician with decades worth of campaign infrastructure or thousands of donors in my arsenal. _I am starting from scratch._

That’s why I’m coming to you today with a personal ask: [**Will you be one of the unique donors I need to secure the Wisconsin GOP's endorsement for the U.S. Senate?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30707%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4iFuV2%2bKrweK2H7TFdUTjw&sysid=1)

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30708%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=32NFRBOzasyilmWbjiSLFQ&sysid=1)
[**No contribution is too small - every dollar donated gets us one step closer to achieving our fundraising goal.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30709%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WT%2fvnidA28i4blXEZNJE8g&sysid=1)

The eyes of the entire country will be on Wisconsin this November. Our grassroots support at this early stage will give us the resources to compete with my opponent’s army of megadonors.

[**Will you help me get earn the Wisconsin GOP’s endorsement by pushing us over our 1,000 donor threshold? Take advantage of this opportunity to be among our FIRST 1,000 elite grassroots contributors!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30700%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pxCLsb%2feaQHLIxE18yfg8A&sysid=1)

Sincerely,
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30701%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rhaqvCvyb%2f%2b3llxSULUl8w&sysid=1)
Eric Hovde
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**JOIN THE FIGHT >>>**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c30706%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=56bZNP19u34D0dg%2b%2bOESkg&sysid=1)
---

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children.

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW1vRp3iNK

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW1vRp3iNK

One of
the most important free speech cases of our time is going before
the Supreme Court, and you probably haven't heard about it.

Right
now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their
common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on
social media. These bills were passed for a reason - conservative
voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes)
that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted
in countless violations and suspensions. And that's not an
exaggeration; we've experienced many cases of discriminatory
censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for
8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male
person ("Admiral" Rachel Levine) as a man.

It's
gotten completely out of hand.

Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it.
They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful
for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint
discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies
challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the
Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have
far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who
uses social media to share their views and defend their values.

That's
why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the
Florida and Texas laws.

Join The
Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee

This is
nothing new for us. We've long been committed to defending free
speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech
battles we've taken on over the years:

We
filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a
humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook
page.
We
sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to
block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies
to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism,
radicalization, and hate speech."
We
sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship
debauchery.
We
refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our
Twitter account with over 1 million followers
We
told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting
on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn't
easy or inexpensive, but it's the right thing to do. And it's
making a difference. But we can't do it without you.

Will you
become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in
the fight?

Join The
Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee

Seth
Dillon
CEO | The
Babylon Bee
Pronouns:
Bee and Beeself

© 2024 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved.
Our
mailing address is:
The

A recent court filing indicates cell phone data suggests Nathan Wade and District Attorney Fani Willis lied about how much time they spent together. # **[Balloon intercepted above Utah not a national security threat, NORAD reportedly says](http://trk.libertyledger._ndWxDIg)**

A balloon that was intercepted above Utah does not pose a national security threat, the North American Aerospace Defense Command indicated, according to Fox News Digital."In close coordination with the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA), North American Aerospace Defense Command (NORAD) detected a small balloon at an altitude varying between 43,000-45,000 ft," NORAD indicated, according to the outlet.

The Catholic church that recently came under scrutiny for hosting a funeral for a trans-identifying atheist allegedly knew about the activist's background, according to family members, the New York Post reported.The family of Cecilia Gentili is demanding an apology from the archdiocese after St. Patrick's Cathedral claimed it was tricked into hosting a funeral service for the 52-year-old Argentinian-born activist who advocated for the trans community, sex workers, and HIV/AIDs patients.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkc1ugzAQhJ_G3EBmbf4OHCIBVaUkrdpDjpZjL2DJBmQbVX37iii597qzmtlv53YRF2msWaardNiO1gsfxCLFbKxNPQaMqcfRY5gFUOAphRS4yBPd0rzRnCfY5hWtq7JiLE_mFqoSG6b5iEXBdc005oijrsZSlwoKnpj28KEAnNa8KGim-F2z-l43dVNUUjaEU2nRx2z0iHp1ctHW3NHHX4_b6mOmVpfYdo5xC4SdCAwEBrtlx8VBS4sZ6p3AEGdMJ48yPjGUkscuG4IirKM0B3alwOFMy-6j6_tvAuUenQjr7hUS1m1-DRuqaJbpKTnUZneEdeiksc-hkm6TZloI6-KMj8RH4Etel4hLJKy79cP75fTWi89TOpy_0tcfEt_q7cdYa0JZEU6nw_xBGf9fyF8AAAD__0rGkvw)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Dear Friends & Supporters, Are you enjoying my thorough daily newsletter and weekly summary?
Please make a donation today to support my efforts to keep you informed.
While I'm no longer in the Senate of Virginia, I'm putting my 8 years of service and experience to work for you.
While the General Assembly is meeting through Saturday, March 9, and is introducing legislation that will effect your quality of life, it's critical that you know what to do to support or oppose certain bills that I've highlighted for you.
Would you be willing to pitch in to cover my costs?

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pSEM0sdbDmGC9egP-mk8iA~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pSEM0sdbDmGC9egP-mk8iA~~/AARclAA~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pSEM0sdbDmGC9egP-mk8iA~~/AARclAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | ~ | | ~ Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. ~ Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

# Saturday, February 24, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday!** On this day in 1868, the House of Representatives passed a resolution to impeach President Andrew Johnson for "high crimes and misdemeanors." He was the first US President to be impeached. ([Read more](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1ShTAQQOGnCR3MZgk_Fils6K6tJbOEDaxDEibEi769o7Xlqc7M9_6YHySHxO2NAtvi00yuyJNnrNHUaGZTrdYzI7cVWz3AOIyd6XS128X7Dtu-7WAxoAEW5zU6Dw7phXVvKrEIaADRaOj6dmxGN3qCtad15aHVpAzwKiXl5iNJLDv74zs9OTcuheqweynnpdpXhZPC6b7v5lyuJuXtt7ZlVzhR4CyOIn-dnIWjY4WTZyqfmS-F05YpllrCyeT2wLEonKps1_OW45CrH5SBLZAcf8vyL8BPAAAA__-6-V2u)) What are you up to this weekend? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFOwzAQANCvsbdW5_Ml8eIBqcpEWBkj47skB05SpaaIv0eIke5veq_DOCQtus0vaZVYp31MuepdRjwhnZBGshwnERRvJboOQhcaapxdIr8RB84EDXBmyLlBcFNoM3sXSNhqREACRHLQtD6cQw5TAm4Ts3TeJUMgrHU_zu-7bnWRqXzvdznOeV9tiUut15vxTwZ7g_1_YrAf0qz5WbePX-N7Mf7C1y8tRW9tZwjmNWn5s-1nXY2_ENgjPja2Pgz4CQAA__-5oFwR). This weekend's edition is brought to you by our friends at [Incogni](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uMyEQBPCngc4nWP4cX0HxSdZ1TpsSrWA5b4QP6444yttHTlKmnJniJ83rJV2QG2_rC94ojtoT5sEPSnACewKbrCyxEgEZSVHPKszBWaflNTqPGuZcKAev__nqlcYQSDljDSKA5AgKrAKwWjlvwhRyqKiKx1JoNhqFVVR49H1667yNK9X22R-0T7nfZIvXMe6HMP8FLAKWlcbEW-7rxhN3AQvWmrIwS6-V9sRFmLPWTgvwz-UnhwDP4ujveyZhzr-A3GO5f3BrfPhZWLXekNu3Ov784CsAAP__iyBbMg).
