## Russia Hit With New Sanctions
[More than 600 new sanctions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAUAL8Gb7bggYEMDF28pWtHi8Bz_CoMkaFB-fsqnbuddMPpvq7r1VOifP_0B7q2ldWHRk9cYQQ1glrVEN2GCCgHdMJwa-ysZjHszmot5kuQXM5GWgFmi8pe4BJUuGmpYCAHHBQHUILPWtrJBrt5HrWPEY0UnimOkVo5p-9Cue24pVd54jmFcgzJ7a09KpMfDBYGS-99Creasde3Z7C8kcFyo4h5zNjH86dW8mP1OTQquY4HJWr-fDFYhtPFR6eUqGrDFL8fntJfqP27_RsAAP__aA9ZeA) were levied on Russia by the U.S., U.K., and the E.U. in response to the death of opposition leader Alexey Navalny. It's the largest batch of sanctions since the Russian invasion of Ukraine two years ago. [The penalties targeted Russian](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2uozAQRp_GdIPMYMApKDZa0WXbLdEED7F3_RPZThBvf5Vb3-qTvtMcnb-39UbOu_j4Q4HnuqeVturevCKgAlSrasy8MyP3Dc_dJPWkBzV0jZ0laTMQXkY0vbncL6RxkkOvu_6-GzlNjZtRopKIqpPD2OtWb3onaUYyhqe-I6EkG1dTbv8lF6vl3Z_pzbndUmj8bGt9FtH_ErgIXI7jaEOJHyZw4QivInAJKfL5Wcr_uX6ekiBQPKFQ3KpLsUCKkF-lOAKbDgivzYILT9oqmATV8gmZyfsTLL1Z4EIZrtfO3X7b3OTZPA_nvSvjJJR8BHL-W6_-GOsrAAD___85bLw) financial institutions and manufacturing industries, and they imposed travel restrictions on select Russian officials. President Biden hinted at a new wave of sanctions earlier this week after reports of Navalny's death began to appear. Biden told reporters he had "no doubt" Putin was behind the death of Navalny. The administration indicated further sanctions were a possibility and told journalists to ["expect more."](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3ojwgQ0dGLpkS9eO1hmO5FoCFuBE_fsqnTs-veXpfV7WC3LifP3AO7key4q-84NWEKAF6FWPwUUiIDWSm4y0xs56nsabC28--rABoUGpZlRAdjI428VOMoAf2YEELQH0JOdF2ZP1NqIMC4ZARk04aEmBe6mnr8K53yimn_KgevLlPiZ3631vg3of4DzAGfdMz_ZSL6idfaIBznTUshNmcWQuWTTMvnPJTdSjNUZxfFfkTOKJVYDFOZiIuG1-83MkhTKQIm91DNaEsbqwPzklbosZtLzekdNfTP93zW8AAAD__17QZxI)
## Nvidia Valued at $2 Trillion
Artificial intelligence pioneer Nvidia eclipsed[ $2 trillion in market value](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL_q2zAURp9G3mTkK_lPBg9Ng6BD2rGjubGu41tkKUiKjfv0JZ1_2wcfHA7n9326I3sOz5-40ViWOOFceKcJJBgJZjKVGxciIF3R2PRq6IfWtE21jtBd-sdjAeUQoEc9aEU0tw8DcIEOhopHUGAUgGlU2-mhHuZhQeU6dI563aAwihyXmOo_kUNZafFn3CnVc9wqP66lvLLQ3wRYAfY4jnrL4fMJsBTkOwuwWwx0CrCxrJQE2LCzY5QrlyxBlsTecwxyR__G8lmYJbJcEoW_p3wmfmV5oPcyl0RUBFhM8npt-N7Pp9D21_cfN6FvGPKWQ6AjN02VRvc6PuDc9cKo54bs_yuXLwP-CwAA__-Hx3Lp) Friday after the Silicon Valley firm posted better-than-expected earnings in the fourth quarter. It took Nvidia only eight months to jump from $1 trillion to $2 trillion in market value, the fastest ever by a U.S. company. Nvidia's [4Q earnings ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL_OozAQxJ_GdIvMYv40FElBl2uvRIu9kL2AjWwnKG9_4qu_aqQZzWj0-_uYHiSb-PUP7TzkJUxks3x4QkADaCZTuGFhRq4LHqpO913fmKYqngMStuRsU89m7mZtGsu2Wiruse-41bqQATUajWgq3bR1X_a2X0i7lpzjrq5IGc1OcojlvyA-P3nZvuHDsbRhL7bhmfORVH1TOCocz_Ms9-SvTOHIHt5J4bgHz1-FYw5HysG-Ls9_xAnBHOUahPSOB6XECRBylG2T4EE87BRfnMHSAe4dxa8gPkdy9IVLxK8KR4pwv1fyMLe6iIM7zquf2k4Zve4k28_V_Cu4_wEAAP__AXVxxQ)of more than $22 billion, about $2 billion more than expectations, were fueled by worldwide demand for its graphics processors and servers that power AI software. The positive quarter initiated a one-day market value increase of $277 billion, a Wall Street one-day gain record. Nvidia is poised to continue its record run on Wall Street. CEO Jensen Huang said generative AI products have hit the tipping point and "[demand is surging worldwide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFy4yAQgOGnQR0aWJCEC4pr1PnaKzVrWKw9S8IDxErePuPU6b_in__fdbkib3zc_-JOvqW8YGj8ogUkWAl2sV30iQjIdOT1pNzkBjvobvWgo0MiNRkabjDaNF2MGoMDo5PSZDr2oMAqAKvVMBrXu-ASqjhijDQZjcIqitxy6f9nPtpKafvKLyp9yHu3-bW1ZxXmj4BZwHyeZ5_y5-2j8kG1vo2AecfyoFYFzMeLI6MMlOVFjvLG28b5kIXDSkUiy7Dyc8cHlSpry-Eha8ZSu-Lj83zjOk7CqvuOvP0EtF93fAcAAP__A1pjBw)."
## Weekend Viewing Options
If you are like The Editor, weekends without football can be a bit trying. It's a good thing there are plenty of streaming options while we wait for the next season to kickoff. A live-action version of the hit animation show "Avatar: The Last Airbender" debuted on [Netflix ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyrCAUxvGnwQ4HDqBsQXEbu71tSoeVo5Cg7OjJkn37jDtJl_abX_Gf7-06Xn3KaVv--xUdzWX0E6UHjsBBc9CjboKbEQFVg072wvbWaCOb6ALIzpgbGOsVhEnbcAMrFRo1XbQKXZMcCNACQEthOmVbO9nZi9D5ELBX0jMtMCQqe_te0kYR5_wsD9zbqaxNdpHofjD1j8HAYKi1tjV6OnjZ-IY05_R1QgbDVNa0LfwoZTvhC_1sVH4tp5gOXhE_-Iy3_dPvTy4vFE8ChiI_YxkMze7Cvaac09H1TItl9Sm_iujPf74DAAD__6EDZ5s)this week. Other big additions were multiple oscar-winning movie "Everything Everywhere All at Once" and a new season of "Formula 1: Drive to Survive." [Apple TV+'s](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskTFvnTAQgH-N2UD2-cBmYEgVUXVIqzaKOiJjn8GNDQSc95L--oqnVF063vd9uuHu58PwYEIMy_TVJOqyXwdjc7jQACVgCThg4TpPBCQL6oTiWukaa1HM3dga6bwj1cpRjMKTtXU7OiT0Y-s1L0IHHJADoOB1I3WlrfaGu8Y4R0oKw5CTC3ndq19rWPJMPr6vF9oru6YidnPO28HkHYOeQZ8vldm2SKdk0L8eDPpjXq8M-mSOTPtRrr7MM5Um7GeQbGWTrdT4ZpfAL9cpxvY5BfuipH6uX4DJPuW8yC04Ju8_hWViUAO_cweD5jRmosW-36yp6QNay-T90-PHdIRMt0CgBKn_0tfRnPDb0yNw0QrBYYBSqaaWIHTTaImitP_i5-u5ARAQW0TV1shRD0PyPz6__f7yfSj2zm3XEGM4GsWQT8mEeDtS_u_L_gQAAP__wKGS0Q) "Masters of the Air," a brilliant WWII drama by the makers of "Band of Brothers," has aired six of its planned nine episodes. There is plenty of time to catch up before the finale. Finally, a few suggestions from the Flyover staff: "[Reacher](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fq7DAQQNGvkTqb8UiytYWK9woVCZsiCQTSmFlpvFaQrcUWa5KvD0md-sKF83Yez5RyWq9PtLCrUxkp1HTnERvUDepRy-gmZmQl2XUD2MEabTo5u3gxREErOPWsJjMEhosBIOjjSRljZXIIqAFRd2B6ZVsb7EQQe4qRB9WR0MAx1bK1HyWtdeYpf5Y7b20oi8xurvW2C_VPoBfoj-NoaaGvsv5kgf6ZKcy8NS9Me1mbTqCPN4H-P5zOj--vD17LzcXbkXJOez8IDdeFUv6d1z-p3wEAAP__f1hTtQ)" on Amazon Prime, "[All Creatures Great and Small](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPtCAUAH8Ndhh8orAFxdfQ7ddeaZ7wUC4oBrg19-8ve_V1M9Uk8_FcnhhTPLf_eJBpIS_oWnzRAhwkB7nIzptABDR2ZAYltNKTnIZuN3IkXIPU6gGwhilI0oN7rMo5nEMA7KIBAVIAyEFM86h77XRA4Wf0ntQ4IJOCfGy59J85nm2nkL7zi0rv8tEls7d2VTb-Y2AZ2Pu--2utfS7b27Z1Z2APrI3KFckRA1v3fFcGFlPirhC2r0KVb2_ieHpeD0yJge2K8dcdU4p1VkyK7cCYfqPtzwU_AQAA__8Wql7b)" on PBS, and "[Kim's Convenience](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vgzAQQH-NvQXZx_mDwUMXtnTtiAw-wlUmjsgpqP--SudOb3jSk97Xdbpmrny_feadkqxtyovwiya4AF4AJ9QlrURAvaZkg4khOnRWb2mYfQ7ehjysYSAbfU8wYwEy5IJbSHMCA2gA0Brn-9jFJa7ZFJ9LodDbrNBQYWlH9934Lhut9ae96OiWtuuaNpHHU_UfCkYF43meHe9lfksFo7BUelPcYMF4VDDqI5XHybXy0weF5rZnrn8x-XftNwAA__9NJU4l)" on Netflix.

clean_body: More than 600 new sanctions were levied on Russia by the U.S., U.K., and the E.U. in response to the death of opposition leader Alexey Navalny. | | | | | | Saturday, February 24, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this day in 1868, the House of Representatives passed a resolution to impeach President Andrew Johnson for "high crimes and misdemeanors." He was the first US President to be impeached. () What are you up to this weekend? The Editor will be spending some time outside enjoying "Fake Spring," that time of year when temperatures rise and winter seems to be disappearing... just before another round of snow. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . This weekend's edition is brought to you by our friends at . Check them out below! | Russia Hit With New Sanctions were levied on Russia by the U.S., U.K., and the E.U. in response to the death of opposition leader Alexey Navalny. It's the largest batch of sanctions since the Russian invasion of Ukraine two years ago. financial institutions and manufacturing industries, and they imposed travel restrictions on select Russian officials. President Biden hinted at a new wave of sanctions earlier this week after reports of Navalny's death began to appear. Biden told reporters he had "no doubt" Putin was behind the death of Navalny. The administration indicated further sanctions were a possibility and told journalists to Nvidia Valued at $2 Trillion Artificial intelligence pioneer Nvidia eclipsed Friday after the Silicon Valley firm posted better-than-expected earnings in the fourth quarter. It took Nvidia only eight months to jump from $1 trillion to $2 trillion in market value, the fastest ever by a U.S. company. Nvidia's more than $22 billion, about $2 billion more than expectations, were fueled by worldwide demand for its graphics processors and servers that power AI software. The positive quarter initiated a one-day market value increase of $277 billion, a Wall Street one-day gain record. Nvidia is poised to continue its record run on Wall Street. CEO Jensen Huang said generative AI products have hit the tipping point and "." Weekend Viewing Options If you are like The Editor, weekends without football can be a bit trying. It's a good thing there are plenty of streaming options while we wait for the next season to kickoff. A live-action version of the hit animation show "Avatar: The Last Airbender" debuted on week. Other big additions were multiple oscar-winning movie "Everything Everywhere All at Once" and a new season of "Formula 1: Drive to Survive." "Masters of the Air," a brilliant WWII drama by the makers of "Band of Brothers," has aired six of its planned nine episodes. There is plenty of time to catch up before the finale. Finally, a few suggestions from the Flyover staff: "" on Amazon Prime, "" on PBS, and "" on Netflix. Voters registered concerns over the administration's handling of the wars in the Ukraine and Gaza, immigration, and the economy. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40a04b947ed3462b89465f1617ebe977&_e=POvtQVQIyuXfd2bn5UOAy7EcOmUq4uxdLNg4zIgO0UkAXdyVhSEXISjd06H5oCbcQB4G4pOK7nKhvkzUhr1V0tgoXI4hU8II-9fsPkq1ws0MRcuEPYWb3prtWvRkHkfGpNLg2imW34Hk5KLlfQROq_Pu4RCyMYEaGOVMxJNsZxhaO9hGOe38V6UANZ9yMi7CTITZrQ60jZZwgcpjR8cap9iN2v9MtRXpv-T2kGjw4H4icr2DLm-Lcq4BzDAbeqWJgDghGeALg-fvzgAs40VfqGuZo7bZt_SVD7IWrG4keCwnJ8tnnTbvZqdsL8rFymYk9ARaEIJ-k-dD5BeW4JUtcLJZx_sY3FqyVpow9wm6kBu4hqfsejeK5-J3vz0i1ndlXzW3y9O4yzInUr5_vnnAoB2eeSnU9oYEqgO8mQiAuYc%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40a04b947ed3462b89465f1617ebe977&_e=POvtQVQIyuXfd2bn5UOAy7EcOmUq4uxdLNg4zIgO0UkAXdyVhSEXISjd06H5oCbcQB4G4pOK7nKhvkzUhr1V0tgoXI4hU8II-9fsPkq1ws0MRcuEPYWb3prtWvRkHkfGpNLg2imW34Hk5KLlfQROq_Pu4RCyMYEaGOVMxJNsZxhaO9hGOe38V6UANZ9yMi7CTITZrQ60jZZwgcpjR8cap9iN2v9MtRXpv-T2kGjw4H4icr2DLm-Lcq4BzDAbeqWJgDghGeALg-fvzgAs40VfqCs66fA6TQjEqPkhNNHqskkVOwde9J3dPsTc_FfX4vIsoeH-3bmzcemo6bRFV616Fj-ywMfQQJDeVEpGAUFel5Bc_9uUocMZESb2o0lVPSEukDmJp5bIAUU0sAUM_zcPG1Xl7pykYk45ypf--v-Gsb4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40a04b947ed3462b89465f1617ebe977&_e=POvtQVQIyuXfd2bn5UOAy7EcOmUq4uxdLNg4zIgO0UkAXdyVhSEXISjd06H5oCbcQB4G4pOK7nKhvkzUhr1V0tgoXI4hU8II-9fsPkq1ws0MRcuEPYWb3prtWvRkHkfGpNLg2imW34Hk5KLlfQROq_Pu4RCyMYEaGOVMxJNsZxhaO9hGOe38V6UANZ9yMi7CTITZrQ60jZZwgcpjR8cap9iN2v9MtRXpv-T2kGjw4H4icr2DLm-Lcq4BzDAbeqWJgDghGeALg-fvzgAs40VfqMJ-_dDrLC-mXyQ9Nvk2wsLt71z2VIx9S_ZtUqdSKQ_YF3CSPnePduYagDOoGyHIIW_zcm5Ctzsld1vwy4lepJNmHPjxaMN82a7ejiCyjPGDryWHEPEy6OgBpqxvarngD0zQ34apBXau2L6vI9V8FNY%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=40a04b947ed3462b89465f1617ebe977&_e=POvtQVQIyuXfd2bn5UOAy7EcOmUq4uxdLNg4zIgO0UkAXdyVhSEXISjd06H5oCbcQB4G4pOK7nKhvkzUhr1V0tgoXI4hU8II-9fsPkq1ws0MRcuEPYWb3prtWvRkHkfGpNLg2imW34Hk5KLlfQROq_Pu4RCyMYEaGOVMxJNsZxhaO9hGOe38V6UANZ9yMi7CTITZrQ60jZZwgcpjR8cap9iN2v9MtRXpv-T2kGjw4H4icr2DLm-Lcq4BzDAbeqWJgDghGeALg-fvzgAs40VfqKrIsfTKriuLdIGVvnG4f8-E439Ng8_Avep3O44SAGnk9K-RVTd6kXa9JCskHvAO5gxTbwDJKxMAhEBAq9lEo-KYveRvbJy6_X3kQCw1NI7UFcXRyjv8gAfY0QmAzEsZNuKritMbhH1v6JdeDaIe0EQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Mark Twain is now available on DVD
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Defending the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAjs9zxP1DMSi1VLGejBn_UafXMd1ZysNifIIUtj4SEhOPHqW-SgbdEo1pcJ5LlXcRg1Vx-75qgVPQ1h-Gu_kiy4ho__XFQx4XwSy4iW_wPmYt1BwhmDaKqrq3TCyFhGj3REUt5ZZCjTogXqXAtFtHuP)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAiRylZ6BtFEh-t6ilURjevBpFW_RSSvjrsQoAAEwSfs1YNgdd-IQ0EmPGgLxofwjo4zC56Uw399XqHBB0EcXyv85vfA6ZQ68QZXjRPhoiJmyJrqW3a1aD95DghvffxxoCNWGFDrG5z91xtNKi8ws2b2) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAjuo9agHuzI-N-aM8Aek6IACwcwsca_hr15RU6TGYNgwqqvXcBHfc0Ga1SR90QXPXg2S-pZXF-n1f2T32JAZ5rgK2xHG9sySh3XAtcuXQYerF6lraZe0WANp4Csx82rh9O723rhIcds144fVwbn3C7j).
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAiv0HxamBtU65S-eoxG_PkjV39ypwa0LvUkdxrNagpuQ-ERhg3-0mPtgQOvqN2SQTqmvFHJe6m9i8j3zlH6TPhP4VKRzw8D8PgSYbYWm1G9gUoKdTYfx5oebV2HX9N75IrNFzp9E2qSMf-M24__lQNf)

| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAiSqLBQHwuAS2xdRpkLg1gxPplw_APCShJd4SRH-byyW2SUjjSL7KE-qF6rOcZa8-mGEDzhAWa4RvhZkTltX7BBU9t83WXBNR-IrQSq9SDpLV2CQjZvBkBB58kxYIOrxzpfBWIYrFDvjITEA_6OJPO0) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bdcfc74875ba48aaaf182cfe64d32414&_e=9BPIaJpO4VqXJoYmGf4yUpwj8NUpxcIwniS1mpl9bUe9sV9RKuzpJK-XD_nmdxiSF5VKXAzALnjWDGzn7kM9LI8eKYT2LnoH4nnYNwyUafIS0taUTUKXherwSjyiIk34SyLwFQOG2EDnefnRXzUCxETtm0Ob9KT56jDqiczt_F1PxXh4mao7kovUW6YQ78u2p2AijpxzTFvS4ABEHu0RqvJWaY3yuXgmMS2vVsIqFmwqVD4pcapwtCZm73qREKR0_z07T1LsZPS0GDY7BeV-r5SRbvr6CtJG2nhbQBY-zAir4NUmaluTltaxBbBAyBiduLgJcbvNBih6UBk2-p22ji1xYqwW8GhOZjxv1500fnvvkKjhF1N_c24XW_YLtUBXlxc7uiWhpb5xohZ0ZdSq4woNzgi9xyuL7oHS1zWxx3JPJ2iNg1hjVqxyu4Ni4y3j)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ac2889d2b2042a6857d48694db1e346&_e=5zqntME2sVxtLmxYZg0xw--kHjfvbuCW6R0JI1gW0h8jyDsBclQ_W7Zrvw_QAwBPrQ6JJ4kEu7mZsCVDKC75AQ1zkabTktI0nvmSNc0NtLNUQ_pcmBrHLG34p_PkXYASEC0LtKc82VmbxwpidV42b-15Ru4_va9UkfnAs0R_V8NF9JskGImcZ3gR53Cay2YkmStPkBr6M2hKsrhiZNvffOvj_fTc7QB3LHN_2JLVjY3unrlpU3VOGp6O8PFMFLIMW_4_GSaXxGo96Sb1ol6wN9oyqOKX1wqU3KQC0fayULx6o2XBbVfxwGTWNU9AkKsvwwbioS8KpMrETfr98nI4CemmKEi7WPrUxwsn6dxnjqGFpC-ohWfyXgXMKU8XgeqUJR1o0aorGLi1rlSQDqwKGsKmYzcoivxL82RX288hI8Y%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ac2889d2b2042a6857d48694db1e346&_e=5zqntME2sVxtLmxYZg0xw--kHjfvbuCW6R0JI1gW0h8jyDsBclQ_W7Zrvw_QAwBPrQ6JJ4kEu7mZsCVDKC75AQ1zkabTktI0nvmSNc0NtLNUQ_pcmBrHLG34p_PkXYASEC0LtKc82VmbxwpidV42b-15Ru4_va9UkfnAs0R_V8NF9JskGImcZ3gR53Cay2YkmStPkBr6M2hKsrhiZNvffOvj_fTc7QB3LHN_2JLVjY3unrlpU3VOGp6O8PFMFLIMW_4_GSaXxGo96Sb1ol6wN2itJrE-VNXisdpPFqQuigSLhBtpN8GVb90ri-W_NLm1-rynl7XlK4FXZru3oQDaQbWwhhq6E10NQQwENqYILu6kc2fjEYg0ulbhXRKAZj0r61JBc0xJ8eMx2oBXQvrLRBtjsH07crMePau5-6WOz6o%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ac2889d2b2042a6857d48694db1e346&_e=5zqntME2sVxtLmxYZg0xw--kHjfvbuCW6R0JI1gW0h8jyDsBclQ_W7Zrvw_QAwBPrQ6JJ4kEu7mZsCVDKC75AQ1zkabTktI0nvmSNc0NtLNUQ_pcmBrHLG34p_PkXYASEC0LtKc82VmbxwpidV42b-15Ru4_va9UkfnAs0R_V8NF9JskGImcZ3gR53Cay2YkmStPkBr6M2hKsrhiZNvffOvj_fTc7QB3LHN_2JLVjY3unrlpU3VOGp6O8PFMFLIMW_4_GSaXxGo96Sb1ol6wN-8Oye-fGdnqiBi8dTqiyLjwb8WLNpRhB1Ti_flJf2ijtdidu3x5Hijh9xsOaLt3fzDu_zpTj89rIm0KGKuMrrQL2YPGZuqLuJvs6H56LOuKlUzKjXRud_Me-QuCmVeSn5WJT-GuwQNNbQXm6PfXAi8%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ac2889d2b2042a6857d48694db1e346&_e=5zqntME2sVxtLmxYZg0xw--kHjfvbuCW6R0JI1gW0h8jyDsBclQ_W7Zrvw_QAwBPrQ6JJ4kEu7mZsCVDKC75AQ1zkabTktI0nvmSNc0NtLNUQ_pcmBrHLG34p_PkXYASEC0LtKc82VmbxwpidV42b-15Ru4_va9UkfnAs0R_V8NF9JskGImcZ3gR53Cay2YkmStPkBr6M2hKsrhiZNvffOvj_fTc7QB3LHN_2JLVjY3unrlpU3VOGp6O8PFMFLIMW_4_GSaXxGo96Sb1ol6wN8IVN7hRkFL2RVI7ambGN9FhGI2nxCkgfr_LyWmP--0zVWOFXM-IeLLxbhRuzmxcL_yi1_9E41DJExyrNU05XQIsESIDg-1BWlavzdH9Q5AdYXrYpK6TX7l5tiJE0a16GVD67eGs2Ju6Gl8dSYUi4TQ%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---

subject: What do you know about C.S. Lewis?

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Invest in Pastors
body:
spiritual battle is raging in our culture

| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s)
---
Friend, A spiritual battle is raging in our culture – its “invisible”, but you and I can see it cause moral chaos all around us. TPUSA Faith is on the frontlines trying to make a difference in this spiritual battle. **Jeremiah 29:7 says, “But seek the welfare of the city where I have sent you ... for in its welfare you will find your welfare.”** This verse embodies our mission at TPUSA Faith, and we believe it's a _call for Christians to actively engage with America_. I founded TPUSA Faith – a branch of TPUSA – to EMPOWER believers to live out their faith boldly... CHALLENGE the secular culture... and UPHOLD the inerrancy of scripture. One way we do this is through our **Pastor Summits** , where we gather pastors from across all FIFTY states to inspire, encourage, and equip them to stand firmly for biblical truth and the Kingdom. We are excited to co-host the **Strong Church Dream Conference 2024** at the end of this month. This conference aims to bring pastors and ministry leaders from all FIFTY states to engage in nation-shaping conversations. But we need your help to make this happen. **[Your gift today of $25, $50, or any amount, will help provide scholarships to pastors and ministry leaders, making their trip to the conference affordable, if not completely FREE.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s) **
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s)
---
Your support also enables us to host nation-shaping events like the **Strong Church Dream Conference** and other events such as **Freedom Night in America** and our **grassroots Pastor Roundtable discussions**. These initiatives are critical in our mission to engage, equip, and empower the American Church with the essential tools to COUNTER falsehoods and DEFEND the _link between Faith and God-given Liberty_. Your donation will help us uphold the **three non-negotiables** every church must stand for: the Church can never be labeled nonessential again, life begins at conception, and God created male and female – we don't choose. **[**Your gift of $25, $50, or any amount, will empower pastors to stand up against secular culture and spotlight those who have stood up for what is right.**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s)**
---
[ Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s)
---
We are determined to inspire faith, help bring about a REVIVAL in America, and continue to **fight for the welfare of our nation**. Your support is instrumental in achieving these goals. **We are at the forefront of a spiritual battle and your support is critical**. Your generosity will help us continue to equip and empower pastors, reach the next generation, and stand for righteousness in our nation. I want to thank you in advance for considering this request. Your commitment to furthering the Kingdom of God is truly inspiring. Together, we can inspire FAITH, ignite REVIVAL, and change the course of America.
---
[Provide a Scholarship for a Pastor](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkMFuhCAURb8Gdxp4PEUWLpo2bpppuuuSwOM5Q8ZRA5j-fjPzBd3f3Jxzfi7u4tOatuuXf_B0p-xycZ5dPRaf6q09fKl7diABWwktoFNNnKKlwQ8NT8rI0ZgRtWpuE-igGMgOSDoyoxpRRj8QEcQgiZo0PX8kACqFvR472y8ygMJlJAhhsAKlXznX7s580L5dM5eS-TjDmshvHe2PZp1utR5F6DcBs4C5MJ2ZO79x3OtzIWCux1m8exkImKPBgH1UrcR-bDEoam3Uql2sZWOMVMFGoeeyn5nY0R5Z6I_P928cRiWbPMXjN61rKoMRKK8Pn9YXSP1frr8AAAD___8Bb2s)
---
God bless you,Charlie KirkTPUSA Faith
---

name: Scalise, Steve
subject: FINAL CHANCE: Add your name to mandate voter ID laws in ALL 50 states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Goal: 1,000,000 Signatures

| |

---
| | | Friend -

Last time the Democrats were in power, they fast-tracked an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use _your_ tax dollars to fund _their_ campaigns, make it harder for Republicans to win competitive races, and gut voter ID laws.

And if the Democrats win the next election, we know they will try it again.

We're racing against the clock to protect the integrity of the most important election of our lifetimes. We need your help to secure our elections once and for all. _**[Here's my plan: I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HL3s2z9JVhN4vGClwmsfvw~~/AARclAA~_X2WUp0mb9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Here’s my plan: I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_

**Goal:** 1,000,000 Signatures
**Progress:** 23.4%
**Your Signature:** MISSING
| | [SIGN ON >>](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HL3s2z9JVhN4vGClwmsfvw~~/AARclAA~_X2WUp0mb9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "SIGN ON >>")
---

I'm rushing to ask you to take the FIRST STEP to secure our elections. _**[Can I please count on seeing your name?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/HL3s2z9JVhN4vGClwmsfvw~~/AARclAA~_X2WUp0mb9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Can I please count on seeing your name?")**_

- Steve Scalise | House Majority Leader

As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/BcAZt4r_aAxRi16BPlnfZg~~/AARclAA~_X2WUp0mb9UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c81de56159bc4004bc7d494acb9a32c9&_e=jwKKYs6CM2YvPyxsBgsUKAEoKaA8i4oPr3Hqu3GcKn2QWutip2-h5Fphzgfe41sODeh5PoPiqe4UcJcA6ufPU3-E57_na6UF8JYgK-0LCrGDIrZoqu5bOfkvi0b1ASP5asl_SwclXcxsXulw9RmFJ0EM-aUJcomY2LlfV-yIQIXwRtrC3wjFfyl7zpfyB3VXfoflMfwzgHtBgpKicSj4mT3-4Y2Pot0IQCcWIq2nQ-YojA28rWnhIcnYGcOwlSvgFKbrVwzXRZpmHlm8O_wIFIzU0Vqrk_JEydp4Tpojsp6bqVMCfguWHK-Arpo1Q_YKy4VOsXj55xvLDoMnh5ryMbevVVFA9qSA6NHswo6wFM-Ir-AuNLcMYYIwRXczZG5eu7wUeNjY27Lv5udE1unzC6TW9Rj0uw_Qlcl0jdPV18g%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c81de56159bc4004bc7d494acb9a32c9&_e=jwKKYs6CM2YvPyxsBgsUKAEoKaA8i4oPr3Hqu3GcKn2QWutip2-h5Fphzgfe41sODeh5PoPiqe4UcJcA6ufPU3-E57_na6UF8JYgK-0LCrGDIrZoqu5bOfkvi0b1ASP5asl_SwclXcxsXulw9RmFJ0EM-aUJcomY2LlfV-yIQIXwRtrC3wjFfyl7zpfyB3VXfoflMfwzgHtBgpKicSj4mT3-4Y2Pot0IQCcWIq2nQ-YojA28rWnhIcnYGcOwlSvgFKbrVwzXRZpmHlm8O_wIFGbTUe_M49WkL0gMVwgq9202PHkEtO25Tg9R5WZkfOCLgmnbhppF6ruG5FXSIRYyIvclHZPXg6tc28N0cUbNqOBYWn1fy3aLbi0fQU3TVcZHOJWlfxO-jyLJtN9sbKjhKq28-M8_Q0zrPIKB8yK0II4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c81de56159bc4004bc7d494acb9a32c9&_e=jwKKYs6CM2YvPyxsBgsUKAEoKaA8i4oPr3Hqu3GcKn2QWutip2-h5Fphzgfe41sODeh5PoPiqe4UcJcA6ufPU3-E57_na6UF8JYgK-0LCrGDIrZoqu5bOfkvi0b1ASP5asl_SwclXcxsXulw9RmFJ0EM-aUJcomY2LlfV-yIQIXwRtrC3wjFfyl7zpfyB3VXfoflMfwzgHtBgpKicSj4mT3-4Y2Pot0IQCcWIq2nQ-YojA28rWnhIcnYGcOwlSvgFKbrVwzXRZpmHlm8O_wIFNKxbGcanPn8kP3roUYsRi-myrRMyhoK4N-u5_NNTSD0CSdPXusHX7G8rumfoJJcRAhYU8zLTvEL34Gc6KqhywYYqRlpwaiFAs0q5fYJ5eI9PTMwfYPaM1eAlvJlH83J3A-lkWiQgoCxtCYvdBUGwAU%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c81de56159bc4004bc7d494acb9a32c9&_e=jwKKYs6CM2YvPyxsBgsUKAEoKaA8i4oPr3Hqu3GcKn2QWutip2-h5Fphzgfe41sODeh5PoPiqe4UcJcA6ufPU3-E57_na6UF8JYgK-0LCrGDIrZoqu5bOfkvi0b1ASP5asl_SwclXcxsXulw9RmFJ0EM-aUJcomY2LlfV-yIQIXwRtrC3wjFfyl7zpfyB3VXfoflMfwzgHtBgpKicSj4mT3-4Y2Pot0IQCcWIq2nQ-YojA28rWnhIcnYGcOwlSvgFKbrVwzXRZpmHlm8O_wIFH82w5LCAq3kEXykTwXp9lmGNFBwG4qI4gQouweWIoJv5ToNkgRA6Hw5_8R-3csP5ZamxUMZrEl-4aNuG3YofW0HBuMDegxJh_9n33oH3KfQve7N7R3wJ1TO2tZqYz_5qruWUwKfpIfZBBS4gWGuIAY%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: National Gun Owner
subject: We paid for this already
body:
Grab your Complimentary Shoulder Holster now, before it’s too late.
---
| We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/db0b4a7a70ed53b789fa7253e47f1e748218df3f/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7) here at any time. February 24th, 2024 \- Breaking News - Firearms Reviews - 2nd Amendment - Ammo & More -. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | \- We’re happy to tell you **we’ve paid the Full Price** of American Tactical Supply’s new “invisible” Shoulder Holster for you.

So you can own one of the 382 available Shoulder Holsters for FREE!

[Just click here to claim your complimentary Shoulder Holster today.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7)

We’re doing this as a **“No More Gun Control”** awareness campaign -- and to give a __big ol’ middle finger__ to Biden’s surge of insane new gun laws.

This is our #1 favorite holster.

It fits nearly all handguns...

It’s unbelievably comfortable...

And it’s so good at concealing guns... it can make a large frame pistol **disappear in plain sight.**

Plus, the fact you can get it for $0.00 today is a huge selling point. ;)

The only problem is that there are a limited number available to give away.

Once they’re gone, you can still get one... **but you’ll have to pay full price**.

Right now, there are enough Free Shoulder Holsters [for the next 382 people who request on here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/3687/6374453/cf3761b42904f2a612bc80cf68901a68028510a4/161031f38b1608aa73340db4977e61792b60cba7).

After that, we can’t make any promises.

**So HURRY and grab your Free Shoulder Holster now** , before it’s too late.

**Thank You.**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Mark Twain is now available on DVD
body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzsuQ-p-BE2X2DHE7TLbcCp96sq7PXA7ZrIMCT0-WCurqxeFSAjdDJo-MUzgxkY5Gohr2tZg8yHZeAb4ZAFOXWrtEQLozebKMJGe6FIh-bsD0_ctsa42sRVc4oY9w50ltishMVwRUa5_m5OglAijpV48f)

| | Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzsuycqsrMy4ZZeGSZNdayPHPJTdYwQU5Q4ypg3p_q0H0YmFp5TVvmlMBMWa4PGcfnfs6gaAlAcyWuZhypcAp9fe73XOFzVIrNFJncjJAWfAPFOFfDzSyIA4TRqzdVcBGfypALbaIEAf4zEv8_nE5WAiO) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzsv9eZsirqmqdqOXgWvTJCgwUnN_22k0LN2MGtGeftOic2o28QIDjIb5yjhFPrNkcsLB1RcHXmF1Crs2hp_ZofsDhJrrejn5LEXt--bS6085vj1-OlrvkZ0JRPzCnMtNLKPJG24CMq6ISFyjZ8vd5UDr).
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzss7eWNn6wZbCDZrQBfauSn3ZTNNpvAZDY-P4AvOKm06mk3ZR27DbVBZK7H0CXn-KP1kCENlOakIO--nZVr1S77Dyrb6z_qpVcCR5PBvaywZZVgywfMco-h2AK2YubSF-rELS7pa7Tq3GVjEf-urNC3l)

You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzsvmznRQzA9JzkXQOg0GZw-Ich9OQr339xaRR8w9s1CdVq7R5NhRt_SZaU37rjYIw27_KMqBF-putdO_vgSq4VHl6sVDPwYL021dpCROsWSUTj0zAnYcZj9mGzN_B_wlps_BxQuiV7ynTPPYI4SJoEQS) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fd0c1ed9cfe475dafaa7e82c9f5bec8&_e=FcA4RCaajs9QBBBVvNtRYoteogoBnOcw9p6SSk10lNDTBDTGykWAtVOO0wDt43gPfCaDHF1yk_vq8D0nDZ9o_GJA0JoT9JDJWH-BlwQefckkbX1v9ZtfMuqlzcTVRd31oBkZ6nqa4YJYtHA4hObOHjInsMAH3D_J8G7cVpPZOhgd87C--RzI05cFhC3siet4TNKBz_eqo72Up0tBvtOOZXkG5oN0pEYLJ9XFJScL1d772GjvAC2RzTjUQAcuom0uz9g0BM-CPWKkJYy0HEUG_Oi347y5pCB02KzrLEHrzsux02FVtDXy2GuygyQM2V4pgAAqdqQaWGN6AXuoLb9MILYSpufX4gOKAHTLhPzDzDt1-m4_N-bDAcWLSBCGysgbL0eMItycy2YZsEzQotAlllRq5UIGQxuy_uNExwvTr_L_sJCUQGnelHISQE5Bb5XA)

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ded3b30082fd4696aee97a3a27b4bbf8&_e=zbRWa0ch9132ZZnkHo-h9RFilll4VpbDOIEgKtDS1yGO3P8qK2D9XSt1oT3CIq-bjheoEJcA8CIAYpDAkI9n5RnpmheIiiB8CTZcjkEOaVU7TXFDp7KXKbDAOgCrBr--fwRIG6VxMgWVX68-Pi46vPj8C32mDKi3wwP64T2lm8c3tqt8WzO1mnyoY6owTFTu7YTUKRQ_Ssr1o5tx5KnZgTa_Y6cs0A2bdaum9dB80szpfoI2a4uJce5uK9uu8WfwIwh_4sZNdW00974h-IDywNmjwlDWlrAD-1djpRLcZoLnlyQUOumbr8o1e67JTCmGZmnIAf0qK1EOhUbN8ufwwEh30rhr9btys_dDRRkBFZPRXL5dyiblgnDxE06rDGEcRxBnKMm-jz6gjAFKIysZWA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ded3b30082fd4696aee97a3a27b4bbf8&_e=zbRWa0ch9132ZZnkHo-h9RFilll4VpbDOIEgKtDS1yGO3P8qK2D9XSt1oT3CIq-bjheoEJcA8CIAYpDAkI9n5RnpmheIiiB8CTZcjkEOaVU7TXFDp7KXKbDAOgCrBr--fwRIG6VxMgWVX68-Pi46vPj8C32mDKi3wwP64T2lm8c3tqt8WzO1mnyoY6owTFTu7YTUKRQ_Ssr1o5tx5KnZgTa_Y6cs0A2bdaum9dB80szpfoI2a4uJce5uK9uu8WfwEg2aDg82_OjQLvMrSj-6b1ZzRQTNijLgA7xycTjjDw-i7IuInl9XhrtstgwoXIIXXtzFy2gjcizL7g1DvQlYNmuBKTY6Y8MTfzb4ZbgZ90mEYvgrXI_24DtZfYZtASX9arrPgNBcwHHB5yZyZs1Crw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsfUMy3i2N

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osfUMy3i2N

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62847688:sfUMy3i2N:m:3:2532013465:8E04AF41718971028C6DCADA3E161D12:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

body:

| Dear Friend,

**What a week! This has been the most exciting few days for education freedom in Mississippi for years.**

A blizzard of bills have appeared in the Mississippi legislature that could transform education for the better.

* **The Mississippi Student Freedom bill (HB 1449)** would establish in Mississippi a system of school choice similar to what Sarah Huckabee Sanders established over in Arkansas. This would be awesome!

**Phased in over time, families would have the right to have their child’s share of state education tax dollars paid into their own Magnolia Scholarship Account.** The family would then be free to allocate that money to meet their child’s needs in both the public, private and homeschool sector.

**__Under this bill, school districts would not be compelled to take kids from out of area if schools in those districts are already full.__**
---
|
---
_Education freedom could soon be a reality._
|
* **Opportunity Scholarships bill (HB 1452)** proposes something similar, but the Opportunity Scholarships would only be available for those in failing school districts. This would be good, if not quite excellent.

* **The INSPIRE bill (HB 1453)** promises a complete overhaul of our antiquated school funding system. **A relic of a by-gone age, the existing education funding system in Mississippi is Soviet in its approach. It allocates money to the system, not to students.** As a result, your tax dollars never seem to make their way where they are needed – the classroom.

**Now along comes Rep Rob Robertson with a superb proposal to allocate funds to each student.** Every kid in Mississippi public schools would get an amount based on various weights. For years, policy makers have talked (and talked and talked) about change. Now there is a plan to make it happen.
---
|
---
_Architect of education reform - Rep. Rob Roberson_
| **What is really significant is not that these bills have been tabled, but that they have all been the work of the House’s new education committee chairman, Rep Rob Roberson.** We should all be in awe of him.

**It is clear, too, that Speaker Jason White is the driving force behind these remarkable reforms.** Kudos to the new Speaker.

---
|
---
_Secretary of State Michael Watson reacts to this week's proposals._
| Of course it is one thing to table a bill, and quite another for it to become law.

Someplace out there will be progressive activists, masquerading as journalists, drafting bogus ‘news’ articles predicting disaster if every child gets a specific funding allocation.

**With a massive conservative majority in Mississippi, it would be odd if what is regarded as mainstream conservative policy throughout the southern states was derailed.**

Every neighboring state – Arkansas, Alabama, Tennessee and Louisiana – is now implementing the kind of reforms presented in our state Capitol this week. Let’s hope that our leaders make it happen!

Have a wonderful, uplifting and optimism-filled, weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a1095e9d7e&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. If you love living in Mississippi as much as I do, why not show it by buying some of our “I love Mississippi” merch?**
---

That’s why I’m asking you to dig deep and kick in just a few bucks to save our House Majority and take back this country of ours." | | | "KICK IN TEN BUCKS" | | | "KICK IN TWENTY BUCKS" | | | "KICK IN ANOTHER AMOUNT" Let me put it plainly: WITH YOUR HELP: We have a direct path to sweeping the next elections. WITHOUT YOUR HELP: We might as well enjoy our House Majority while it lasts... because the Democrats will crush us in no time. "So can we count on you? This is really, REALLY important. " - Senator John Kennedy | "John Kennedy" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Help teach more kids true American history
body:
You’ve probably noticed that children today aren’t getting the same kind of education that you and I received

|
---
| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

You've probably noticed that children today aren't getting the same kind of education that you and I received when we were growing up.

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed.

In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us.

[[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)
__To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families.

And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime--[completely free of charge.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)

**And now we plan to do even more.**

To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations!

But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today.

We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation.

If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, [can I personally ask you to help me accomplish my goal of getting this first-of-its-kind curriculum to anyone who needs it?](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)

If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today:

[**https://secure.americancornerstone.org/little-patriots-tour-donate**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)

Thank you so much for supporting these efforts--[together we can help kids across the U.S. get the education they deserve.](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkT1v3SAUhn8N3rAwYLh38HAV11JVpYq6dEQncOyg8CXA6t-v3KZLt6zn_ZCe8_58Ns_gg0_Hd4i4vNtqajMJDFhPg-89IC3Qq8-9Gc64pIxTLs00uMXdrQI14DJpdtM3zoQc3hY1IQon7iDu8zRrzTkqAWy-wSyF1vvgl6uHcS4nLmepxtf9Pu0zaOdmu6sbEMkgYO3jO2KxOR0VW6tYztfgLaTR5jiE5a330oh4EL4RvjW0Z8URItbLY3NNWFvPCcdcD8K3_1hoz2elLifoSMR29mgsxAL-SESsoVwy4eq6t3xWi0SspeZW0Hafjg8povNnJGLFCD4Qrv56jc3uCjyevl6gX14YEx8Jm1PH1IlYXx7029MP-u8XQ11c-eVD8E1pItlxNf5B7Z9Y5XcAAAD__113mKk)

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

We used to be taught to love our nation, cherish our history, and respect our fellow Americans. But all of that has changed. In today's classroom, children are taught that America is fundamentally racist, that our history is one of oppression, and that we should focus on our differences instead of what unites us. To make matters worse: the right of parents to choose how and where their kids receive their education remains out of reach for most American families. And this is exactly why we created our Little Patriots program--to give parents, grandparents, teachers, and caregivers a free online resource they can use to teach children unbiased civics lessons, history, and American values, anywhere and anytime-- And now we plan to do even more. To meet the growing demand for educational resources that teach children to love their country and its history, we're taking Little Patriots on the road to bring these educational resources to schools, churches, and community organizations! But to help us fund this coast-to-coast effort, I need your help today. We depend on the generous support of patriots like you to help us fund this program and share it with children and families across our great nation. If you believe that American children deserve to receive the best education possible, If you'd like to help me get Little Patriots to more American children, please click the link below to make your generous tax-deductible gift today: Thank you so much for supporting these efforts-- Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: America’s turning point in 2024
body:
The future of the pro-life movement is at a crossroads in America right now.

| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/d23gj-KP47IIVeenJOATTQ~~/AARclAA~~)
---
Friend,

The future of the pro-life movement is at a crossroads in America _right now._ Abortion extremists in our government are making a desperate bid for full control of Washington in 2024, and their goal is clear: enshrine an unlimited right to abortion into federal law.

Their plan? The so-called "Women's Health Protection Act" - more accurately described as the Abortion-On-Demand Until Birth Act. This legislation would invalidate pro-life protections in all 50 states, stripping away the rights of millions of Americans to stand up for the unborn.

But it doesn't stop there. If they control the White House and Congress, they'll stack the Supreme Court with pro-abortion justices, ready to overturn the landmark Dobbs decision and force abortion-on-demand across the nation.

The Democrat Party apparatus is completely unified in this mission, while Republicans are dangerously close to abandoning the pro-life movement. Many are saying the fight is over, leaving the future of life in the hands of pro-abortionists.

**This is the turning point. We cannot grow lax this year within the pro-life movement. The dust may not settle under our feet. Here 's why:**
* Elections are our most powerful tool for cultural transformation. The national debate fueled by politics is how Americans learn about the humanity of the unborn and 73% already oppose abortion after at least 15 weeks!
* Abandoning the fight means surrendering the political and legislative stage, where billions are spent influencing public opinion.
* The abortion lobby will not stop until they have a Supreme Court that imposes its radical agenda on _all_ Americans. They'll use taxpayer dollars to fund abortion, attack freedom of conscience, and force their will on pro-life states.

This is why we must fight in 2024 and this is why we need your support today, friend. Would you give a gift? You can make a difference at the link below:

[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/americas-future](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/d23gj-KP47IIVeenJOATTQ~~/AARclAA~~)

We cannot afford to lose momentum in this decisive hour when so many lives are on the line. And it's why the team here at SBA Pro-Life America is so grateful for the support of people like you!

Therefore, I implore you: stand with us in this urgent crusade to defend the most vulnerable this year. Every contribution, every act of support, everything you read and share that supports life, fuels our mission and fuels the hope for a future where life is cherished and protected.

For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
| Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hmjPV0EOYlZm6hvCOLVcqg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvIG0P0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmXVRuXZZSGrM4lSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zK7akEj1ipn3dTJYrb2kWw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvIG0P0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpl1Ubl2WUhqzOJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: DROP EVERYTHING FOR THIS URGENT MESSAGE
body:
URGENT MESSAGE - DROP EVERYTHING | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/coxforcongress/drop-everything-for-this-urgent-message?e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| |
---
| |
# Drop Everything and Listen to Presidente Bukele As Soon As Possible.

Friend,

I just experienced one of the best speeches and warnings to America ever heard, right in line with the warnings of President Trump and his exposure of the corrupt deep state cabal.

**You need to drop everything you are doing and watch[this message](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=dec06a05ee&e=5bb5efcda7) from President Bukele of El Salvador. **

Bukele said and I paraphrase "We must remove corrupt judges, prosecutors and officials - since when did they receive an election mandate? Corrupt officials must be removed. This is how we did it in El Salvador and then we won re-election in safe and secure elections by 86% - with 95% in our Congress!"

He is telling us that we in America are a frog in a boiling pot but it's not too late if we stand up, jump out of the pot and fight for our freedoms. **_His message is my message_**.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b96791fa97&e=5bb5efcda7)
My RINO opponents like to smirk at America First candidates such as myself \- all while many of these same so-called "conservative" neo-globalist candidates grow quiet and even join in support for the leaders of the pro-globalist cabal that locked down our churches, schools, businesses and homes - and threatened our homes during Thanksgiving with government snitch lines like a bunch of radical communist STASI.

People died from the executive orders preventing care and access to try safe medications. How dare they try for office again!

BE WARNED: even my friend and opponent Neil Parrott now supports the World Economic Forum (WEF)-embracing Hogan who has done nothing but advance their globalist agenda and crush our liberty here in Maryland and these United States - including threatening and intimidating our governors and states, and who put Maryland back into the Paris Climate Treaty illegally.

**But I am here to STAND and DEMAND with you: no more wishy-washy leadership parroting the globalist cabal**. I will clean House! America is fading fast but we can save our Constitution and freedom if we transform and restore our Republic from the top to the bottom _now_.
[](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e5b28bdf1e&e=5bb5efcda7)
Washington is committing this corruption and evil on us and our children, so to Washington we must march and clean House.

Alongside President Trump, I intend to fight the radical Marxists complete with their tax-payer funded NGOs and globalist World Economic Forum (WEF) influencers who I will continue to work to bring down on Day One in order to support you. No other opponent has taken this pledge - and that is why I am honored to be the front running candidate.

Please [help me take this fight to Washington](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e01fa409fa&e=5bb5efcda7) and like President Bukele warns, take immediate action to save our nation from its pending economic, moral and legal collapse.

Don't take my word for it - [watch his speech](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8614651e64&e=5bb5efcda7). I've linked it here and also below. I promise you will be both awakened and inspired to action.

**Then, please help me with your contribution this weekend to ensure we fight and win**. For those generous friends who have just donated thousands to our campaign in the last two days of this push, THANK YOU. _But we are below-goal and need to keep up our momentum with your[$25, $50, $100 or $350 contribution](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=073a29b3b9&e=5bb5efcda7)_. Thank you for helping!

God bless America,

Dan Cox, Candidate for Congress (R-MD6) [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=4e49629928&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| [ ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=ff28d39fce&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
"GLOBALISM IS DEAD [IN El Salvador]...BUT IF YOU WANT GLOBALISM TO DIE HERE TOO, YOU MUST BE WILLING TO FIGHT EVERYTHING AND EVERYONE WHO STANDS FOR IT. YOU MUST FIGHT UNAPOLOGETICALLY. FIGHT FOR YOUR FREEDOMS!" - PRESIDENT NAYIB BUKELE, CPAC 2024
| | | | | | | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9b7d063dde&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1ee4485479&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1f7c9847ed&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=f933af7fc1&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Dan Cox for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you are friends or have shown us or a fellow republican support. Thank you!

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan Cox for CongressP. O. Box 3952Frederick, MD 21705
[Add us to your address book](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f&e=5bb5efcda7&c=06f5100545) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f&t=b&e=5bb5efcda7&c=06f5100545).

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7164ace9b8514bd89b536d7ac5cd0d87&_e=En_f8cCAaI3udS75EBpijsOEyaB9iJnFCbRUPYf5BSTzHzRk97L3REt-mrf2J1RMJwuEPrLCbLhjrwmLpBQL6B0bFv-Propboe3ev2S4SZOf0vRON6POWfBtzcdW-sAnCAtjCY2oTx-wPA-gE729ET66-PJ8_jTath1EtkYh_TSuMwAZutZety0tVNsuSm1aiquBcbN4i3yYM2oWYFdL3WxAMZ8RmsurPGymsK4ov3t_mphFPvZe7uPLmG_05ep21YwvHwWim8sLhoFXAGTdeikbGCzRQR7LTcUFoy1gW69HGRw11vr0gkqrBHsipgRgox2ur-O_2AcEam4wm2aesTHNiDkrzcIdE37mczd0dI8RFq8nre9YABC4KlWDotlmB7zPXYY8YRm2moNZdxyyig%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7164ace9b8514bd89b536d7ac5cd0d87&_e=En_f8cCAaI3udS75EBpijsOEyaB9iJnFCbRUPYf5BSTzHzRk97L3REt-mrf2J1RMJwuEPrLCbLhjrwmLpBQL6B0bFv-Propboe3ev2S4SZOf0vRON6POWfBtzcdW-sAnCAtjCY2oTx-wPA-gE729ET66-PJ8_jTath1EtkYh_TSuMwAZutZety0tVNsuSm1aiquBcbN4i3yYM2oWYFdL3WxAMZ8RmsurPGymsK4ov3t_mphFPvZe7uPLmG_05ep2WdXIFcppyWYpeToE_fESH1v13D8nQhoQIysDb_jNMvvoZm8fQlN-7DwI9flo5zLBdZdxPRuIjvrky2OsWlqR7474oFWh3Hmt0NDMlR7Hl42fYG4wdNKqT8tV0mM05-jEFFxVA9kegS9D5qzJht-3qA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| | | | | Peter, have you seen Ken Calvert's latest TV ad? To no surprise, it’s an attack against me. If you live in the 41st District, there’s a good chance you might see this come across your TV screen. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf282a277-589d-400f-9d30-7afd3bc559f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) It’s unfortunate Calvert is resorting to blanketing the airwaves with fear mongering and smears, though I can’t say I’m surprised. We’ve known these attacks would come, but frankly, we didn’t expect them to be so desperate or hit the airwaves this early. It’s clear he’s intimidated by the strength of grassroots movement, and will do anything to try and stop our momentum. **We can’t let this go unchallenged. In fact, we’re launching our own response to make sure voters know the truth. That’s why I’m asking:** [**Can you split a donation today between Blue Amp Action and our campaign so we can completely nullify this attack ad? We set a goal of raising $25,000 this week, and we still have another $15,000 left to raise. Your $25 donation will go a long way in helping us respond to these attacks.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84c5e9cf-da48-4c6a-a3b5-208a9e14784b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e66a962-e100-4867-a8c3-28a28e04240f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
