Peter,
**URGENT ALERT**
Lawmakers in the State of Kansas are changing ballot access rules: [Legal Action May Be Required](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kansas_ballot_2_24_24_rs_nd3&n=3)
As it stands right now, our campaign for President is tasked with obtaining and certifying 5,000 signatures from citizens across the Sunflower State.
But, if the new bill that passed the House passes the Senate and heads to the Governor’s office for signature, our campaign will be required to collect 21,000 signatures.
_These are the kinds of dirty politics that has Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. running for office in the first place!_
If this stands, our campaign will be forced once again (like we did in Utah) to bring legal action, legal action that costs dollars and cents.
Nearly all of our budget is devoted to achieving ballot access in the 50 states and DC so we can end these political stunts aimed at preserving power between two and only two political parties.
Please let RFK Jr. hear from you right now with your best gift!

| | Peter, you may not know me, but my name is CAPT Hung Cao, and it would mean the world to me if you took a minute to read my story.
I’m a father, a husband, a U.S. Navy combat veteran, and a LEGAL immigrant.

When my family came to America after escaping communist Vietnam, I didn’t speak a word of English. But with hard work and dedication, I learned the language and ways of America, and I knew I was in the greatest country on Earth.

I went on to be appointed to the Naval Academy, which was followed by a 25-year career retiring as a U.S. Navy captain.

My story is proof that the American Dream is REAL, but that doesn’t mean it was easy.

_In 2022, I ran for Congress and narrowly lost my election in a blue district._

But it happened for a reason. It laid the groundwork for me to run again. **But this time, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to beat career politician Tim Kaine and flip Virginia BRIGHT RED!**

**Our end-of-month deadline is coming up, and I need your urgent help if we’re going to pull off the best election night victory in America.**

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, you may not know me, but my name is CAPT Hung Cao, and it would mean the world to me if you took a minute to read my story. I’m a father, a husband, a U.S. Navy combat veteran, and a LEGAL immigrant. When my family came to America after escaping communist Vietnam, I didn’t speak a word of English. But with hard work and dedication, I learned the language and ways of America, and I knew I was in the greatest country on Earth. I went on to be appointed to the Naval Academy, which was followed by a 25-year career retiring as a U.S. Navy captain. My story is proof that the American Dream is REAL, but that doesn’t mean it was easy. In 2022, I ran for Congress and narrowly lost my election in a blue district. But it happened for a reason. It laid the groundwork for me to run again. But this time, I’m running for the U.S. Senate to beat career politician Tim Kaine and flip Virginia BRIGHT RED! Our end-of-month deadline is coming up, and I need your urgent help if we’re going to pull off the best election night victory in America. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: But I will. | | | | | | I may be the first Speaker of the House to ever say this to you. "Fixing America’s problems is simple. And I mean DEAD simple." "If you want a booming economy: lower taxes and get rid of regulations." We did it during the Trump administration and it worked. "If you want a strong and secure border: simply enforce the laws on the books and finish building the wall." We did it during the Trump administration and it worked. "If you want peace: lead with strength, defend your allies, and keep your foes in line." We did it during the Trump administration and it worked. Friend, this year - Republicans have a chance to control the government with a Republican trifecta. Joe Biden is miles behind in the polls. We're poised to take over the Senate with ease. "But none of that will mean a thing if we don’t defend and grow our Republican Majority in the House. " I need to ask you for help - which is not my favorite thing to do... but this isn't for me. This is for our country. "Can you spare $10 today to help me lead House Republicans to victory in November?" | | Friend, the nasty secret of Washington D.C. is that the more confusing everything seems and the more divided we are... the easier it is for self-interested politicians to line their pockets or force their agenda on America. And at the end of the day, you and your children are the victims. "Fentanyl is flooding the streets of our cities and killing countless Americans." "Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it’s not." "Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every month." "Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it’s not." "Joe Biden’s economy is making it harder to live a prosperous life. Americans are being forced to wait to buy houses, get married, have kids, and retire until much later in life." Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it's not. I took over as Speaker of the House on October 25th, and it's never been clearer to me that we CAN save our country as long as we hold fast to basic commonsense principles. Friend, here's another simple truth: We don't get to make the rules - no matter how simple - if we don't win elections. "That’s why I’m asking for your help to score a massive victory in 2024. Friend, we truly can’t do this without you. This is an all-hands effort." I'm not crying wolf and I'm not exaggerating when I say this: This November is a make or break election. Thank you in advance for your support! | Speaker Mike Johnson | | * | | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana P.O. Box 6075 Bossier City, LA 71171 The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Federal Budget is Job #1 for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Hudson for Congress]()
body:
GOP Challenger Suggests New Approach to Fix Congress’ Annual Budget Failure | | | | | [](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=b92b7f37de&e=26f66c7cbd)
---
**Hudson: Federal Budget is Job #1 for Rep. Scholten & Colleagues****— GOP Challenger Suggests New Approach to Fix Congress’ Annual Budget Failure —**
**Grand Rapids, MI** — “The very first priority of Congress should be timely passing a budget for the federal government. But Congresswoman Scholten and her colleagues have failed at job #1 not just this year—but every year this century,” observed Paul Hudson, the GOP candidate running against Scholten. In the nearly five decades that the current system for budgeting and spending tax dollars has been in place, Congress has passed all its required appropriations measures on time only four times: fiscal 1977 (the first full fiscal year under the current system), 1989, 1995 and 1997. The last three times, Congress was late in passing the budget blueprint that, in theory, precedes the actual spending bills. [[1](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=166133f37a&e=26f66c7cbd)]
Hudson stated, “This is no way to run a government. Congress’ track record on budgeting is abysmal and demands a new approach. So here’s what I propose: Since Members of Congress only react to crises or deadlines, let’s change the process to push up the deadline requiring Congress to spend the first quarter of every year focused exclusively on the budget. No leaving DC until it’s done.”
“There’s no reason Rep. Scholten and her colleagues should be taking overseas trips, playing politics, or recessing for weeks at a time before they complete their most basic responsibility that taxpayers sent them to Washington to do.” “The budget process has been amended before and obviously needs reform. Why not require Members to concentrate the first 90 days of the year on producing a federal budget and refrain from anything that is not budget-related until the job is done? The Constitution gave the power of the purse – the nation's checkbook – to Congress, so there’s no reason for delay. People are fed up with this endless cycle of government shutdowns and kicking the can down the road. These reforms would ensure that Representatives like Hillary Scholten who claim they're laser focused on the job, actually complete the work of the people,“ remarked Hudson. “It’s time to try something new. Could we really do any worse than the annual mess Congress presides over?” asked Hudson.
The Republican challenger noted that for fiscal year 2024 the House has passed just 7 of 12 appropriation bills, while the Senate has only approved 3 of 12. A West Michigan resident and lifelong Michigander, Paul Hudson is seeking the Republican nomination for Congress in the state's Third District. The GOP primary election for United States House of Representatives is Tuesday, August 6, 2024.
# # # **Follow Paul Hudson:**[**Twitter**](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=9bc0992751&e=26f66c7cbd)**|**[**Campaign Website**](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=87c816c355&e=26f66c7cbd)**|**[**Facebook**](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=68aa51d67c&e=26f66c7cbd)
[1] Pew Research Center, [https://www.pewresearch.org/short-reads/2023/09/13/congress-has-long-struggled-to-pass-spending-bills-on-time/](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=84ab2171e7&e=26f66c7cbd) 09/13/23.[2] Congressional Research Service, [https://crsreports.congress.gov/AppropriationsStatusTable](https://paulhudsonforcongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=600300ac5dcd9b542144e2b89&id=d3fd9aaea2&e=26f66c7cbd)

subject: They won’t put our issues first

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: I’ll never bow to these disgraceful tactics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
I’ll stand strong for Texas and the United States of America- always. When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fight for what’s right.
This is disgraceful – but I won’t back down...

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=835d912d06304b7787f0c4d1b5b0c321&_e=Im7t39bkUo3YHJ-4TXmTIHvh8WLnQh_g6AoBYav2GX_zvj_yXAIkxzRVT3jf6MKJAONHLdtkA2GrLy2b4mu7vTptJ5-xzgIxTquamXSavDzCeR6rNz1xdidul8T3aGY_YXrzn2bAYhP8dJHEq1rpQLt5zxfiYkKQhaYAhTKiMXE2DLggVeENnrGFU7QvwmBlqm45MZ17E-fzya7vdGZXAoxPzPZX25ZmhGjqMNjhHQj_kgWRulymaO2A9vkjO8yMPJI3non95YCCUgNAqeVpXWiwk5GwTKcKN3KV3faU-cTX_mhgRprxdYA1RB-Ptq6JF_4IqnLmtvAuEGTW0AzcKHl6Pbq0Yva1VTRAaK0q7pxKQSGx52-SgPJnNUvCQR2WRKwFVYmn6HlXYLiDrUkEWn598Vgdsg4CRUiRcjeE5LVemBWdqW2hvjBTUG51PCpgdHtIt-YPpW6gfjjCDQnz2_kOAJtC6NyZ0NJT1v1hscsUEf9VNr3JO1a9gkMPyZKr)
---
| | Peter, For the second time this week, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, and shouting at the top of their lungs. They claim to be protesting Israel’s actions in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me_. **I won’t be intimidated by these lefty malcontents and their liberal paymasters- but I need your help to stand strong and fight back. Will you chip in right now to let me and my family know you’re with us? >> [https://secure.winred.com/stand-with-ted-cruz-and-family-now](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=835d912d06304b7787f0c4d1b5b0c321&_e=Im7t39bkUo3YHJ-4TXmTIHvh8WLnQh_g6AoBYav2GX_zvj_yXAIkxzRVT3jf6MKJAONHLdtkA2GrLy2b4mu7vTptJ5-xzgIxTquamXSavDzCeR6rNz1xdidul8T3aGY_YXrzn2bAYhP8dJHEq1rpQLt5zxfiYkKQhaYAhTKiMXE2DLggVeENnrGFU7QvwmBlqm45MZ17E-fzya7vdGZXAoxPzPZX25ZmhGjqMNjhHQj_kgWRulymaO2A9vkjO8yMPJI3non95YCCUgNAqeVpXWiwk5GwTKcKN3KV3faU-cTX_mhgRprxdYA1RB-Ptq6JF_4IqnLmtvAuEGTW0AzcKHl6Pbq0Yva1VTRAaK0q7pxjcWQlXe5eD_ZR8DAcgK3w42IYIwugpnxJKKx1mhGaBoUUpcPHdn7DTyRScxRsXMxGVU59jUDyYf8dwoHU_tylmqW3qB65Eq8Iwuv6jn3p2AlbobFWQ8kU6yq0yDxmKrh9vv-y_5KHtcWoYw8dWsSh)** Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue- we see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. _Now they’ve come to my home... _
---
**[**DONATE NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >>>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=835d912d06304b7787f0c4d1b5b0c321&_e=Im7t39bkUo3YHJ-4TXmTIHvh8WLnQh_g6AoBYav2GX_zvj_yXAIkxzRVT3jf6MKJAONHLdtkA2GrLy2b4mu7vTptJ5-xzgIxTquamXSavDzCeR6rNz1xdidul8T3aGY_YXrzn2bAYhP8dJHEq1rpQLt5zxfiYkKQhaYAhTKiMXE2DLggVeENnrGFU7QvwmBlqm45MZ17E-fzya7vdGZXAoxPzPZX25ZmhGjqMNjhHQj_kgWRulymaO2A9vkjO8yMPJI3non95YCCUgNAqeVpXWiwk5GwTKcKN3KV3faU-cTX_mhgRprxdYA1RB-Ptq6JF_4IqnLmtvAuEGTW0AzcKHl6Pbq0Yva1VTRAaK0q7pyXl4SgLNEexQ_gk2HzkdixA0ZFSo7PJu3tnRpXBHlAMRP3ljv4tVcYRhYta6Pq7SjDcodC8o7FtZ8riRGh04g1vu8Yc06MOPgcTPEpZw1Y4Jf9A-9YXbIf4TAMfRS0JvNugbYw-pw3R71DnACW7bNh)**
---
**Why is this happening?** Because the left isn’t able to tolerate any dissent. And the far-left has always used physical violence and intimidation in order to put pressure on their political opponents. Now this tactic is common in within the Democratic Party. It’s wrong. Please know that _I’ll never bow to these disgraceful tactics_. I’ll stand strong for Texas and the United States of America- always. When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fight for what’s right. Thank you.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[**SHOW THE FAR-LEFT YOU STAND WITH TEAM CRUZ**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=835d912d06304b7787f0c4d1b5b0c321&_e=Im7t39bkUo3YHJ-4TXmTIHvh8WLnQh_g6AoBYav2GX_zvj_yXAIkxzRVT3jf6MKJAONHLdtkA2GrLy2b4mu7vTptJ5-xzgIxTquamXSavDzCeR6rNz1xdidul8T3aGY_YXrzn2bAYhP8dJHEq1rpQLt5zxfiYkKQhaYAhTKiMXE2DLggVeENnrGFU7QvwmBlqm45MZ17E-fzya7vdGZXAoxPzPZX25ZmhGjqMNjhHQj_kgWRulymaO2A9vkjO8yMPJI3non95YCCUgNAqeVpXWiwk5GwTKcKN3KV3faU-cTX_mhgRprxdYA1RB-Ptq6JF_4IqnLmtvAuEGTW0AzcKHl6Pbq0Yva1VTRAaK0q7py7nmMWiuykgM_iEo0h_quf6f0xvSLAoEXpij8ZbUT1kscI8adm6tnfnhtke_yTdpOngZ41_aIcmJSAXqaNxlSwt3ygJN29P1Y4QVHQF8Km2So1P4F9c8hNs0XmxRZjzTklJWQW1wtbYS1oEGie31We)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5660%2E5257348%2EAdq3pu ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, I’ve
been able to do everything thanks to you.

My service as an impeachment manager against Donald Trump. My oversight of
the January 6th attack and the hearings we held. My work leading the House
Intelligence Committee. I’ve even had the honor to take the debate stage
three times to show the Golden State why I’m the best candidate to protect
our democracy and our planet and make the economy work for everyone.

None of this would be possible without you,
Derek.

During the campaign, I still have very important work to do back in
Washington. And because of your unwavering support, I can spend my time
focusing on my job — reading briefing materials on key issues, writing
bills, meeting with constituents, and yes, contacting undecided voters
before Election Day.

Because I can count on you, I can continue advocating for my constituents
and spreading my message about the need to protect our democracy,
strengthen the economy, defend reproductive rights, and attack climate
change.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240224_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1004&akid=5660%2E5257348%2EAdq3pu ]I’m hoping that I can count on you especially since we’re just days
away from Election Day. I’m confident we can win this race with your help.
Can you chip in
$10 so
that we can end the month strong and reach our grassroots fundraising
goal?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:

| | Fellow Conservative, The latest numbers are alarming. Colin Allred has nearly $10 million in his war chest now and he’s gaining ground here in the Lone Star State on a campaign of lies.

**It’s all hands on deck to KEEP TEXAS RED this November – _we can’t let the left win_!**

Today’s magic number is 24. The 2024 election year is heating up, it’s February 24th, we’ve launched a 24-hour emergency grassroots fundraising drive, and we’re looking for every supporter who can afford it to step up and pitch in $24.

Our strength is in numbers. We need every conservative patriot on board to hold the line in Texas, win control of the U.S. Senate, and build a safe and secure American future.

**[Will you pitch in $24 before our midnight deadline to fuel our fight?](http://trk.tedcruz.)**
---
[**STAND WITH TED!**](http://trk.tedcruz._RWXA)
---
This is an urgent call to action. We cannot allow the woke-left Democrats to flip Texas.

**_Ted is their #1 target and he needs you standing behind now more than ever before!_**

**[Respond now and we’ll add your name to a list of top supporters to share with Ted>>>](http://trk.tedcruz._pygdZVQY3dLwA)**

\- Team Cruz

[**DONATE $24**](http://trk.tedcruz.)

**[Please make a $24 donation (or more if you can!)](http://trk.tedcruz.)** to help **KEEP TEXAS RED** this fall.

subject: If you’ve been waiting…

body:
| | |
---
Peter -- If you’ve been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. **But there’s another important reason: today is the South Carolina GOP primary, which means Donald Trump is closer than ever to securing the Republican nomination.** We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to defeat him. These are not arbitrary goals. They’re numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can overcome what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails and texts like these. **The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every single email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for February -- and this is a critical moment for the campaign. So, he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say, Peter?** [**Can President Biden count on you to use this link to contribute just $5, or whatever you can afford today, to his reelection campaign? clean_body: | | | Peter -- If you’ve been waiting for the absolute perfect time to make your first online donation to President Biden's reelection campaign, we are here to tell you that TODAY is that day. Why today? There are the obvious reasons: defense of democracy, abortion access, protecting the Affordable Care Act, and not letting Trump back into the White House for four more years of division and destruction. But there’s another important reason: today is the South Carolina GOP primary, which means Donald Trump is closer than ever to securing the Republican nomination. We have very real fundraising goals we need to reach in order to defeat him. These are not arbitrary goals. They’re numbers we must reach to fund a campaign that can overcome what Trump and the outside groups are spending to beat us. And the fact is, almost all of our donations come in response to emails and texts like these. The President doesn't expect anyone to give to every single email we send. But right now we're in danger of falling behind on our goals for February -- and this is a critical moment for the campaign. So, he's really hoping you'll give to this one. What do you say, Peter? | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for stepping up to help the President today. Team Joe

TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62920?t=9&akid=13147%2E878179%2E1b_jnm) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62920?t=10&akid=13147%2E878179%2E1b_jnm)

Joe Biden has made it clear he couldn't care less about the crisis on our border, my friend. _**Steady yourself, these statistics don't lie:**_
* There are 9,700 daily encounters on the border.
* 2023 saw nearly 2.5 million encounters.
* 2023 also saw 169 encounters of individuals on the terror watchlist.
* Since Biden took office, 8.7 million illegal immigrants have crossed into the U.S.

Unlike Biden, Glenn Grothman is _**serious**_ about securing our border. **_[**_Will you show him your support with a donation of $20.24 today?_**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=6bc74cd47ffa4ce89afa978784c1d9c3&_e=58xhKHmthTZuHHQh2RE_y4qSWmhwu9xe105xrx-Ota73Sa-InsIImZ8Cemm6nkiEMOS4nq37LNcStQnVD389jcvIW8u0pXXbdEVLqnk1GVrrk4zmGhQrLS7IXptZZs_LbgknLJigsH-uxDjEmWzNKgRMB7FDCH9azz_bQgNVlvOe0xaQzKhQ31Yj0DPO1bLOhUV3PhU1oWm2UIUl8rc1FSzARBRt8Uhii6sDJ_u3qJZJq8WgLf4sv37-nq8IUew1)_**

Steady yourself, these statistics don't lie: There are 9,700 daily encounters on the border. 2023 saw nearly 2.5 million encounters. 2023 also saw 169 encounters of individuals on the terror watchlist. Since Biden took office, 8.7 million illegal immigrants have crossed into the U.S. Unlike Biden, Glenn Grothman is serious about securing our border. | | Glenn is proud to serve as Chairman of the Subcommittee on National Security, the Border, and Foreign Affairs, and he has made multiple visits to the border to see the chaos for himself. President Trump didn't need to call on anyone to secure the border,he just did it because it was the right thing to do! It's time to reinstate Trump's policies, and Glenn is ready to do just that. Thank you, Team Grothman | | | | Follow Glenn Grothman on Social Media! | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Glenn Grothman for Congress P.O. Box 1215 Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman.

I’m not about to stand by while our President’s mind and our country turn to mush. I love America too much, and I want to make sure my daughters have the same opportunities here that I did growing up. body:
💻🔨💌🖨️ | | Peter — you are hearing a lot about primaries and elections, and as Brian’s campaign manager, **I wanted to make sure you know exactly how your contributions help our field team.** These are just a few items on our campaign wish list that your donations help pay for:

💻 **$17.05:** One month of Zoom access. Whether it’s hosting our weekly volunteer phone banks, or meeting with community leaders and our team, we’re on Zoom A LOT.

🔨 **$45:** Big sign stakes: everybody love a big old yard sign, but have you ever thought about how much the stakes for those things cost? I have.

💌 **$68:** 100 stamps (prices just went up 🙁) From thank you notes for our event hosts and donors to campaign updates, we send a lot of mail.

🖨️ **$122:** One toner cartridge. (Why are these things so expensive?!?) We go through a lot of ink for mailings, flyers, and volunteer sign-up sheets.

Texans are already voting — we only have TEN days to keep reaching voters with Brian's message — so we need all the support we can get to win.

| Friend -

Last time the Democrats were in power, they fast-tracked an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use _your_ tax dollars to fund _their_ campaigns, make it harder for Republicans to win competitive races, and gut voter ID laws.

And if the Democrats win the next election, we know they will try it again.

We're racing against the clock to protect the integrity of the most important election of our lifetimes. We need your help to secure our elections once and for all. _**[Here's my plan: I'm personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=04a7b7ee6314453b8be6348e830cf3e0&_e=T2m4kO-oucxKZKbQIxIBEOVNp2Dus499nPEUc3XVX6D4_bw3YSk6aIWGcaGu2Aj7w5T29kMFrGji_mXLICiPTbiEmSejAPAw2E1lykK19IFVCS83l_bn1Un_3kPffcV-giPJvGC3D130AAdXz65i4ixLrh-APx7v7orEtN2FPqpEZKPh5EL7FqFm8pxOsTD_lcCmM4xyjGyYh4RC6Fnw-GbIlXuutZdKo6kmlk5lTRvuZhhzLaCFpx8O28iX-ixrQlUFsIOMgsjK26hpKKeA1AuBqWnp9e7egrKpXhABgmV6YfSR7a74JjOmaCBperkyrB9fqoQOPwp_zB2cSOfjmyGtzMH_gkVcHEAxn2pUOosv7p81C5lbz9z4VTbvvTgPTRW59O3GUQ1uifYirQioaPALZKsnDc2UbM35tQ3Q4lV6nmUE9y8ppOeTbbNRllxR "Here’s my plan: I’m personally asking you to sign my petition to FEDERALLY MANDATE voter ID laws in every state in America.")**_

Fellow Conservative, do elections still matter to you?

I’m sorry to ask you such a charged question, but **my messages don’t appear to be cutting through the noise of every other political campaign reaching out to you for help.**

**I’ll be blunt:** Senate campaigns like mine are the only campaigns worth donating to. Aside from President Trump, everyone else asking you for money is trying to pad campaign accounts for campaigns won or lost long ago.

**FOR INSTANCE:** Democrats have committed _**$56M to Montana to buy my opponent another six-year term in Washington.**_ Despite polls showing that I am the only Republican who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat for America, **we’re losing the campaign cash race ... BAD.**

On February 9th, President Trump endorsed our campaign, and despite reaching out to thousands of donors whose phone numbers and emails I have, **we raised just $394.**

We MUST do better. This race TRULY MATTERS. **[Donation link.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70ac8366234c4d5f88a82ae4b488adfd&_e=OdgPqv3qnuGx-cuJM5re-9ZdQPlM2VWfaYp5K0TVXZpZfAS_nHZnvlb027NqFFHU6oM-gW8BP7NbkPIAXKUbQ-0l71wtfaVAEzyuLDTmsNokiQ2uk5EPy6QrfXPuVtBTEaET_g7SvxDSXppy3L5KQyVRm8s-oNO5CVY4R8U2rzF4M8Euf39E7UMU-7tG149uCrUsPc-DwwwQiEj1VZowvVZw7yLuUkkphhLawRksoPl7Yu5sl0-wevMniHy_1r131B_G-aODJMGMIEKHCg_SK-Fotz2CtfUKOiamum2Y-HoY6ehZJYRtex9HMET1FJVLYN-jvdYZdHGoVAiPbRS44xuKwor7-P-xYzRjw8vG7vCdpqvvCINwahUHb2--5BgTfdfVhcb0qDn4R8cZc19hLQ%3D%3D)**

Fellow Conservative, unless we do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, we may never win back this Senate seat again. **Our situation is DIRE.**

**[Just $1 from 1,000 donors will help keep this campaign running for another day](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=70ac8366234c4d5f88a82ae4b488adfd&_e=OdgPqv3qnuGx-cuJM5re-9ZdQPlM2VWfaYp5K0TVXZpZfAS_nHZnvlb027NqFFHU6oM-gW8BP7NbkPIAXKUbQ-0l71wtfaVAEzyuLDTmsNokiQ2uk5EPy6QrfXPuVtBTEaET_g7SvxDSXppy3L5KQyVRm8s-oNO5CVY4R8U2rzF4M8Euf39E7UMU-7tG149uCrUsPc-DwwwQiEj1VZowvVZw7yLuUkkphhLawRksoPl7Yu5sl0-wevMniHy_1r13NBWGVgzyZtZ48sCy3YrK2KKnZon4VTvvKigSJoYEI6c6QuHN5L31uwWXJFbLnOJ9sS5e43XxJHWJ7HwPUodL36lSZiW1uPWKVXrHqpByxaqbSQh3qKKZ67KOGkIite69jLALBKx-7TfKEco-rSvpaQ%3D%3D)** , so if you are willing to join me on this mission, will you chip in just $1 before the end of the day?

clean_body: Unless we do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, we may never win back this Senate seat again. Our situation is DIRE. | | Fellow Conservative, do elections still matter to you? I’m sorry to ask you such a charged question, but my messages don’t appear to be cutting through the noise of every other political campaign reaching out to you for help. I’ll be blunt: Senate campaigns like mine are the only campaigns worth donating to. Aside from President Trump, everyone else asking you for money is trying to pad campaign accounts for campaigns won or lost long ago. FOR INSTANCE: Democrats have committed $56M to Montana to buy my opponent another six-year term in Washington. Despite polls showing that I am the only Republican who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat for America, we’re losing the campaign cash race ... BAD. On February 9th, President Trump endorsed our campaign, and despite reaching out to thousands of donors whose phone numbers and emails I have, we raised just $394. We MUST do better. This race TRULY MATTERS. Fellow Conservative, unless we do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, we may never win back this Senate seat again. Our situation is DIRE. , so if you are willing to join me on this mission, will you chip in just $1 before the end of the day? For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Republican for U.S. Senate, Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. # FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader,It’s no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ →](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d1ccaf8676fe4011bd360fe5e2e54b1f&_e=NsM-E92Ag09FrcPUkLK3dmyrPmD9H6GbR0NeGbwh8wPhGWqSBAYDhmOCZ2lxRRsHnqN6Dc-fDeJ_bSg_w-ZjcvZgqtbnovqTEWl5sPAVGwrtxUHMSfCEahzG0p3c5s0OFbhL5b74ybc2e6xDx06_mR1NGsLhzwlPEFl1M_UyPhBhUAM21ais2KQWH0DlfK81eOIBJXjFfHoGYrP-nLGjbElvl1RGRpWPMjPXE1Ta1HngRdQgyFw4fIpVwsKOUoO1B5COpQQHytQdoENmIJ2d1zABJO_dlrmf5zWJrd8VNgO5FnCeKzO4euVWarPyI7T_r-MgG_p_GPZYe6O7tt4CCzEv6LgkBOOau3QviUlCXcXxck1dMS5yemaUBZuSPPl5)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.
---

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press. | | | | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote: With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time. | | | | Believe me when I say that America needs the Sun, now more than ever. And the Sun needs you.Join our movement now. For just 1c a day you can make a real difference. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79634266/457066636/1544195748?refcode=odp_em_240224_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjViMWY3NS0yN2QzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m_kBmuGVKkfOt8njQqM2X_hrTFaZfZXClvQfpuYg6fo=) Team, We’ve long sounded the alarm that those trying to restrict reproductive healthcare aren’t just coming for abortion – they’re after contraception and IVF, too. **This week, we saw that warning come true as the Alabama Supreme Court ruled that embryos are people, forcing three clinics to stop providing IVF treatments and leaving families seeking fertility assistance in limbo.** This could happen in Ohio, too. Attorney General David Yost has made it clear that he’s doing everything he can to keep aspects of Ohio’s draconian abortion ban in place, even though Ohio voters overwhelmingly supported _all_ reproductive care at the ballot box in November. Once again, politicians are putting themselves directly in our personal healthcare decisions. ****[It’s up to us to fight back and make it clear that we _will not_ stop working to protect reproductive healthcare in every state and at the federal level – and we’re going to elect representatives who will do the same. name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: FWD: FWD: Maricopa County, AZ Election Lawsuit >>
body:
( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1668099.811.1.754af00f0c5b306740b3357e1b24a51c )

Friend,

I have breaking news to share with you...

We at America First Legal have just filed an \*\*absolutely momentous\*\* lawsuit in Maricopa County, Arizona against their elections officials for repeatedly and egregiously violating the State of Arizona’s election administration laws.

The election interference and systematic election law violations we allege in Arizona are appalling, bone-chilling, and have the most serious consequences for every American. We all know what’s going on.

_That’s why we are taking action to expose and punish those responsible!_

_ \*\*DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT OUR EFFORTS >>\*\* _ ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1668099.812.1.d5a8af8317dcc1f5bc1023e42620e79c )

\*\*We strongly allege numerous serious violations and criminal activity, including:\*\*

\*\*#1 -\*\* _Maricopa County refuses to maintain the mandatory chain of custody for ballots. \*\*In 2022, these failures resulted in a discrepancy of over 25,000 votes – larger than the margin of victory in the state governor’s race\*\* _

\*\*#2 -\*\* _ \*\*Maricopa County ignores mandatory reconciliation procedures to track each ballot printed or issued to a voter.\*\* The law requires tracking and reconciling ballots cast and voters checked in to stop fraud, but the Defendants do not perform any reconciliation procedures at all_

\*\*#3 -\*\* _Arizona law requires ballot drop boxes to be staffed by at least two election officials positioned close enough to view each person who deposits ballots into it. \*\*Maintaining an unstaffed drop box is a felony. However, Maricopa County maintains unstaffed, unsupervised ballot drop boxes, facilitating illegal ballot harvesting\*\* _

For many years now, the Maricopa County Board of Supervisors and the County Recorder have consistently failed to lawfully administer elections. We believe these individuals are fully aware of their election law violations.

\*\*Make no mistake:\*\* Our lawsuit has been filed to prevent the November 5, 2024, election from being tainted with the same mistakes and maladministration that occurred during the 2020 and 2022 elections and to prevent election interference from occurring.

_Thank you for your support of our mission and historic legal actions here!_

\*\*PLEASE RUSH SUPPORT HERE >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1668099.813.1.d7964111973cababb73bf65e04ac46fd ) \*\* \*\*

Stephen Miller

_President, America First Legal _

\*\*DONATE >>\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1668099.814.1.4f540dec9e4a1d7b02b33e7a7b70dce2 )

America First Legal Foundation is an IRS-approved section 501(c)(3) public charity. Your donation to America First Legal Foundation is tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law.

America First Legal Foundation

611 Pennsylvania Avenue, SE | #231

Washington, DC 20003

Unsubscribe instantly from these emails by clicking here ( https://go.madmimi.com/opt_out?pact=1668099-179622878-14744622743-efe11f8c2e1dcf122d7d96b8b058d73392110b14 ).

I need your help to close the gap, so I'm humbly asking for $5. Believe me when I tell you that it'll have a huge, _immediate_ impact on this race and on Democrats' chances of defending our Senate majority.

name: Eric Hovde
subject: Restore the American Dream

body:
->

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.792.1.a4eb78590c1e8ff5a7676e797e4e978e )

<-

Fellow Conservative,

Do you feel like the American Dream is slipping away?

Do you sometimes feel like you don’t recognize your country anymore... or that we’re living in an episode of the Twilight Zone?

Me too. My name is Eric Hovde, and I’m excited to announce that I am officially launching my campaign for Senate in Wisconsin.

I’m running because I have had it with business as usual in Washington. Career politicians and their radical Left-wing agendas are changing our country for the worse and robbing future generations of the American Dream.

I’ll be upfront with you. I’m NOT a career politician. I’m a proud husband, father, business owner, and fourth-generation Wisconsinite. I’m running to _RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM_. \*\*Will you join our fight?\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.793.1.ec3580c864696d9b01053f090d6cc57d )

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.794.1.d227e5a36b8445d8510e0743a45e6399 )<-

\*\* WATCH LAUNCH VIDEO

& JOIN ERIC\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.795.1.23640e6f8d60fbf6a10d73a57c4a0253 )

\*\*My Democrat opponent, Tammy Baldwin, has been a career politician for 20 years and has voted with Biden over 95% of the time.\*\* She’s supported Biden’s catastrophic open borders, letting drug cartels overwhelm our Southern Border and wreak havoc in communities across the country, and voted for Biden’s disastrous economic agenda that sent inflation skyrocketing.

\*\*Control of the Senate and the Presidency will come down to Wisconsin.\*\* This will be the #1 battleground state for Republicans and Democrats. My opponent already has over $8 MILLION in the bank, with millions more pledged by Leftist special interest groups.

I haven’t spent 20 years building up a network of D.C. special interest groups to bail me out of a tough fight. \*\*I’m relying on the grassroots support from Conservatives like you to fuel our campaign to take back Wisconsin’s Senate seat and end the Democrats’ Majority.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.796.1.6d6d8cca94a4291ad0c530765b2e5ad5 )

\*\*Will you join our fight to _Restore the American Dream_ with a contribution of $10, $25, $50, or more right now?\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=1687709.797.1.a34851984a210d3ac339a072d1047633 )

name: Katie Porter
subject: Thursday morning I have to make the most consequential spend decisions of this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38180%2E3422442%2EO4s4PO)
This is the final deadline I’m going to email you about before Election Day, Derek.
First thing Thursday morning, my team and I have to make final decisions about our TV ads. **We can buy additional ad time on Thursday, but after that, it’s too late.**
That means we need money in the door by Wednesday at midnight. I’m setting an ambitious goal because we have ground to make up: **$250,000.**
Polling has proven that our ads are working, but we’re only ahead by one point and I need your support—is there anything you can give?
**[Yes! Count me in for $5.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-38180&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38180_3422442_O4s4PO&akid=38180%2E3422442%2EO4s4PO)**
**With $7 million being spent on dishonest attack ads and our opponent outspending us three to one on TV, I’m counting on grassroots supporters to help me prove that California is ready to shake up the Senate.**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-38180&refcode2=38180_3422442_O4s4PO&akid=38180%2E3422442%2EO4s4PO)
Thanks in advance!
Katie
P.S. **[Check out our latest ad here!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-38180&refcode2=38180_3422442_O4s4PO&akid=38180%2E3422442%2EO4s4PO)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240224-38180&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38180_3422442_O4s4PO&akid=38180%2E3422442%2EO4s4PO)**

name: Team Gallego
subject: ☀️ WAIT: If you want to help defeat Kari Lake, don’t click away 🌵
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
When Ruben thinks about his top supporters they’re not just the folks who write the biggest checks.
#

Peter -

When Ruben thinks about his top supporters — the people doing whatever they can to help him take back Arizona’s Senate seat, defeat Kari Lake, and defend our Senate majority — they’re not just the folks who write the biggest checks.

It’s the people who have been there when he needed them the most.

People like you, Peter.
---

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us in ways you might not realize. Just reading these emails helps us out immensely. We’re taking on the entire Republican establishment in Arizona, and it means a lot that you’re with us.

If we keep doing everything right, we’ll be able to win this campaign. It’s going to be a tough road, but with your help we can get the job done.
---

But here’s an interesting fact: out of hundreds of thousands of supporters from around the country, less than 5% of them have skin in the game and made a contribution to help Ruben win.

Today, we’re asking you to join them.
---

Our average donation is about $24. Some give more, many give less. But with the entire Republican establishment lining up against Ruben, and with no end to the depths they’ll go to defeat him, all that matters is that you take the next step and make that donation.

We will use every single dollar to stop Kari Lake, end her Senate ambitions, and prevent her from accumulating any more power and influence.

[**If helping Ruben defeat one of the most dangerous politicians in the country is worth $3 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that contribution.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240224-1-120&t=1&akid=1990%2E734936%2EQ8aqft)

subject: How to defend the Constitution
body:
“The Constitution is kind of trash.” | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=29b7c29184c945a696edc05db8be7397&_t=29-SvSQJn103GvdtM9ZwDesQPy71b5emK9aoG5cDuct4v3jTWXbzmF8U-ZRfxQfP4bz67MgnSz1R8CtSFopOMMSDjJw4a5Aa1avugbUAj_4%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=29b7c29184c945a696edc05db8be7397&_e=MBd7M8gW0T_ydDf1FIoQQmp3cbLOdcBnigOYvVGy6l3FQ42HyQ1qDT4nQv3092JZzcAtE63-08hYoADEGAroMipxJOHuGpbenH5jZrV5aWgzXMQgAcZDtKqWFzYAvXWzC1s1zkuMLCeLiwxAOsJaMq4mmKKVuobUJsKHApqC6iLu0GzQ8Q75cGbo-2S7juVoeFkn_lzXol_gp_6re9-cPh8aUFFqAHco5d1hEY5qDOp1hhRyGuzwaon83pn28-jlr_EcWPyvKssjuaXa0diWuAwOhevtM7tfVaumuQ4TNaD4YIpET3W7LjSyNJxOF3Nk_upglOsdOl244euiMuYpQSKnrYRDLuXPfbBB6dfnMhdLraHTOPVldqKgCHzVKy0Dn9agK2QZeq76XOwrr_6xeFmTp4EZ1gqkSKf5gxLm_3STiLPj449HDKwo6XSBzZ8j)
| | Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. **That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, ["_The Federalist Papers_ ,"](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=29b7c29184c945a696edc05db8be7397&_e=MBd7M8gW0T_ydDf1FIoQQmp3cbLOdcBnigOYvVGy6l3FQ42HyQ1qDT4nQv3092JZzcAtE63-08hYoADEGAroMipxJOHuGpbenH5jZrV5aWgzXMQgAcZDtKqWFzYAvXWzC1s1zkuMLCeLiwxAOsJaMq4mmKKVuobUJsKHApqC6iLu0GzQ8Q75cGbo-2S7juVoeFkn_lzXol_gp_6re9-cPh8aUFFqAHco5d1hEY5qDOp1hhRyGuzwaon83pn28-jlr_EcWPyvKssjuaXa0diWuAwOhevtM7tfVaumuQ4TNaCHKfpLMG4tCVm-1Wlj63ZbRdCeVCcYyczAnmfAkCiRI5EdzXRysOBRirgzEYdCnBsE-v96swx9mQcmzs6j2Ye4DzAvGr1fgnlf5fTdTXT75D8iEyBdN0bGdc8d3ssZAooCZ_ibj9YLZxK9X6t81VGy)**** on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=29b7c29184c945a696edc05db8be7397&_e=MBd7M8gW0T_ydDf1FIoQQmp3cbLOdcBnigOYvVGy6l3FQ42HyQ1qDT4nQv3092JZzcAtE63-08hYoADEGAroMipxJOHuGpbenH5jZrV5aWgzXMQgAcZDtKqWFzYAvXWzC1s1zkuMLCeLiwxAOsJaMq4mmKKVuobUJsKHApqC6iLu0GzQ8Q75cGbo-2S7juVoeFkn_lzXol_gp_6re9-cPh8aUFFqAHco5d1hEY5qDOp1hhRyGuzwaon83pn28-jlr_EcWPyvKssjuaXa0diWuAwOhevtM7tfVaumuQ4TNaAOxBniJu0SpmGAhj-Hwa9ZeGrYj7H8ZHSJopAj1PZbicqxYOqxte69OT8THAhY9XsdrasmWvyPU8gtCFBxddGtBAAOF_nqQqojeBkb8Ns_l4539jwBj9xRZ93d0XX3sNckPfcTy-hNceJ1uyihQpaA)
---
| | _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ right now: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=29b7c29184c945a696edc05db8be7397&_e=MBd7M8gW0T_ydDf1FIoQQmp3cbLOdcBnigOYvVGy6l3FQ42HyQ1qDT4nQv3092JZzcAtE63-08hYoADEGAroMipxJOHuGpbenH5jZrV5aWgzXMQgAcZDtKqWFzYAvXWzC1s1zkuMLCeLiwxAOsJaMq4mmKKVuobUJsKHApqC6iLu0GzQ8Q75cGbo-2S7juVoeFkn_lzXol_gp_6re9-cPh8aUFFqAHco5d1hEY5qDOp1hhRyGuzwaon83pn28-jlr_EcWPyvKssjuaXa0diWuAwOhevtM7tfVaumuQ4TNaBgcc3MoZZCoNwQl9K_7v6nZOXBmFf4mkmx05pRsFXmEUokDShIp31livrpfHSHchnSp4_Uax3_qsA3tvYAQ_K_wab2MZG6YXg3p_4ep4Ysg51sVz-aNXJL5bz8zg-90Fs1ZU-Q8aOQgMUji4r0iMkd) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: “The Constitution is kind of trash.” | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest--with an Ivy League degree--said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. That 's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, on DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | " The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles--maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of " The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. You can use this secure link to receive your copy of " The Federalist Papers" right now: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College .

name: COURIER
subject: Humbly asking you to read this message
body:
If our democracy is going to endure, news organizations must learn from the mistakes of 2016 and 2020.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635687/457071566/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0YTk5OTItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sjB6JnKqjeFe1Coh8Tv50OTbqT7d99Cj_jJKogorVNU=&emci=c69d05e5-fed0-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=0c4a9992-29d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=14016711)
Peter — In 2016, Donald Trump masterfully used cable news outlets like CNN and Fox News to draw attention to his campaign and spread dangerous misinformation.
Trump won, in part, because cable news put ratings and profit first—and our country hasn’t been the same since.
**We founded Courier Newsroom as a direct response to these failures.** We believe that restoring public trust in journalism can strengthen our democracy. Building that trust starts with calling out misinformation and bringing quality, local news to the communities that need it most.
_**[You can pitch in to power this critical work with a ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635688/457071567/-593472309?refcode=20240224-EM-COURIERmission&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0YTk5OTItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sjB6JnKqjeFe1Coh8Tv50OTbqT7d99Cj_jJKogorVNU=)**_[_**$10 contribution today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635689/457071568/-593472309?refcode=20240224-EM-COURIERmission&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0YTk5OTItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sjB6JnKqjeFe1Coh8Tv50OTbqT7d99Cj_jJKogorVNU=)
****[Pitch in to support our mission ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635690/457071569/-593472309?refcode=20240224-EM-COURIERmission&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM0YTk5OTItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sjB6JnKqjeFe1Coh8Tv50OTbqT7d99Cj_jJKogorVNU=)****
At Courier, we will never compromise the truth to make a quick buck. Here’s our commitment to you:
1. **We will always call out right-wing misinformation and tell the truth. **There are no "alternative facts" or "both sides." There is the truth, and we will hold right-wing bad actors accountable for their lies.

2. **We will restore trust in journalism by covering local stories that matter most to the communities we serve. **The best antidote to bad information is good information. We will never compromise our values just to drive clicks and profit.

3. **We will deliver our news to the online spaces where people spend their time. **Social media newsfeeds. Inboxes. Search engines. By bringing quality journalism to the online spaces where misinformation is thriving, our reporting dismantles right-wing propaganda in real time before it can spread.

Right now, our newsrooms across ten battleground states (with more to come) are committed to reporting the facts on the issues that matter and calling out and combating misinformation wherever we see it. We don’t rely on a paywall or subscription model, so we can’t keep growing without your generous support.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: BREAKING: A jury found the NRA liable for corruption and financial mismanagement.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s long been clear that the NRA puts profits for themselves and gun manufacturers over our safety.
#

Last night, we got breaking news: A jury found the NRA and their decades-long CEO Wayne LaPierre liable for corruption and financial mismanagement.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=1&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)
---
This verdict is no surprise. It’s long been clear that the NRA puts profits for themselves and gun manufacturers over our safety.
A decade ago, it would’ve been nearly impossible to imagine this kind of victory. For decades, the NRA had an iron grip on our politics and avoided accountability.
But thanks to our movement and our tireless organizing, we’ve toppled the NRA from their seat of power. They are a shell of the organization they once were, entrenched in scandal and extremism.
And this is just the beginning. Legislative victories like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act marked a turning point for our movement to save lives, proving that we can end the NRA’s toxic grip on Congress.
But we cannot get complacent. The NRA still has millions of members and tens of millions of dollars. They are still fighting in the courts and at the state level to overturn our progress — including overturning the Republican-backed legislation that was passed after Parkland.
There’s so much work ahead of us, and Gabby is counting on all of us to stand side by side to overcome the challenges ahead. We must do it together.
[**So please, if you can, make a donation to GIFFORDS today to help our movement build power. The NRA is targeting our gun safety champions this November, and we need to have their backs.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=2&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb24.xFye0V&amount=3&t=21&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-feb24.ECBkZg&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=22&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-feb24.1YUSOD&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=23&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-feb24.peL0cH&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=24&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-feb24.yXnpTt&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=25&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb24.xFye0V&refcode=em240224-1-30&t=26&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99)**
---
****
Our movement to end gun violence has the momentum to drown out the gun lobby and their dangerous “guns everywhere” agenda. We cannot let up now.
Thank you,
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7695%2E3935704%2EPCYN99) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | | | | **GOP legislators are moving 400+ anti-LGBTQ+ bills in 2024 — many of them aimed at kids.** [**SIGN to tell Congress: Take IMMEDIATE federal action to protect LGBTQ+ youth →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8645e0ac-ecb8-436b-8f40-623fc9a2b469/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [****](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta35a6aca-8b93-4ea6-98d4-c830d3ab5d14/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**“You’re a queer Latina who works at Planned Parenthood. Don’t you think you’re too much for your district?”**_ That’s the “advice” from a political operative as I first considered running for office. I was furious — not just for myself, but for the 400,000 LGBTQ+ people in my state. Were we all “too much”? That interaction lit a fire under me. Not only did I run, I flipped one of the most competitive districts in the Washington State Senate — and I immediately got to work on bills to make life better for working people. I protected my State Senate seat in 2022 when everyone was saying I couldn’t win and even became Deputy Majority Leader. Even now, I’m hearing the same “advice” that boils down to folks being scared of leaders like me who break the mold. Now, LGBTQ+ people, especially queer and trans kids, are under attack from cynical Republican politicians in dozens of states and in Congress. They’ve filed over 400 harmful bills ranging from taking books with LGBTQ+ characters out of school libraries to banning life-saving gender-affirming care. [**That’s why we’re fighting back, state by state — but we need national action. Tell Congress to ACT NOW federal level to stop the attacks on LGBTQ+ youth →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15c14b38-c70a-4216-828e-fc16e5950386/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) There are a range of solutions available to Congress. But we need more members with the courage to take action. Here in Washington, we updated the rules for legal name changes, strengthening safety and privacy protections for trans and nonbinary people, refugees, and survivors of domestic violence. We required all contracts for public services to contain anti-discrimination clauses. We passed a shield law to protect those seeking abortion or gender-affirming care in Washington from prosecution or persecution in their home states. And we ensured that trans youth who are not supported at home have access to safe accommodations. I have helped lead these policies, so I know what it takes to get it done. **Here’s the truth: Representation isn’t just symbolic. Having queer and trans people in office saves lives.** Not only do we need to elect more LGBTQ+ people at every level of the ballot, we need a Congress that will treat the attack on LGBTQ+ freedom and equality with the seriousness it deserves. [**This will take ALL of us — so if you agree that we need action, please join my campaign and tell Congress to protect LGBTQ+ students from cruel, cynical Republican attacks →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10fa9321-4aad-4bd6-b8e9-8959b6df341e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much, — Emily Randall
Democrat for Congress, Washington’s 6th District _Emily Randall has been endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, Equality PAC, LPAC, LGBTQ+ Victory Fund, PODER PAC, and dozens of other leaders and organizations. Learn more at[electemilyrandall.com](https://default.salsalabs.org/T441411ae-4486-42ed-ab3a-4bce65e7ad19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_.

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

Dear Peter, Today, I want to tell you a **story that I think everyone who calls Michigan home should hear at least once.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635960/457072222/-1799055687?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240224_fr_vets_cand_sm_act_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjOGI5ZmItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Vuts7apWyflsQpzkgH1G3bRAs-HRgZ2N8h5aBaoKvI=)
---
_Pictured: Sgt. Hiram White of the 25th U.S. Colored Infantry_
Hiram White enlisted in the Union army on February 1, 1864. He served with Company G of the 25th United States Colored Infantry, defending a pair of forts in Florida. **And after the war, he eventually settled in the Upper Peninsula **— **in Kenton, Michigan **—** and became a barber.**
When he passed away in 1917, he was laid to rest in Kenton without a headstone. But every year, the American Legion would put a flag on his grave in recognition of his sacrifice and service to our nation.
**For more than a hundred years, the good people of Kenton carried on the tradition of placing flowers on Sgt. White's unmarked grave, the tradition passing from parents, to children, to grandchildren – because here in Michigan, _we don't forget_.**
We _remember_ the sacrifices and the suffering that preceded Emancipation for our Black compatriots.
We _honor_ those who put their lives on the line to protect our freedoms, and we teach our children to recognize the importance of service above self.
And more than a _hundred_ years later, the Houghton County Veterans Service Office was able to get Sgt. White a headstone — because **we don't forget.**
**When I see our member of Congress excuse people who wave the Confederate Flag in the U.S. Capitol, I know Rep. Jack Bergman has forgotten.**
**When I see his office ignoring calls from veterans who need help accessing services, I know Rep. Jack Bergman has forgotten.**
**When I see him politicizing our military and prioritizing culture wars over caring for our men and women in uniform, I know Rep. Jack Bergman has forgotten.**
Hiram White now has a headstone because concerned citizens stood up and demanded justice. They researched, they organized, and they pushed the VA to give the Sergeant the recognition he had earned more than 150 years prior.
This fall, we have the opportunity to demand justice in our own way — by electing a Representative who will _never_ forget what it means to be a Michigander.
[If that's something you can get behind, I hope you'll make a contribution to my campaign today and help me send Jack Bergman back to his home in Louisiana.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79635961/457072223/-1799055687?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20240224_fr_vets_cand_sm_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjOGI5ZmItMjlkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Vuts7apWyflsQpzkgH1G3bRAs-HRgZ2N8h5aBaoKvI=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

When I see him politicizing our military and prioritizing culture wars over caring for our men and women in uniform, I know Rep. Jack Bergman has forgotten. Hiram White now has a headstone because concerned citizens stood up and demanded justice. They researched, they organized, and they pushed the VA to give the Sergeant the recognition he had earned more than 150 years prior. This fall, we have the opportunity to demand justice in our own way — by electing a Representative who will never forget what it means to be a Michigander. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Tuebor, Callie Barr Candidate for Congress in Michigan's First District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: we'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our campaign is pacing a bit behind on our fundraising, Ilhan doesn't pick up the phone and call a few lobbyists or billionaires to cut a max-out check.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)

Hey team — we know it's the weekend, so we'll keep this one quick.
Today's the 24th, which means we're about 84% of the way to our February deadline.
In a perfect situation, 84% of the way through the month, we'd be about 84% of the way to our grassroots fundraising goals, too. Unfortunately, it doesn't always work like that. As of this morning, we're about two-thirds of the way there.
Is it the end of the world? No. We still have time to get back on track.
But it does mean we need to have a big day today — _especially_ online, where the vast majority of our grassroots support comes from.
If you could chip in a $3 contribution for Ilhan today, it'd go a long way toward getting where we need to be. So please — we're tracking everything at this link:**
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/February24](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb24.LBKb43&refcode=em240224-1-t3&t=2&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)**
When our campaign is pacing a bit behind on our fundraising, Ilhan doesn't pick up the phone and call a few lobbyists or billionaires to cut a max-out check.
That's because from the very beginning, this campaign has been built by _us_. Together. Thank you for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb24.LBKb43&refcode=em240224-1-t3&t=3&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=962_791427_8SYyYu&akid=962%2E791427%2E8SYyYu)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

The recent Alabama Supreme Court ruling is another horrifying attack on bodily autonomy and family planning. Because of this ruling, IVF clinics are shutting down across Alabama. Republican extremists have made their intentions clear:
* **First:** they went after access to abortion stacking the Supreme Court in their favor to overrule Roe v Wade.
* **Then:** they came for IVF.
* **Now:** they’re coming for birth control with arguments in the Supreme Court to start up next month.

Republican politicians have pretended that these attacks on bodily autonomy are “pro-family,” but the Alabama ruling further reveals that they were never truly “pro-family.” **I'm proud to be running as a truly pro-family candidate:** I'll always fight to expand access to health care that allows people to start families, secure paid leave, and provide affordable childcare for every child. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: No one’s ever told you this before.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
But I will.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~)
---

I may be the first Speaker of the House to ever say this to you.

**[Fixing America's problems is simple. And I mean DEAD simple.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Fixing America’s problems is simple. And I mean DEAD simple.")**

**[If you want a booming economy: lower taxes and get rid of regulations.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "If you want a booming economy: lower taxes and get rid of regulations.")**

_We did it during the Trump administration and it worked._

**[If you want a strong and secure border: simply enforce the laws on the books and finish building the wall.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "If you want a strong and secure border: simply enforce the laws on the books and finish building the wall.")**

_We did it during the Trump administration and it worked._

**[If you want peace: lead with strength, defend your allies, and keep your foes in line.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "If you want peace: lead with strength, defend your allies, and keep your foes in line.")**

_We did it during the Trump administration and it worked._

Friend, this year - Republicans have a chance to control the government with a Republican trifecta.

Joe Biden is miles behind in the polls.

We're poised to take over the Senate with ease.

_**[But none of that will mean a thing if we don't defend and grow our Republican Majority in the House.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "But none of that will mean a thing if we don’t defend and grow our Republican Majority in the House. ")**_

I need to ask you for help - which is not my favorite thing to do... but this isn't for me. This is for our country.**[Can you spare $10 today to help me lead House Republicans to victory in November?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Can you spare $10 today to help me lead House Republicans to victory in November?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN TO GROW THE MAJORITY](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~)
---

Friend, the nasty secret of Washington D.C. is that the more confusing everything seems and the more divided we are... the easier it is for self-interested politicians to line their pockets or force their agenda on America.

And at the end of the day, you and your children are the victims.

_[Fentanyl is flooding the streets of our cities and killing countless Americans.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Fentanyl is flooding the streets of our cities and killing countless Americans.")_

_**[Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it's not.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it’s not.")**_

_[Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every month.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants are crossing the border every month.")_

_**[Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it's not.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it’s not.")**_

_[Joe Biden's economy is making it harder to live a prosperous life. Americans are being forced to wait to buy houses, get married, have kids, and retire until much later in life.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "Joe Biden’s economy is making it harder to live a prosperous life. Americans are being forced to wait to buy houses, get married, have kids, and retire until much later in life.")_

Democrats want you to believe that the solution is complex. But it's not.

I took over as Speaker of the House on October 25th, and it's never been clearer to me that we CAN save our country as long as we hold fast to basic commonsense principles.

Friend, here's another simple truth: We don't get to make the rules - no matter how simple - if we don't win elections.

**[That's why I'm asking for your help to score a massive victory in 2024. Friend, we truly can't do this without you. This is an all-hands effort.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~ "That’s why I’m asking for your help to score a massive victory in 2024. Friend, we truly can’t do this without you. This is an all-hands effort.")**

I'm not crying wolf and I'm not exaggerating when I say this: This November is a make or break election.

Thank you in advance for your support!

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Gr2y7D00MzwQvxjlQYU0UQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnvJ0-~)
---
Speaker Mike Johnson

body:
$5, Team. That’s what I’m asking you to contribute to my re-election campaign to defend Pennsylvania’s critical seat and stop the GOP from taking the Senate. $5 might not seem like much, but when everyone chips in, we can build a winning campaign in a critical Senate battleground. $5 today is what we need to go up against our mega-millionaire Republican opponent and a dark money GOP PAC supporting him that has already amassed a record-breaking amount — over $18 million — to spend against us. [_**We need a lot of supporters chipping in to fight back. Please, friend, will you split $5 or more between my campaign and John Hickenlooper’s? I need your help to build the strongest possible defense to keep Pennsylvania blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79637643/457077612/-1953481705?refcode=email_022424_Hickenlooper-casey-split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2I0MDZhNi0yYmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7RHlzFvLPC1-9OK0-rgfJVGUMmsfZ37JQC7cWPfWlMU=) Pennsylvania is going to be key in Democrats’ fight to defend our razor-thin Senate majority and the White House in 2024.
