name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH)
Peter, I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania.
My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced raising nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount.
On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat.
When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race.
[**Pennsylvania could decide our Senate majority. Can you give $5, $10, or $15 to help our campaign fight back against the millions that are going to come my way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240224-1&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240224-1-el&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240224-1-el&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240224-1-el&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240224-1-el&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240224-1-el&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240224-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240224-1&refcode2=2097_552475_KIQxAH&akid=2097%2E552475%2EKIQxAH)

With gratitude,
Bob Casey

clean_body: Peter, I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania. My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced raising nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount. On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat. When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. Please pitch in today if you can. Thank you. With gratitude, Bob Casey

Fellow American,

This is our LAST CHANCE to fix this country.

As we inch closer to the election, everyone must do their part. That all starts with holding onto the progress we've already made. WE MUST HOLD THE HOUSE IN 2024

To do that, I desperately need your help. The Democrats have marked me as one of their top targets in the upcoming election. They've always been after me, but this year is different. With the fate of the country on the line, the Left is going to mobilize an almost INFINITE pool of resources. **[I need your help to fight back...](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=98a6b2172a2446b2832e4885eab5703f&_e=JmRUmXsBjdVHUJozbcnm7AaXFUL4WeaB3rVYmPUmq_fSM1POF89L_RqESJpOtuU0DhTZx5LS383zp5csoraK57QyHr1zzBljxwrSKZdKGxoX1gSuMIrHFRgS4266QpkmAA9i8KTmgrL6t8wiJwX0nsUGrV_c4BkdGo8h9dRIy1bhkRgYD6j_hAQadfhymUnIxGjfSzjlx-3GkMiB8r7gDZ4KJkKkpcjPex56kNKfRRYOADHSAl16P6WgDTg2eWUMvn9J1yR2ia0vD4xamP05qHDwGgVDjaWVxHetrzdmGwjdZIuVquS-A7kwPXXphlTi4_22nPf0ytNtR_vVDQAfkqznwbo-YgZGhs6Vg3anzB24dHUmZ_DnWq_1Bw86yyOhE8AQ6d-1bnVJW4wOdaf4drmCFuuEqP8uPV4IHRJeHLA%3D)**

Grassroots donations have always been the backbone of my campaign.

In 2020, when I won my election despite almost ALL of the polling saying I'd lose, the people of Iowa stood up and let their voices be heard. We let the country know that Iowa isn't done fighting yet. Thanks to every dollar and penny donated to this campaign, we got the job DONE and stayed competitive with our opponents.

In 2022, we pulled it off again. Thanks to EVERYONE who supported my campaign, we widened the margins and won a HUGE victory. Helping the GOP FINALLY take control of the House of Representatives.

**NONE OF THIS would have been possible without the grassroots support of Iowans and Americans hoping for change.**

name: Gloria Johnson
subject: February thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
Just checking in with you this month

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639287/457081643/-849459103?refcode=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYxYWRjMy0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtIQ2przOm0ISidv-h02SrHz2Ptg1X0lC1SSPEsllDU=&emci=c1997040-66d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)
---
Hi y’all, I hope you’re doing well! It’s been a busy month on the campaign trail (really, it’s been non-stop since we launched our campaign in September), and I wanted to tell you about it. ⬇️
* * *
HONORING BLACK HISTORY MONTH I’ve been reflecting this month on the legacy and contributions of Black Americans here in Tennessee and across the country. From the earliest days of our nation, Black folks built America — unrecognized, uncompensated, and involuntarily. The legacy of slavery is not something we can ever erase from this country. It’s a history that our children need to be taught, right alongside the story of the ongoing fight for Civil Rights and racial equality and the groundbreaking achievements Black Americans continue to make. We need to lift up stories of Black excellence during Black History Month and beyond. AT WORK IN NASHVILLE I’ve introduced a couple of new bills during this legislative session that I want to make sure you hear about. The first raises Tennessee’s minimum wage to $20 per hour — an increase of more than $10 from the federal minimum wage (which hasn’t been raised in about 15 years!). A living wage is a human right. So is bodily autonomy — but it’s denied to women and girls here in TN and in Republican-controlled states across the country. We’ve seen the devastation and horror caused by abortion bans, including stories of a girl as young as ten having to travel outside her home state of Ohio to receive abortion care. Right now, there is no exception for minors in Tennessee’s abortion ban. I’ve introduced a bill that allows abortion exemptions for children under the age of 13. It’s not enough, but it’s a start. Unfortunately, every single Republican in the TN House voted _against_ my bill — and in favor of requiring little girls to carry their rapists’ babies. **There is no future for the protection of reproductive rights in America without federal legislation codifying abortion access. As your next Senator, I’ll work hard to restore abortion access in TN and across the country.** ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL & IN THE COMMUNITY While I’ve been hard at work in Nashville, I’ve still been able to get out and about to meet with Tennesseans! I’m so grateful for the support from folks here in TN and across the country — and our work is just getting started. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639288/457081644/209297649?refcode=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYxYWRjMy0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtIQ2przOm0ISidv-h02SrHz2Ptg1X0lC1SSPEsllDU=)
_It’s official! Gloria picking up her U.S. Senate petition in Nashville._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639289/457081645/209297649?refcode=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.2ff1adc3-2dd3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmYxYWRjMy0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GtIQ2przOm0ISidv-h02SrHz2Ptg1X0lC1SSPEsllDU=)

clean_body: Just checking in with you this month | Hi y’all, I hope you’re doing well! It’s been a busy month on the campaign trail (really, it’s been non-stop since we launched our campaign in September), and I wanted to tell you about it. ⬇️ HONORING BLACK HISTORY MONTH I’ve been reflecting this month on the legacy and contributions of Black Americans here in Tennessee and across the country. From the earliest days of our nation, Black folks built America — unrecognized, uncompensated, and involuntarily. The legacy of slavery is not something we can ever erase from this country. It’s a history that our children need to be taught, right alongside the story of the ongoing fight for Civil Rights and racial equality and the groundbreaking achievements Black Americans continue to make. We need to lift up stories of Black excellence during Black History Month and beyond. AT WORK IN NASHVILLE I’ve introduced a couple of new bills during this legislative session that I want to make sure you hear about. The first raises Tennessee’s minimum wage to $20 per hour — an increase of more than $10 from the federal minimum wage (which hasn’t been raised in about 15 years!). A living wage is a human right. So is bodily autonomy — but it’s denied to women and girls here in TN and in Republican-controlled states across the country. We’ve seen the devastation and horror caused by abortion bans, including stories of a girl as young as ten having to travel outside her home state of Ohio to receive abortion care. Right now, there is no exception for minors in Tennessee’s abortion ban. I’ve introduced a bill that allows abortion exemptions for children under the age of 13. It’s not enough, but it’s a start. Unfortunately, every single Republican in the TN House voted against my bill — and in favor of requiring little girls to carry their rapists’ babies. There is no future for the protection of reproductive rights in America without federal legislation codifying abortion access. As your next Senator, I’ll work hard to restore abortion access in TN and across the country. ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL & IN THE COMMUNITY While I’ve been hard at work in Nashville, I’ve still been able to get out and about to meet with Tennesseans! I’m so grateful for the support from folks here in TN and across the country — and our work is just getting started. = It’s official! Gloria picking up her U.S. Senate petition in Nashville. = Gloria after the service at Collins Chapel CME Church in Memphis. = Gloria at the Loudon County Dems 2024 Kickoff meeting. | = | = ---|--- Gloria and supporters at the Chili Cook-Off in Wilson County! = Gloria speaking with supporters at a fundraiser in Dickson. SPEAKING OUT ONLINE = = = = = That’s what I’ve been up to in February, y’all! It’s important to me to keep you up to date on news from the campaign trail and beyond, so you’ll see more news from me in the coming months. If you want the latest news in real-time, be sure to follow me on social media: All my best, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Turning out voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, Michigan’s Presidential Primary is just three days away, and we want to encourage _everyone_ in Michigan to make a plan to vote. There’s a ton at stake, and _all of us_ have the opportunity to have a say in the kind of country we’d like to live in over the next four years. **Our team will be working hard to turn out voters over the next few days. We’ll talk more about this soon —[but before we do, would you please make a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC so that we’re as prepared as possible to support President Biden and Vice President Harris?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639361/457081792/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240224_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMzZjM1ZTItMmRkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nhPnQzi1AFXbtL6EPnSvLigI0X4HCqyMvD9YXlnqa7U=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639362/457081806/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240224_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDMzZjM1ZTItMmRkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nhPnQzi1AFXbtL6EPnSvLigI0X4HCqyMvD9YXlnqa7U=)
---
From fighting to enact Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s vision for Michigan here at home to supporting candidates committed to defending our fundamental rights across the country, we do quite a lot here at Fight Like Hell PAC.
One of our top priorities is ensuring that President Biden and Vice President Harris have everything they need to win reelection and build on their progress over the last four years.
**How? By speaking to voters about what’s at stake and providing them with the resources they need to cast their ballots and make their voices heard.**
But unfortunately, that takes time, and when we’re up against hundreds of millions of dollars that Republicans are planning to spend to defeat us to try and take our country backward, it can get very expensive. But we’ve got something they don’t, and that’s people power, which is why we rely on this grassroots team so much to fuel our work.
Voter turnout is key, and we’re going to be using these final few days before the primary to make sure that our operation is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible.

clean_body: | Team, Michigan’s Presidential Primary is just three days away, and we want to encourage everyone in Michigan to make a plan to vote. There’s a ton at stake, and all of us have the opportunity to have a say in the kind of country we’d like to live in over the next four years. Our team will be working hard to turn out voters over the next few days. We’ll talk more about this soon —= | = From fighting to enact Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s vision for Michigan here at home to supporting candidates committed to defending our fundamental rights across the country, we do quite a lot here at Fight Like Hell PAC. One of our top priorities is ensuring that President Biden and Vice President Harris have everything they need to win reelection and build on their progress over the last four years. How? By speaking to voters about what’s at stake and providing them with the resources they need to cast their ballots and make their voices heard. But unfortunately, that takes time, and when we’re up against hundreds of millions of dollars that Republicans are planning to spend to defeat us to try and take our country backward, it can get very expensive. But we’ve got something they don’t, and that’s people power, which is why we rely on this grassroots team so much to fuel our work. Voter turnout is key, and we’re going to be using these final few days before the primary to make sure that our operation is running as smoothly and efficiently as possible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for powering our voter turnout efforts. — Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

| | [**Before**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639448/457082069/-1364313926?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240224_f_ttvappealnor_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmMzVlMi0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njccoTB85w6TSR-XcnheEsVSoOT_YY_dJ_J7JtW5fa0=)[** we ask if you can make a quick gift to help protect the freedom to vote, we have some news to share:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639449/457082070/-1364313926?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240224_f_ttvappealnor_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmMzVlMi0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njccoTB85w6TSR-XcnheEsVSoOT_YY_dJ_J7JtW5fa0=) **We just filed an appeal in our lawsuit against True the Vote (TTV) for threatening the voting rights of hundreds of thousands of Georgians.** Here’s what you need to know: In 2021, Texas-based right-wing group TTV challenged the eligibility of more than 250,000 voters in Georgia's 2021 Senate runoff elections. We took them to court — and despite concluding that the group’s methods “utterly lacked reliability” and “verge[d] on recklessness,” the Court ruled that TTV did not violate the Voting Rights Act. **That’s not the end of the story though.** Fair Fight is appealing this decision to prevent TTV from carrying out a voter suppression playbook and serving as a model for election conspiracists nationwide. At the same time, we’re working to address ongoing attempts at voter suppression and intimidation. And given the very real threat of mass challenges this year and beyond, this work is more important than ever. **We'll keep pushing back against mass challenges and protecting the freedom to vote — but we can’t do it without grassroots support.** [**Can you make a donation of $10 or any amount to help defend free and fair elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639450/457082098/-1128031810?amount=10&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240224_f_ttvappealnor_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmMzVlMi0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njccoTB85w6TSR-XcnheEsVSoOT_YY_dJ_J7JtW5fa0=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639451/457082099/-1128031810?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240224_f_ttvappealnor_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmMzVlMi0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njccoTB85w6TSR-XcnheEsVSoOT_YY_dJ_J7JtW5fa0=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79639452/457082100/-1128031810?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240224_f_ttvappealnor_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTNmMzVlMi0yZGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=njccoTB85w6TSR-XcnheEsVSoOT_YY_dJ_J7JtW5fa0=)

clean_body: We'll keep pushing back against mass challenges and protecting the freedom to vote — but we can’t do it without grassroots support. | | | = We just filed an appeal in our lawsuit against True the Vote (TTV) for threatening the voting rights of hundreds of thousands of Georgians. Here’s what you need to know: In 2021, Texas-based right-wing group TTV challenged the eligibility of more than 250,000 voters in Georgia's 2021 Senate runoff elections. We took them to court — and despite concluding that the group’s methods “utterly lacked reliability” and “verge[d] on recklessness,” the Court ruled that TTV did not violate the Voting Rights Act. That’s not the end of the story though. Fair Fight is appealing this decision to prevent TTV from carrying out a voter suppression playbook and serving as a model for election conspiracists nationwide. At the same time, we’re working to address ongoing attempts at voter suppression and intimidation. And given the very real threat of mass challenges this year and beyond, this work is more important than ever. We'll keep pushing back against mass challenges and protecting the freedom to vote — but we can’t do it without grassroots support. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thanks for everything you do, The Fair Fight Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. # Session Update: Celebrating the little wins in cross-over
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.ZdLh3g1y0LXLrqOKd2_dwzt5DLdt1TXh6TeB4Lj0ZyA/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
---
Short sessions like this one move so quickly, yet the legislative process as a whole is slow, and can often be discouraging. With that, legislators must celebrate the victories we can. This week I'm celebrating our victories -- some small in the grand scheme, yet building towards an ever-better future for Hoosiers.
|
##
* * *
## [HB 1199 amended and passed](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvZG93bnRvd24tZWNvbm9taWMtZW5oYW5jZW1lbnQtZGlzdHJpY3QtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC13aXRoLWFtZW5kbWVudC1mb3ItYXBhcnRtZW50cyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.P3L8vIdQGlg0t4bhrQghtj3DaNHBcbD8W0EVkIWqF30/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
| [](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvZG93bnRvd24tZWNvbm9taWMtZW5oYW5jZW1lbnQtZGlzdHJpY3QtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC13aXRoLWFtZW5kbWVudC1mb3ItYXBhcnRtZW50cyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.BKh9DgCnBzwcHruQsJGND_aDPlDtxigLeahuJoXOyZ8/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
---
Until 9am on Tuesday I was a no vote for HB 1199, which would have eradicated Indy's Mile Square Economic Enhancement District. That all changed when we were able to successfully amend the bill in committee. While not perfect, the amended bill will allow our new Economic Enhancement District (EED) to continue for years to come, funding downtown health & safety programs including low-barrier housing for our neighbors struggling with homelessness. I am so proud of the support that District 46 residents & businesses showed to save the EED -- we did it!

I'll be working hard to get this bipartisan agreement over the finish line for Indy, the beating heart of our great state.
* * *
---
## [SB 52 heard in House Roads and Transportation committee](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvYmlsbC1lZmZlY3RpdmVseS1raWxsaW5nLWluZGlhbmFwb2xpcy1ibHVlLWxpbmUtZ2V0cy1oZWFyaW5nLWluLWhvdXNlLWNvbW1pdHRlZSIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.k-fHGvfnJ4Vdb7aBXj9tnR_VY-qtGr5MeN2V52pZmDU/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LndmeWkub3JnL25ld3MvYXJ0aWNsZXMvYmlsbC1lZmZlY3RpdmVseS1raWxsaW5nLWluZGlhbmFwb2xpcy1ibHVlLWxpbmUtZ2V0cy1oZWFyaW5nLWluLWhvdXNlLWNvbW1pdHRlZSIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.6ccqsvixdjo1vSCvU6HxlrEedqKOjAyMDupJhw0FEwQ/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
---
I was overjoyed to see so many brave Hoosiers, including many District 46 neighbors, speak in opposition to SB 52 in its first House hearing. You gave the House Roads and Transportation Committee them hours of passionate testimony to consider before they vote on whether to move SB 52 to the floor next week. I remain optimistic that my colleagues in the House will hear our voices and shut down this attempt to stop Indy's progress in public transit.
## [All Star Weekend: Despite the snow, a Slam Dunk for Indy](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTEsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmluZHlzdGFyLmNvbS9zdG9yeS9uZXdzL2xvY2FsLzIwMjQvMDIvMTgvMjAyNC1uYmEtYWxsLXN0YXItd2Vla2VuZC1pbmRpYW5hcG9saXMtaW5kaWFuYS1waG90by10aW1lbGluZS83MjY1Mjg2ODAwNy8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjI0LjkwNzU5MzYxIn0.6EVHEFWyd3P4FMMtqVldGJBBfa1QAGBK8Ne8wpZhVaI/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LmluZHlzdGFyLmNvbS9zdG9yeS9uZXdzL2xvY2FsLzIwMjQvMDIvMTgvMjAyNC1uYmEtYWxsLXN0YXItd2Vla2VuZC1pbmRpYW5hcG9saXMtaW5kaWFuYS1waG90by10aW1lbGluZS83MjY1Mjg2ODAwNy8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjI0LjkwNzU5MzYxIn0.yh4q5ogUZYaUZnuH8YGoQbFJLyknO6Br2XZFXuGkY3U/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
All Star weekend was a massive success. Congratulations to the All Star steering committee, volunteers, Pacers Sports and Entertainment, Sports Corp, GANGGANG, Visit Indy, Downtown Indy, Inc and the many other organizations who worked to ensure that locals and visitors had a great time. From the first-of-its-kind Tip-Off to the Sabrina vs Stephen 3-point contest and the artwork and music highlighted throughout the city, there was truly something for everyone. The All Stars weren't the only ones shining bright this weekend!
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTMsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMDcvc2VuYXRlLWVkdWNhdGlvbi1iaWxscy1vbi1odW1hbi1zZXh1YWxpdHktY3Vyc2l2ZS1tb3ZlLXRvLWhvdXNlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.0nJnjMjVFnXJH6SuxMKxq6v90yGJXZpYeW3Q5Pn9JAk/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)[Elections bill receives high spirited opposition in committee](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTQsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMTMvY29udHJvdmVyc2lhbC1lbGVjdGlvbnMtc2VjdXJpdHktYmlsbC1jb3VsZC1zZWUtY2hhbmdlcy8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjI0LjkwNzU5MzYxIn0.a9BfHdzdhBVHqntvniXXnIsSZodnpmIyjFl5apaHjkY/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
HB 1264 threatens to purge eligible Hoosier voters from the rolls by cross-checking registrations with often inaccurate commercially available information like that found on a credit report. This means that small differences in spelling & abbreviation could keep you from voting. We can't be afraid to keep saying it: it is our duty to expand access to the ballot, not to disenfranchise the people.
[Series of bills passed in the General Assembly](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTUsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMjEvYmlsbHMtb24tYW1idWxhbmNlLWluc3VyYW5jZS1hbGNvaG9sLWFuZC1ib2JjYXQtaHVudGluZy1oZWFkLXRvLWdvdmVybm9ycy1kZXNrLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMjQuOTA3NTkzNjEifQ.DXq53C2iPBgJcGGm6zeQTMMHWlvV7371xqHkzXA6iFE/s/2950175210/br/237684210250-l)
Read more about the big bills affecting our state in this summary of this week's Session from Indiana Capital Chronicle.

clean_body: | | | | | "Twitter" "Twitter" "Facebook"mailto:s46@iga.in.gov "Email" "Visit Me Online" | Session Update: Celebrating the little wins in cross-over Short sessions like this one move so quickly, yet the legislative process as a whole is slow, and can often be discouraging. With that, legislators must celebrate the victories we can. This week I'm celebrating our victories -- some small in the grand scheme, yet building towards an ever-better future for Hoosiers. | | Until 9am on Tuesday I was a no vote for HB 1199, which would have eradicated Indy's Mile Square Economic Enhancement District. That all changed when we were able to successfully amend the bill in committee. While not perfect, the amended bill will allow our new Economic Enhancement District (EED) to continue for years to come, funding downtown health & safety programs including low-barrier housing for our neighbors struggling with homelessness. I am so proud of the support that District 46 residents & businesses showed to save the EED -- we did it! I'll be working hard to get this bipartisan agreement over the finish line for Indy, the beating heart of our great state. I was overjoyed to see so many brave Hoosiers, including many District 46 neighbors, speak in opposition to SB 52 in its first House hearing. You gave the House Roads and Transportation Committee them hours of passionate testimony to consider before they vote on whether to move SB 52 to the floor next week. I remain optimistic that my colleagues in the House will hear our voices and shut down this attempt to stop Indy's progress in public transit. All Star weekend was a massive success. Congratulations to the All Star steering committee, volunteers, Pacers Sports and Entertainment, Sports Corp, GANGGANG, Visit Indy, Downtown Indy, Inc and the many other organizations who worked to ensure that locals and visitors had a great time. From the first-of-its-kind Tip-Off to the Sabrina vs Stephen 3-point contest and the artwork and music highlighted throughout the city, there was truly something for everyone. The All Stars weren't the only ones shining bright this weekend! STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE HB 1264 threatens to purge eligible Hoosier voters from the rolls by cross-checking registrations with often inaccurate commercially available information like that found on a credit report. This means that small differences in spelling & abbreviation could keep you from voting. We can't be afraid to keep saying it: it is our duty to expand access to the ballot, not to disenfranchise the people. Read more about the big bills affecting our state in this summary of this week's Session from Indiana Capital Chronicle. | COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my state government resource guide, "Hunley Community Resource Guide". | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications Office Shenetha.Shepherd@iga.in.gov Kyle.Casteel@iga.in.gov Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- SUBSCRIBER SERVICES: | | |

| Friend -

Last time the Democrats were in power, they fast-tracked an election-rigging scheme that would have irreparably undermined the security of our elections. They wanted to use _your_ tax dollars to fund _their_ campaigns, make it harder for Republicans to win competitive races, and gut voter ID laws.

And if the Democrats win the next election, we know they will try it again.

We're racing against the clock to protect the integrity of the most important election of our lifetimes. name: Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy
subject: I'm asking you for just $1. Let me tell you why
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
If Democrats didn't invest another penny into Montana, which I assure you won't be the case, the amount of money they've already invested would be akin to spending roughly more than $166,000 against me PER DAY. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=f154223b5e554a5386384ce6089ee221&_t=O-B-Qz4i5Z1B2RYcLQ54jvJUCzinZSP6H9yuCDDwruXSRu5ODMzwrJ2y0t8kacxwMmto-KzLalc6pfVrbvnsBVBEUZ08iDLaCNcyb4LVkxc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_s=f154223b5e554a5386384ce6089ee221&_t=O-B-Qz4i5Z1B2RYcLQ54jvJUCzinZSP6H9yuCDDwruXSRu5ODMzwrJ2y0t8kacxwMmto-KzLalc6pfVrbvnsBVBEUZ08iDLaCNcyb4LVkxc%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f154223b5e554a5386384ce6089ee221&_e=ZqkA7mFmGYjSoNHrpvc-OuVnuWo65mjlwnidnPd1cDfOVq2LAjPVOEGZxOgUOd3RGcZVN2NCxeEbk_6zV684SW6edII3r9ZG_NsXruCXL4eY7bvp0KgSPetfNctSLz4HEkW6vpeMNIZNf331nEoWjFBTPeBtdCtx2sZo-xqF2wpQc4x5d50e529vAgv5oOgbsU6T2tpUlhikAkC1CaInkKSe4mMLKqcKLHkVYbL-YVzlKhEhTOLg2Tpm8SVyP4PDOV1LAbn6s8Q9wFkHk18c_ZFWdF0qbtN9rZjUh4qwIMspv16aPkvWbC6qQVx8h1UemmuRrC9vFPWot7TOkd5U0FSKZ4ohfnmYeZ9KENnK3vOW-lkUkwIfkYCEvtqHiDFY3qzvu07YESlZVzO2sx5WUA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, do elections still matter to you?

I’m sorry to ask you such a charged question, but **my messages don’t appear to be cutting through the noise of every other political campaign reaching out to you for help.**

**I’ll be blunt:** Senate campaigns like mine are the only campaigns worth donating to. Aside from President Trump, everyone else asking you for money is trying to pad campaign accounts for campaigns won or lost long ago.

**FOR INSTANCE:** Democrats have committed _**$56M to Montana to buy my opponent another six-year term in Washington.**_ Despite polls showing that I am the only Republican who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat for America, **we’re losing the campaign cash race ... BAD.**

On February 9th, President Trump endorsed our campaign, and despite reaching out to thousands of donors whose phone numbers and emails I have, **we raised just $394.**

We MUST do better. This race TRULY MATTERS. **[Donation link.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f154223b5e554a5386384ce6089ee221&_e=ZqkA7mFmGYjSoNHrpvc-OuVnuWo65mjlwnidnPd1cDfOVq2LAjPVOEGZxOgUOd3RGcZVN2NCxeEbk_6zV684SW6edII3r9ZG_NsXruCXL4eY7bvp0KgSPetfNctSLz4HEkW6vpeMNIZNf331nEoWjFBTPeBtdCtx2sZo-xqF2wpQc4x5d50e529vAgv5oOgbsU6T2tpUlhikAkC1CaInkKSe4mMLKqcKLHkVYbL-YVzlKhEhTOLg2Tpm8SVyP4PDt1-KrmFmp0NxBBiaZs7h1XK9KeDfyo5Przm57upZ4OlJr6UK5eGVpvPAkGzymwcaT20vOfWaDJ2Grr6W5XUz7Z66deW6zsXRl_1cn0KkEFFhBFm2YqQVWqbvlK_mFePr4p6mhZyzVoYmZDHVSXdrGQ%3D%3D)**

Fellow Conservative, unless we do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, we may never win back this Senate seat again. **Our situation is DIRE.**

**[Just $1 from 1,000 donors will help keep this campaign running for another day](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=f154223b5e554a5386384ce6089ee221&_e=ZqkA7mFmGYjSoNHrpvc-OuVnuWo65mjlwnidnPd1cDfOVq2LAjPVOEGZxOgUOd3RGcZVN2NCxeEbk_6zV684SW6edII3r9ZG_NsXruCXL4eY7bvp0KgSPetfNctSLz4HEkW6vpeMNIZNf331nEoWjFBTPeBtdCtx2sZo-xqF2wpQc4x5d50e529vAgv5oOgbsU6T2tpUlhikAkC1CaInkKSe4mMLKqcKLHkVYbL-YVzlKhEhTOLg2Tpm8SVyP4PDGgz9q_nGoz6CWgk0wmo1lGNWXyl6i3xl0TuQ7yNX_fV0Yzv0bQ9ehK6WLaA-khD16xXtZBFI8C7YK9tp9Yw9DPiuHSoOfjWwkowOHb_j0OgW2cFp2o81_mUe54-cZ5xg7QMl5XIq9T12PDy-1FL3RA%3D%3D)** , so if you are willing to join me on this mission, will you chip in just $1 before the end of the day?

name: Team Kunce HQ
subject: Josh Hawley’s former mentor isn't holding back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Missouri's three-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth: 'No, I don't' want to see Hawley win re-election
#
Peter — you won’t believe the latest quote from Josh Hawley’s former mentor:
**"I think what [Hawley]'s done is just _unforgivable_ as far as being the U.S. Senator is concerned... I said at the time that supporting him was the biggest mistake I have ever made in my life. And I still believe that."**
— Jack Danforth, Missouri’s three-term GOP U.S. Senator
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)
This isn’t the first time that Danforth has condemned Hawley’s actions on January 6th. **But let’s start at the beginning:**
**FIRST —** In 2018, former Missouri Senator Jack Danforth recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary to help him win the seat.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his re-election campaign — and recent reports from _Morning Consult_ found Hawley’s approvals plummeting among Missouri voters.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: We can’t afford another six years of Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)**
Now here’s why we urgently need your help, Peter:
Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to keep exposing Hawley as a fraud and a coward — and allows us to reach voters with Lucas’ election-winning message every day between now and November 5.
That’s what it’ll take to win this race. **So now we’re asking you:**
**[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can get Lucas’ message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for embarrassing our state and betraying our country? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so your support today really will make a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43954?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43953?refcode=em20240224-4906&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4906%2E614464%2EvU15zg)

subject: What's next?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlflow.com/link/c/YT0yNDIxOTMyOTIxMzQzNDQ5MTAzJmM9aDdvMCZlPTAmYj0xMTI2Mzg3ODQ5JmQ9dTBrOGs3eQ==.ehdcifRZtEtfy9gpmsedSr8e4kRgiXiTr7PVyxoz2IE)
| | |

| Peter,

There were not many positive things that came out of the COVID lockdowns. One of the few bright spots, though, was the growth of the vaccine choice movement! Thousands of Texans had their eyes opened to the slippery slope of the government and employers making medical decisions for individuals. **You are the best person to make these decisions for yourself!**

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| There might be any number of reasons you don’t want a vaccine for yourself or your kids - whether it’s a "scheduled” one like chickenpox or the new COVID one. At TFVC, we want YOU to be able to make that choice. Furthermore, you have a **right** to privacy about your own medical decisions. Since 2015, TFVC has worked with Texans to ensure we protect these rights. Through work at the Texas capitol, informative events all over the state, and education about political candidates, this movement is continuing to grow! In the coming months, we have plans for **more** events, **more** vaccine choice legislation, and **more** medical privacy for Texans. Together we can ensure medical privacy and vaccine choice are rights for generations of Texans still to come!

---
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| Fighting with You,
---
| Rebecca Hardy
---
---
President

| | | Peter, it’s Sarah, Finance Director for Rick Scott.

I’ve done some math, and here’s where we are - **we’re five days away from our end-of-month deadline, and we’re not on track to reach our goal.**

I know it’s worrying, but there’s also some good news. **[**If every conservative receiving this email pitches in $15 RIGHT NOW, we will meet this crucial campaign deadline.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e5bd4cc70ad34746aa4f116f0eb58b87&_e=BqwXQhiqYao0rSWP020gAEZoB0n5BtUC7UqR8TNMq1rfP9Z0xkOp7PWY9ZZRdfJUj8t7_vNb5KgKQJDxxn4NKHPhpJouFtR6PMAy7KNakkQzq-eWxobZx3OOUaYXmH0FiPqv381xCc1_ZPXXqESmeck9frXADTums7Zu22amK7AAebR0S6_lw5IUIrhB52geuEpmFdequLn-ZZcxKnPu8L701xrWW-2CErJIJg3r--eSKmtScGaP0o_wGaHVWc1bhj6IIlDquXOcrqknBnFU_xMZIXGC2H7_QPkUmcyejuLwbmne7hALIY1kWPReCB64K_SN2uJTjiIp6EoyJhTrpb2_rADP5UrLaYg_-RVcrXE%3D)**

Peter, I know you know this, but EVERYTHING is on the line.

When we re-elect President Trump, we **MUST** have a Republican Senate Majority to pass his America First agenda.

why I fight

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c07b47ac09d146a496289871917285f9&_e=S0Ud0py1m8TOZjjuNWwpmPnIuc1wT3bwKd6cv1oEnmJ7hdyNEJz5IxhhWwCESBGM5rY_diettaSwa5VPNGKwYAnOVAfA6v9ulGwDnclZYPR6Npe4QfjMcDE1Vq8OxSeWjChG42l2i3NXnrLt14Z6sDAxDDw91op_8ggdoJ2EQmX79-vbtJFAPtH33S9tLs7gwdnFy-xhRglUMzOCoALOj2eph3_9-KmdlvsqlaAgu_2Kqd1SpCWshIidFrVB4QPBCGhk3R-w--P2Ppq5vL-EaRVUoVHNTNX16ICOoMC-fZLmLZ-yG_nzsNJ-zXlXSSdC)

_I 'm no stranger to a bit of hard work, Peter._

Growing up, I had to work my tail off to have a decent shot at any sort of career. I juggled my home life with my studies. Oftentimes, trouble at home got in the way of my dreams. After joining the Marines, I quickly learned that every man has to do his part.

I've kept that mentality moving through my various battles in Washington. I realized quickly that if I didn't stand up for my constituents and my values, and fight for what is right, I can't expect anyone else to do it for me. That's why I've been working so hard. Fighting for small-town American ideals, protecting Ohioans every single day, is a fulltime job. If I don't then no one will.

**[Can I count on your support to help me fight for common sense Conservative values in Washington?](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c07b47ac09d146a496289871917285f9&_e=S0Ud0py1m8TOZjjuNWwpmPnIuc1wT3bwKd6cv1oEnmJ7hdyNEJz5IxhhWwCESBGM5rY_diettaSwa5VPNGKwYAnOVAfA6v9ulGwDnclZYPR6Npe4QfjMcDE1Vq8OxSeWg6Ffdz0rI1XA2VB_0r0bYOAq951urH9sPFVGQdg2irQWkek7d2wjpqiMbJ3ReEVeqdtrAIuH-8yhi_A8y5aTrqoh_px7jXoV9VKWoX8lL_pawOFfLwsd9E8PNdipTN8cNE3S3U1TxdAuXeiR43bIdWvTjWUV--VEarRzIFxFPCwBys3wo9RxS_QP_Q9ZMrqA)**

---

**[I really need to make every single fundraising goal if we want a shot at defending GOP values in this upcoming election.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c07b47ac09d146a496289871917285f9&_e=S0Ud0py1m8TOZjjuNWwpmPnIuc1wT3bwKd6cv1oEnmJ7hdyNEJz5IxhhWwCESBGM5rY_diettaSwa5VPNGKwYAnOVAfA6v9ulGwDnclZYPR6Npe4QfjMcDE1Vq8OxSeWg6Ffdz0rI1XA2VB_0r0bYIaXrhbpTfz2dEc76fXSy2ZY1l9UcmXjymdhh2MdyEE5qtf_r0gFOnD0sJIwaUFfQ8EU57wjcK_8a3lTesQOtEe54j4ytatG2-CBSVTcp6eCxSdCjzpYGZDXRq-XE_lcdro4EedgQZ9ZwhoHiRUbDhPBxYi7Uj7tAkIue5NNQc7j)** It used to be every man against the Establishment and Democrats, but not when you're in my corner.

[**JOIN JD VANCE**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c07b47ac09d146a496289871917285f9&_e=S0Ud0py1m8TOZjjuNWwpmPnIuc1wT3bwKd6cv1oEnmJ7hdyNEJz5IxhhWwCESBGM5rY_diettaSwa5VPNGKwYAnOVAfA6v9ulGwDnclZYPR6Npe4QfjMcDE1Vq8OxSeWjChG42l2i3NXnrLt14Z6sBzWwLnxhp31ZgzEPlzIivoEtDpVzE3d5vJOnn0LaKhpFflj_czwsXJq_VjVv7TZu_lMA5HXAmFOko2-Mw5NBlpVjh8lflGdi-gAOD0tkKHWQLCD2krBjCtNFccfgVI-5qIIp8s-kHTiV_4RK3u8kvRKxnjN3Kkz0lhzwgZOz8Ex)

_Thanks so much for standing by me._

JD Vance

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.

clean_body: Republicans are working to flip Democrat-held chambers in three of our top-priority states – Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. Our margins in these chambers are ultra-thin. | | | | | ---|--- Republicans are working to flip Democrat-held chambers in three of our top-priority states – Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. Our margins in these chambers are ultra-thin – and the GOP has a bottomless war chest funded by MAGA millionaires, election deniers, and extremists at their disposal. If state Democrats don’t have the resources we need to compete against Republicans’ far-right coalition,they could flip these chambers red. We can’t let that happen. So we’re relying on the most dedicated members of our team to step up for the first time and help protect our majorities against the GOP’s power-grab, secure gains in key chambers, and stop extreme Republicans from doing more damage to our democracy. The moment to join our team and elect state Democrats is now. Peter,

**These establishment clowns on the Left still manage to surprise me every day.**

Loser Liz Cheney came out from wherever she's been hiding since losing her primary and **claimed I wouldn 't accept the Mainstream Media's narrative about the sham investigations into President Trump.**

**That 's right - Trump derangement syndrome is back, even for loser Liz Cheney.**

As a reminder - she lost her last primary in April 2022 when HER voters saw the truth - that **SHE** was unfit to serve! If Loser Liz had been doing anything worthwhile, her voters would have sent her back to Washington. Instead, she's sitting on her couch at home.

| [**REMIND LIZ CHENEY SHE LOST!**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c4c2a2fd3de240f28f60f67387e5c2fc&_e=uWdxOuDtJOzv76gkVUueZ1_umwVnY4t5nARR_pj0YTa9DmpqZtQNqZgpMTZPTssWo32ASeECq8vZ5sQyoEczJzVVtR0yRTrIQPXIMIUwVds1zK4uNjYsj8Ag5hOsaQXvBcVn6KMJ_G63Kxq2LnMlO7FfmdRIauTos2B4StVqyHhYM3-B6c3d3-_sW2TuzzyrTxqdWTUuOj0pK_U7leNIcd-yPnY0nIOd6l6DXseKfWwW8FekArjAHW4EcmXJJcJz1htOVlO6ASk06pCUzy4zZWj1NaYMDwdgzBmc9dNgVUAQk5kcBUoM6kE8-FXLTK1M)

**But we can 't rest on our heels. Loser Liz is out for revenge against President Trump. **

We can't let Loser Liz spread lies about the MAGA movement. Trump conservatives have brought our country to greatness before and will bring our country to greatness again. We have an election to win this November and try as they might, the Left will NEVER distract us from winning across the board. The Democrats are dead set on throwing DJT off the ballot because they know they can't beat him at the polls on November 5.

| | I hope you’re enjoying your Saturday, Peter, but we’ve got a problem. **More of a challenge, really, but here’s the lowdown:** February is a short month (_who knew_), but with only a few months until the Democratic primary — _not to mention a multi-millionaire opponent already breaking the bank_ — we can’t afford to lower our monthly fundraising goals. **So our monthly goal remains $60,000, and I’m hoping I can count on you to help us put a big dent in that number this weekend.[So what do you say, Peter: Would you be willing to chip in a quick $25 or $50 toward our February goal?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12181?t=11&amount=25&akid=1103%2E52803%2ELklMqk)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12181?t=12&amount=25&akid=1103%2E52803%2ELklMqk)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12181?t=13&amount=35&akid=1103%2E52803%2ELklMqk)
---
Let me back it up a bit:
Angela’s multi-millionaire opponent is absolutely flooding the airwaves with tens of millions of dollars worth of ads.
_If you live in Maryland and watch TV, you know what I’m talking about._ 🙄
**We’ve got a plan to win, and it never involved trying to outspend him.**
Instead, we need to hit grassroots fundraising goals and put that money towards communicating with the voters we need to win, and make sure they hear Angela’s Maryland-first message.
**But that plan only works if we hit critical benchmarks, Peter, which is why I’m asking:[Can you please pitch in a grassroots donation toward our February goal so we can boost our outreach and beef up our ground game throughout Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12181?t=14&amount=25&akid=1103%2E52803%2ELklMqk)**

Fani Willis and Letitia James are the latest chapters in Trump’s and MAGA Republicans’ attempts to silence Black women.

Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis is the latest target of baseless claims and false accusations as she takes on Trump for his interference in the 2020 election results in Georgia. Similarly, NY Attorney General Letitia James faced some of the same unjust attacks throughout Trump’s fraud trial.

[Here at The Collective PAC, we refuse to stand for these racist and misogynistic attacks — we’re ready to fight back. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Right-wing lawmakers are banning diversity initiatives in schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Black history is American history. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvlbsyU8HkASm_B_axBUN4zkTWtakijEbQCk_enrRtNtezRo4edyZ0JQY0RuU0IUWDujXbjr5kdbKX9Ixedxs0oSPrDbj4sTVeMAZfpFp-n7uqM1_jk_3-VahxCQFPUyG4KFpdi-g7uNFY-fm9OI3ANs8UYwIORWaXkxzihgtgfdIbzx-bn1f6PoHFn7S51SV-k56C7fiRyS5scIbhR5jLYp4SKHw2t4hK4Pi2KyDddrOB5m6mY_q_sFR5Xh89Ekbu/444/h_kAm9isQsinYCrqZwurUA/h0/rxVuzIyVPtkds0oTx3-nOIEd3zx1BG1zsHC6AKR8Vkk)
---
Friend, Multiple states recently passed policies to ban diversity initiatives in public education. This censorship effort has shuttered multicultural centers and LGBTQ centers, limited faculty and student associations based on shared ethnic backgrounds or race, and ended scholarships for marginalized students. Right-wing lawmakers want to deny that racism exists while continuing the unjust status quo. We can’t let these right-wing efforts undo decades of progress, which secured ethnic studies and Black studies programs that affirm the worth and contributions of people of color. Black history is American history, and it’s crucial that we ensure this history is accurately taught and understood all year long. We urgently need policies like Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s _African American History Act_ , which would invest in African American history education programs for students, parents, and educators. [**Please sign on today to support Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s**** _African American History Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QLAcNHVZ8ZPTAHlLQ5tJwNTW8M2Qh5aZw7HU9qyLm-rruG2-C7k1dOMEyJxEn978hYH9dwL6qBMKS4WLFIJ5sdFg6PsW6BY8C0DWS5JlyB41gfCeGTMvkjmCwyAMp4u9winr_6LYhP86oeWENFXjXtQ9FQB0fUUPrCRvpgyI9yKEM7ebkOKb48v5ugIqZ4vugMEE_i1Ic8nB7uh5e1DpkPo5TKFZrSlJZVkNSDi2wzTa6lgRe1NwIAKBvNqN3OIe0HZSRT05eNZSVdVsr9SqcxTGWHqu43SDaNnqS7HDOuTER6iEmTnUqp4Bjq9UqdMzRG1OEtBDPqj2QeCCSKef_pHT0B7LPYg4l1QhYPy7tRIjMZsMVIf_4OKAmTB80nDxzsOQ1g6796oRSXPqOq68haQ/444/h_kAm9isQsinYCrqZwurUA/h1/b-3lWK9ioc53dLsfx24WYImyzbkaqkht_WUdTkLjns4) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QLAcNHVZ8ZPTAHlLQ5tJwNTW8M2Qh5aZw7HU9qyLm-rruG2-C7k1dOMEyJxEn978hYH9dwL6qBMKS4WLFIJ5sdBitDLE2tiY-SWyjrR_wZ5mT1ZnbvaKusYXG1RZJU4RmRUBHm-z40qEyolK3kLeNtqbdecvdvJguMSBKKCCaBQ17V80RwUpato8q40b_EdKEwlVfQRSadHf32wjXuLbzya24OcyxbyL3SueSkM4VqC44yOajSClt3fQSuVGEI1Rlq-l6Fd9kLzpUA8Z7cDGPGVfxg81EJIIT9LKt4MjxUm-RgK3Yjy2T48u6cmz2KQiXb8tCz40PJagEyzX6ZRiLb7RgDiYp_sxlETkglZPH7_kdq2yV8p1TJicVV-lcj35YseTWEVHmkmiBXZrZGDjAdg/444/h_kAm9isQsinYCrqZwurUA/h2/L60B9tJTdrIFpANlQemRTxAtgVR1-IeVk9MZI-QXK-w)
---
It’s Black History Month, but every month we should pay tribute to the incredible contributions our Black neighbors have made to our country.
Nikole Hannah-Jones, who created the 1619 Project and associated programs for students to learn about Black history, has said it’s “transformative” for Black students to “find themselves affirmed as agents in the American story—not just people who have been acted upon, not just people who've been oppressed—but agents who are driving the American story.”
It’s also essential for people of all backgrounds to understand racism and to see that we must continue the movement for Black liberation.
As Nikole Hannah-Jones explained: “The way you change your society is by helping people to better understand it and by changing the narratives that justify inequality.”
That’s how we get closer to a multi-racial democracy where we all have equal rights protected by the government.
[**Please add your name to support Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s**** _African American History Act_****, which would support the development of accurate, relevant, and accessible African American history resources.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QLAcNHVZ8ZPTAHlLQ5tJwNTW8M2Qh5aZw7HU9qyLm-rruG2-C7k1dOMEyJxEn978hYH9dwL6qBMKS4WLFIJ5sdEPIaF0zJ63tfMkQ2lgwUbZMeW2C8n2ENZEsYXJd4CTO1SIciGlhmr-2N0EvYc7QZrFDWe0ns0D9QGBL0-cen0uM5Rkl2o1-ULb0rwpCt8dqDkI7dkc2igSJcVlDAWmDy4JrKqnK3SrBuyv9YkWiQJ63fvUQh2oFPOb2qWPzU2I93Bml5XbzCf3qsmATATqKj7B0gCabQRV3FlzpOg7R2NG0FXvFD8AKRq68FXpozBFTUikjSXE8hmBDy0Fnv3VgTLWJ0jXd2_RC7xpU1Ls0ywhnRN3gmfNLQ94uuCDCz8hYtSAjkM2ceCxTwrUKqE6-dg/444/h_kAm9isQsinYCrqZwurUA/h3/ZMq9v2K7-v4P29_1QOc6tE_D1mUz9Jax07A6RedS9Y8)
Thank you. Together, we will keep building a world where the life and dignity of every person is valued.
In service and solidarity,
Rashida

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: MAGA Republicans desperately want to keep this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
Let me explain.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79642692/457092329/-1345170518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGRmZjI5ZS0zMmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcQsiHF1ZzruY36L2S44_8PnHdb6tpELBndKqk_iwB8=&emci=72dff29e-32d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=7ddff29e-32d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=19309188)
Peter, I want to make MAGA Republicans angry. Let me explain.
MAGA Republicans desperately want to keep this seat because they know that if they keep TX-15, they have a real shot at inflicting their unpopular, extremist agenda on America.
We know what that agenda would look like and it would be disastrous for everyday Americans like you and me.
Enacting a national abortion ban would leave countless women forced to carry life-threatening pregnancies to term. Cutting Social Security and Medicare would leave thousands of our abuelos out in the cold. And tax cuts for billionaires would leave working families continuing to foot the bill.
**[MAGA Republicans want to see all this and more become the reality for America. I want to make sure they don’t get their wish. Will you chip in now so I can get to Congress and fight to protect our hard-working Texas families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79642693/457092330/1049795346?refcode=em-20240224&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGRmZjI5ZS0zMmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcQsiHF1ZzruY36L2S44_8PnHdb6tpELBndKqk_iwB8=)**

In her short time in office, my opponent, Monica De La Cruz, has shown that she will stand with the most extreme factions of the Republican party over siding with the working families of Texas.
South Texas families can’t count on her — but the alt-right extremists in the GOP can. She’s voted for them and she’s voted with them, even when it goes against what the vast majority of Texans want to see.
**[That’s why it’s so important for MAGA Republicans to keep this seat — and that’s why it’s so important for us to take it back. I’m ready to get to work for the people of South Texas and make MAGA Republicans angry. Will you chip in now so I can do just that?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79642700/457092337/1049795346?refcode=em-20240224&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGRmZjI5ZS0zMmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lcQsiHF1ZzruY36L2S44_8PnHdb6tpELBndKqk_iwB8=)**

name: Harry Dunn (via Leaders We Deserve)
subject: I don’t look, live, or talk like most politicians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
I’m running because Maryland deserves a warrior fighting for them in Washington.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240224-1&t=1&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)
**_[Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and Leaders We Deserve.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-1&amount=5&refcode2=413_587540_qc4e_q&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)_**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-1&amount=5&refcode2=413_587540_qc4e_q&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)
Hey there Peter,
I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally.
I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days.
But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7.
Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced.
But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy.
_And Peter, I've never looked back._
**[I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and my campaign? It's going to be tough, but like I said, I'm no stranger to tough.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-1&amount=5&refcode2=413_587540_qc4e_q&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240224-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240224-1-413&refcode2=413_587540_qc4e_q&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)**
With love,

Harry 🖤
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240224-1&t=2&refcode2=413_587540_qc4e_q&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=413%2E587540%2Eqc4e_q)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. body:
Hey there - it's Jim Jordan. My primary is in 24 days on March 19th. Today, I'm asking for your help. Will you offer me your personal endorsement? It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=16e269a60f074468a6265ac7181aa42f&_e=yHUxq5GfGL34crAwrmihvXeQ0QqRe5g4R03rCfjj__XRf8PV6YabL9Iik0TbGz-tm8dibDw4X6XX2CcAOMusIeZESHpA8iJ9fOvaeXZn7773dKKBLryamxSKzvNOQMwo-ZRxIOf4FFpYNBzSundle4P5doShnfiJTRh14C9YNSur5zst4S2s31NXa8STwU_ImibbL81UxXVKhUEq850gsW8UeiMuFpR7m7rCNaLZPIMv9iGCGgOUH5mTgST-8zNc9eEo5g5HKzm84nsxqULiumSio2LywAHRDcKn7bOOO84I_0_QBRdqOpPym5jjK52f0vwlXDrj6LegLCONscSP_xM1knkBpvkpDKACw6_OEatRc_wC1uEKieDI-Ajv_ovUVObLGA2S767DcXDGijH5uATIl-GJXQe3ZD-5vxJ-A4NOt4pC1TC22QKtIYEx4NLWHO0bgzWtGEXaNBeSjLdrfU6RywTTIf3HzAvtEr3F53oT3AYb_jaglCI_W4Ldo1kI6zsL8A8h16i1yklZ4HB1Ig%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Some say that our district should be safe for Republicans in November, but with almost half the district as “new territory,” we are not taking any chances. **The way people lose is to forget who they are, where they come from and who they represent.** I’ve seen former colleagues make this mistake before; I made a vow to myself to never become complacent.

So, here we are once again, **eight months until Election Day!**

I’m gearing up for the general election and **[I would truly appreciate seeing your name on the list of supporters who have personally endorsed me for reelection.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=16e269a60f074468a6265ac7181aa42f&_e=yHUxq5GfGL34crAwrmihvXeQ0QqRe5g4R03rCfjj__XRf8PV6YabL9Iik0TbGz-tm8dibDw4X6XX2CcAOMusIeZESHpA8iJ9fOvaeXZn7773dKKBLryamxSKzvNOQMwo-ZRxIOf4FFpYNBzSundle4P5doShnfiJTRh14C9YNSur5zst4S2s31NXa8STwU_ImibbL81UxXVKhUEq850gsW8UeiMuFpR7m7rCNaLZPIMv9iGCGgOUH5mTgST-8zNc9eEo5g5HKzm84nsxqULiumSio2LywAHRDcKn7bOOO84I_0_QBRdqOpPym5jjK52f0vwlXDrj6LegLCONscSP_xM1knkBpvkpDKACw6_OEatRc_wC1uEKieDI-Ajv_ovUrjAx9Rkp2ydpZ5KUlPOdOF7DrEggGvjwlHNhIONbqX0XOWALtlO0-p_jWQPvWbrNCL_gXOryE9o2xPiDGVFj1JgLx32dh3NTqjkW-1_FtYtBpDc85MR8d5l22pyBuNmTZo_emqSvAQkszOiI8a1peQ%3D%3D)** I’m asking if you have the time, please consider doing so today.

[](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=16e269a60f074468a6265ac7181aa42f&_e=yHUxq5GfGL34crAwrmihvXeQ0QqRe5g4R03rCfjj__XRf8PV6YabL9Iik0TbGz-tm8dibDw4X6XX2CcAOMusIeZESHpA8iJ9fOvaeXZn7773dKKBLryamxSKzvNOQMwo-ZRxIOf4FFpYNBzSundle4P5doShnfiJTRh14C9YNSur5zst4S2s31NXa8STwU_ImibbL81UxXVKhUEq850gsW8UeiMuFpR7m7rCNaLZPIMv9iGCGgOUH5mTgST-8zNc9eEo5g5HKzm84nsxqULiumSio2LywAHRDcKn7bOOO84I_0_QBRdqOpPym5jjK52f0vwlXDrj6LegLCONscSP_xM1knkBpvkpDKACw6_OEatRc_wC1uEKieDI-Ajv_ovUhgzl56Pvoo0drswJ3JntkJC6fj6ZPURQcVbSgEmKsYoxs53ANSg3G4Ge_P3k1GpNVgzsxo2ievvK1HlVu8kq74pDU8Kwhrb_3quyS8sGxWvTLYAx_cw04rTg9gShWtnyegpsRLZ7yL1B5LSG6tMloA%3D%3D)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House, and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democrats are more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:
1. **We need to secure the southern border**
2. **We should defund sanctuary cities**
3. **All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs**

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=16e269a60f074468a6265ac7181aa42f&_e=yHUxq5GfGL34crAwrmihvXeQ0QqRe5g4R03rCfjj__XRf8PV6YabL9Iik0TbGz-tm8dibDw4X6XX2CcAOMusIeZESHpA8iJ9fOvaeXZn7773dKKBLryamxSKzvNOQMwo-ZRxIOf4FFpYNBzSundle4P5doShnfiJTRh14C9YNSur5zst4S2s31NXa8STwU_ImibbL81UxXVKhUEq850gsW8UeiMuFpR7m7rCNaLZPIMv9iGCGgOUH5mTgST-8zNc9eEo5g5HKzm84nsxqULiumSio2LywAHRDcKn7bOOO84I_0_QBRdqOpPym5jjK52f0vwlXDrj6LegLCONscSP_xM1knkBpvkpDKACw6_OEatRc_wC1uEKieDI-Ajv_ovUVWM6wKnqCV9Rg15ELce1CJNDEZTzgmveKE4qvZIgJpFL0fIxjEjJjAKrbbTSgWSC8R6UB1sHWZHyd0N6LOlyDNKpHMmkEMgjwMIJPcjmk4V_b71D7TlSrhNGaVH9K3832DXcoEtWMLW8s9snSjNQyg%3D%3D)**

**Please help me reach our goal of finding 20,000 endorsements by the end of this week**. We’re just 408 short at the moment, but we’re confident that the hill isn’t too steep.

Let’s get this done. **[Please send your endorsement today.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=16e269a60f074468a6265ac7181aa42f&_e=yHUxq5GfGL34crAwrmihvXeQ0QqRe5g4R03rCfjj__XRf8PV6YabL9Iik0TbGz-tm8dibDw4X6XX2CcAOMusIeZESHpA8iJ9fOvaeXZn7773dKKBLryamxSKzvNOQMwo-ZRxIOf4FFpYNBzSundle4P5doShnfiJTRh14C9YNSur5zst4S2s31NXa8STwU_ImibbL81UxXVKhUEq850gsW8UeiMuFpR7m7rCNaLZPIMv9iGCGgOUH5mTgST-8zNc9eEo5g5HKzm84nsxqULiumSio2LywAHRDcKn7bOOO84I_0_QBRdqOpPym5jjK52f0vwlXDrj6LegLCONscSP_xM1knkBpvkpDKACw6_OEatRc_wC1uEKieDI-Ajv_ovUBPHsYjCsfuiZtv3dfam7Q01C9BhXLpKKGyQ4iEyQy-6dKuGT2drHYEK0JKfV07F_36Q39EVPg9KrX868aCQlih9s8mfaz-WSolui1dNGgX8AgAaIhm3DDcn6OkXYIKxQV6HhjdUhrf98wNGo9k39Mg%3D%3D)**

Thanks,
Jim Jordan

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: A page out of Trump’s book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our country needs more humane and compassion when it comes to immigration policy - not another page out of Trump’s playbook.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240224-3552-footer&t=1&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)
Peter,
In 2020, voters made it clear: Trump’s policies were tarnishing the fabric of our country. So it is disappointing to see this headline come through this week:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240224.r10b6p&refcode=em20240224-3552&t=2&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)
**Democrats cannot solve immigration problems by adopting Trump-like policies — we need to lead with dignity and humanity****.**[**If you stand with me, please consider donating to strengthen our movement and continue fighting for true immigration justice.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240224.r10b6p&refcode=em20240224-3552&t=3&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)
**I know firsthand what it feels like to come to this country, rich in opportunity, with a will to make something of yourself. Immigrants are not the problem — especially those seeking asylum. And this extremist GOP rhetoric will only further jeopardize innocent lives who just want a chance at a safer way of life.**
**I am proud to stand in Congress and demand that Democrats must not, under any circumstances, restrict the right to asylum. Cruel enforcement-only policies have been tried for 30 years and simply do not work.**Truth is: we must lead in addressing the broken immigration system by championing common sense, compassionate reforms that millions of Americans support.****
The GOP knows I am standing in the way of enacting Donald Trump and Stephen Miller's cruel playbook. They have already spent millions to silence our movement, and we cannot let them succeed.
Can I count on your support to stand with me in this fight? [**If Pramila has your support, please consider chipping in $3 or whatever you can right now.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240224.r10b6p&refcode=em20240224-3552&t=4&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240224.r10b6p&refcode=em20240224-3552&t=23&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)**
Together,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240224-3552-footer&t=24&refcode2=3552_420207_mRk1c_&akid=3552%2E420207%2EmRk1c_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Hill Harper
subject: Honestly? I’m angry at our politicians, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
And I bet you are, too.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)
Sorry for coming in hot, Peter, but frankly, I’m fed up with what I see happening in Washington today. And I’m willing to bet you are, too. Do you feel like you’ve been let down by career politicians who pay lip service to working folks in their campaign ads but then turn around and cash big checks from lobbyists and wealthy special interests? Or like progress on your priorities and concerns have gone nowhere?
If you said “yes” to either, **[I need you to chip in any amount you can to my people-powered campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Thursday. I’m not taking a cent of corporate PAC money, so every dollar counts.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/448?t=2&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)**
For years, we’ve watched our “leaders” in Washington break their promises, blame their lack of progress on someone else, and head to a $1,000-per-plate fundraiser all in the same day. Time after time, we’ve watched them turn their backs on working families and push their corporate donors to the front of the pack in a broken, pay-to-play system.
And what do they have to show for it, Peter?
* A $7.25 federal minimum wage that hasn’t been raised in 15 years
* One of the highest costs for healthcare of any country in the world
* A tax system tilting increasingly towards the ultra-wealthy and large corporations
* A $1.74 _trillion_ national student loan debt burden that’s crushing the middle and working class
* No momentum to end _Citizens United_ and get dirty money out of politics

**The bottom line: Nothing is getting done in Washington, and people know it.**
That’s why I’m running to bring a new perspective to the Senate, one that isn’t funded by Big Pharma or the gun lobby. I’ll work to lower taxes for working families, deliver universal health care for all, root out corruption, raise the federal minimum wage, and deliver the progressive leadership Michigan desperately needs — and **I’m counting on you to help me get it done.**
**[If you’re tired of our broken system and ready for change, I need your help to build our campaign and take it all the way to Washington. Chip in any amount you can before our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline on Thursday.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/448?t=3&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)**
**[DONATE NOW »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/448?t=4&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)**
Thanks so much,
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate (MI)
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/448?t=5&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_em_footer?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=6&refcode2=1004_62735_SRfI2C&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1004%2E62735%2ESRfI2C)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

Fellow Conservative, do elections still matter to you?

I’m sorry to ask you such a charged question, but **my messages don’t appear to be cutting through the noise of every other political campaign reaching out to you for help.**

**I’ll be blunt:** Senate campaigns like mine are the only campaigns worth donating to. Aside from President Trump, everyone else asking you for money is trying to pad campaign accounts for campaigns won or lost long ago.

**FOR INSTANCE:** Democrats have committed _**$56M to Montana to buy my opponent another six-year term in Washington.**_ Despite polls showing that I am the only Republican who can beat Jon Tester and flip this seat for America, **we’re losing the campaign cash race ... BAD.**

On February 9th, President Trump endorsed our campaign, and despite reaching out to thousands of donors whose phone numbers and emails I have, **we raised just $394.**

We MUST do better. This race TRULY MATTERS. **[Donation link.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0872eaab01744d92a17a940a075674fd&_e=S65dewAtIKO8uPngj8PO0jG4W3l2dL030KckOv71YV-fm0QiEJYQCpLPxbEeArBONNWETBmwFcFwQePn_laHBUBMdx2KT8uOXH3dAFod0nzcMbNN3qxQyzAJeLAaiFKIjsjbJKADWZX5xTd4mTGxlxoiWrkMd7kdm4p6vMBebTufFTby9_tBGy4tbMjAGtqrQ-GZ6WQGicnr1HtNl22FAMligdiXGZlDQhkX9cRx6G_fnxnbbM4As8X3M_jKZh03W1swC5XK36wAbmzFa4A_9wc8vgglFZuSjiNRuwUtf2YBbfZpDxP--TfrIl4wsmpNUd2Y1_RRSnodr-oGYfJ-eGdtEoQdp9qYkFNq6XmFhc4tdAq_89tnkOPmutiQn53jQ8Su6v4MzSraQ79oTTuTtp3NFGKTZ0fwezLq63QNrS0%3D)**

Fellow Conservative, unless we do a complete 180 on the fundraising front, we may never win back this Senate seat again. **Our situation is DIRE.**

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79646394/457101308/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_WEL_GEN_NTL_202311_SR2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWU3ZGMxYy0zN2QzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fpeuz7Z9_N-MNFNmgEsCKxW2N_0lWHdyoI1TBVDA-a0=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79646396/457101310/854953210?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_WEL_GEN_NTL_202311_SR2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWU3ZGMxYy0zN2QzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fpeuz7Z9_N-MNFNmgEsCKxW2N_0lWHdyoI1TBVDA-a0=) Hey Peter, Katherine Clark here — **[I’m writing today to ask you to split a contribution of $10 — or any amount you can — between my campaign and Fair Shot PAC.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79646398/457101312/854953210?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_WEL_GEN_NTL_202311_SR2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWU3ZGMxYy0zN2QzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fpeuz7Z9_N-MNFNmgEsCKxW2N_0lWHdyoI1TBVDA-a0=)** But before I do, I hope you’ll give me a chance to explain why: As the House Democratic Whip, I work hand-in-hand with Democrats in Congress to deliver much-needed progress. We work around the clock to push through legislation on the issues that impact the American people, but we have a massive obstacle in our way: the MAGA extremist agenda. **I started Fair Shot PAC for that reason.** Republicans have stood in the way of free and fair elections, reproductive freedom, and climate action. | We need your help to fight back.

Peter — There’s been too many updates to keep track of in Tammy Baldwin’s reelection race, so let us catch you up: **FIRST:** Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde, launched his campaign for Wisconsin’s Senate seat. The megamillionaire California bank owner has pledged to spend at least $20 million to flip this seat red. **THEN:** The Republican group tasked with taking back the Senate majority launched a **5-figure ad buy** attacking Tammy Baldwin.
