name: Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend, Donald Trump attacked me directly and accused California of voter fraud in our U.S. Senate race.
With Californians voting right now , there is NO WAY we can allow Trump’s election disinformation to influence the outcome of this election in the final days of this primary.
I’ll share what he posted to his social media platform in a moment, but first, can you rush a split donation of any amount to Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us respond to this unhinged Trump attack? We CANNOT allow this claim to go unanswered. Not today, friend. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
After calling me a “slimeball,” “low life,” “shifty,” and more, he then tried to cast doubt on California’s primary election if I win, in an ALL CAPS social media rant.
With none more damaging than this: “SADLY, BETWEEN RANK ‘NO CHOICE’ VOTING, AND ‘UNLIMITED’ NUMBERS OF MAIL-IN BALLOTS POURING INTO PLACES UNKNOWN, TO PEOPLE THAT SOMETIMES RECEIVE MANY BALLOTS TO FILL OUT AND SEND BACK AT WILL, CALIFORNIANS ARE ‘SCREWED!’”
Here are the facts: California’s mail-in ballots are not “unlimited” — they are limited to one for every registered California voter. Every ballot has a known destination — its assigned voter’s address on their voter registration. Every registered voter can only vote once (but on every ballot this year, the California U.S. Senate seat appears TWICE). Every ballot must be postmarked by Election Day. And Trump is just spewing lies about there being ranked-choice voting.
But friend, Trump’s allies in the far-right media, aren't going to share the facts.
They’re going to share his words across the right-wing ecosystem. His MAGA followers will spread his lies far and wide, reaching huge swathes of California’s 22 million registered voters. Their online obscenities and attacks against me, as well as written and verbal threats to our offices, will increase exponentially.
And like the disinformation he sowed that led to the Capitol insurrection, Trump will attempt to create a new reality for millions of California voters — and if I win, paint my election as illegitimate.
I told you more attacks were coming after the debates, and they’re officially here. Trump is using the same con he has for years — attacking me personally and undermining confidence in election integrity. It’s clear there is no candidate he fears more from being elected than me, and for good reason. Chip in a split donation of $15 between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help me win this race and hold Trump and his allies accountable. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
There are 10 days left in this election, and it’s going to take a surge in grassroots support to ensure we have the resources to respond to these lies and reach undecided voters.
Thanks for anything you can spare in support.
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

Friend, Bill Pascrell's top priority has always been making progress for New Jerseyans and fighting for working families every day. Economic inequality has often forced families to work longer hours or to take on multiple jobs with fewer benefits. Middle-class families face ever-increasing costs for the longtime pillars of the American Dream, including safe housing, a decent education and quality health care. **That's why Bill has been on the front lines fighting to increase affordability and for an economy that works for all of us.** [**If you support Bill already and want to see another term of progress for New Jersey families, with more investments in public safety, tax relief for the middle class, education funding, and more, please chip in $10 or any amount today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79649754/457107926/-197340401?refcode=240224_tp_progress_l1&ms=240224_tp_progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVkODk0OWEtM2FkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slw98_TEoxflnhN5pVNSlOU_paOgUTFBbUp1y7a1uCE=) To combat the challenges faced by middle-class families, one of Bill's key initiatives is the restoration of the full State and Local Tax Deduction, a vital lifeline for middle-class New Jerseyans that was capped in Trump's 2017 tax scam - a horrendous law which disproportionately favored the top one percent and caused massive budget deficits. Bill is a champion for workers, advocating for a phased-in increase of the federal minimum wage, as well as providing tax relief for small business owners.**On the Ways and Means Committee, he has supported the expansion of the Child Tax Credit to fight child poverty and support working families with young children. Think of all the progress another term will bring, friend.** [**Time and time again, Bill fights for policies that benefit middle-income taxpayers who have been left behind by the GOP. These investments to support the middle class, along with record investments in public safety, our education system, local infrastructure, climate resilience, and more, are why we need our Progressive Fighter, Bill, in Congress. Will you support his reelection campaign with any amount today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79649755/457107927/-197340401?refcode=240224_tp_progress_l1&ms=240224_tp_progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVkODk0OWEtM2FkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slw98_TEoxflnhN5pVNSlOU_paOgUTFBbUp1y7a1uCE=) **[Support Bill](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79649756/457107928/-197340401?refcode=240224_tp_progress_b1&ms=240224_tp_progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVkODk0OWEtM2FkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slw98_TEoxflnhN5pVNSlOU_paOgUTFBbUp1y7a1uCE=)** **[Support Bill Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79649757/457107929/-197340401?refcode=240224_tp_progress_b2&recurring=1&ms=240224_tp_progress&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmVkODk0OWEtM2FkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=slw98_TEoxflnhN5pVNSlOU_paOgUTFBbUp1y7a1uCE=)** Thanks for being part of this. — Team Pascrell
| The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. clean_body: Bill has been fighting for a better life for all of us | | = Friend, Bill Pascrell's top priority has always been making progress for New Jerseyans and fighting for working families every day. Economic inequality has often forced families to work longer hours or to take on multiple jobs with fewer benefits. Middle-class families face ever-increasing costs for the longtime pillars of the American Dream, including safe housing, a decent education and quality health care. That's why Bill has been on the front lines fighting to increase affordability and for an economy that works for all of us. = To combat the challenges faced by middle-class families, one of Bill's key initiatives is the restoration of the full State and Local Tax Deduction, a vital lifeline for middle-class New Jerseyans that was capped in Trump's 2017 tax scam - a horrendous law which disproportionately favored the top one percent and caused massive budget deficits. Bill is a champion for workers, advocating for a phased-in increase of the federal minimum wage, as well as providing tax relief for small business owners.On the Ways and Means Committee, he has supported the expansion of the Child Tax Credit to fight child poverty and support working families with young children. Think of all the progress another term will bring, friend. = = = Thanks for being part of this. — Team Pascrell | The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. name: Sharice Davids
subject: I want you to know that I will never back down when it comes to protecting reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to put everything we’ve got into winning this next election.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79650039/457108539/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWUzMzRlOC0zYWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtiypvXT7dJel-InoiI-tRRN6GRk7vuy6Koz1gvyOao=) The last week has made it clearer than ever before that abortion rights are on the ballot here in Kansas — and that we need to put everything we’ve got into winning this next election. **First,** The New York Times reported that national Republicans are already laying plans to pass a national abortion ban if they win this next election. _This means that even though Kansans voted overwhelmingly to protect abortion rights in our state, those rights would vanish overnight if the GOP gets its way._ **Then,** the Alabama Supreme Court issued a reproductive rights ruling so restrictive and extreme that it even prohibits IVF — a ban that some of my right-wing colleagues in Congress have been pushing at the federal level. **Now,** right here in KS-03, we’re up against extremist opponents who have made it clear that, if they get to Congress, they will vote to restrict abortion rights. **I wish I could say that there’s a silver lining here and that we’re overwhelmingly favored to win this race and flip the House. But the fact is, this seat is a toss-up, control of the House is a toss-up, and I’m going to need to fight hard for every vote in order to win.** [_**Can I count on you to pitch in today and help power this grassroots fight to protect the right to choose, here in Kansas and across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79650046/457108540/837329752?refcode=email_022424_Abortion-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWUzMzRlOC0zYWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtiypvXT7dJel-InoiI-tRRN6GRk7vuy6Koz1gvyOao=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79650048/457108541/837329752?refcode=email_022424_Abortion-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NWUzMzRlOC0zYWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OtiypvXT7dJel-InoiI-tRRN6GRk7vuy6Koz1gvyOao=)
---
Thank you so much for everything you do. This is going to be a tough fight, but with your help and this incredible team behind us, I know we can win.
-Sharice

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Roger Stone, Tucker Carlson, Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend,

Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.

But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**

If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, **so be it** (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).

And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, **so be it.**

They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.

[Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by splitting $10 or any amount you can spare between VPP and my campaign ahead of our primary election.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62872?t=6&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62873?t=7&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62874?t=8&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62875?t=9&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62876?t=10&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62872?t=11&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap)
I won’t let any of these guys interfere with my work to defend our democracy.

I wear their enmity as a badge of honor, team, and I appreciate your help in my work.

Thank you,

Adam

(www.protectvoting.org)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13133%2E878179%2E0F4Tap).**

But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, so be it. If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, so be it (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself). And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, so be it. They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The last place Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire. name: News Team @ Our Revolution
subject: The Latest: Push Biden to Peace in Michigan primary Tuesday, plus new endorsements in Oregon & California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

INSIDER NEWS FROM THE FRONTLINES OF THE POLITICAL REVOLUTION

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

HEADLINES: Michigan Vote Uncommitted 2/27: Send Biden a Message on Gaza |
Push for Peace & Defeat Trump in November | Barbara Lee for Senate Rally
Tour | Final California GOTV Town Hall | & MORE!

★ ★ ★

Don’t miss Our Revolution’s LIVE California GOTV Rally this Tuesday with
Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate, Barbara’s campaign chair U.S.
Rep. Ro Khanna, CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra, and Alex Mohajer for State
Senate (District 37), and other special guests!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15402?t=1011&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]RSVP TO JOIN US ON ZOOM

★ ★ ★

We’re making Michigan a megaphone for Peace.

Our Revolution is joined by Rashida Tlaib and former Congressman Andy
Levin in this call to get progressives to ‘Vote Uncommitted’ as a push for
Peace in the Michigan presidential primary on Feb. 27th.

We must send a clear message directly to the Biden campaign: Change course
NOW on Gaza or else risk losing Michigan to Trump in November.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15169?t=1012&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]If you’re in Michigan, pledge here to Vote Uncommitted on Tuesday!

“Our Revolution is throwing its weight behind the movement to vote
Uncommitted in Michigan’s Democratic primary, seeking to pressure
President Biden into changing his approach to the war between Israel and
Hamas,” wrote the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15349?t=1013&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]New York Times this week.

“It’s a strategic opportunity to send a signal to the president that he’s
got to change course,” Our Revolution Executive Director Joseph
Geevarghese told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15350?t=1014&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]CBS News.

This effort intends to “realign with the values of his base, including
young voters, voters of color, and Michigan’s significant Arab-American
population,” reported John Nichols in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15351?t=1015&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]The Nation.

“Months of protests and activism in cities across the country continue to
be ignored, and this latest veto (of the UN ceasefire resolution) shows
exactly why it’s imperative for voters to send a message to the Biden
administration at the ballot box,” Joseph told [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15399?t=1016&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]The Hill.

“With just a few days until the Michigan primary vote, Biden’s blockade of
the cease-fire resolution will only intensify the outrage and galvanize
pro-peace voices to vote ‘uncommitted’ to make their voices heard,” Joseph
said.

Our Revolution organizers are making calls, sending texts, and emailing
our 87,000 members in Michigan — chip in so we can reach as many Michigan
voters as possible.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15400?t=1017&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]The grassroots has already chipped in $12,000 for this project, but we
need to raise $20,000. Can you make a donation now to help us close the
gap? Thank you for being a voice for Peace!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

We have a shot to elect a true champion for Peace in Barbara Lee to the
U.S. Senate. Not only did she stand alone in Congress to vote against the
Iraq War, but she was one of the first to stand strong for a Ceasefire in
Gaza.

But, Barbara has been leading the charge on just about every progressive
issue from Day 1 — reproductive rights, healthcare for all, racial
justice, environment, poverty, and so much more.

She truly is the movement candidate in this race, and we are excited to
rally with her in a GOTV tour across California leading up to the last day
to vote on March 5th.

On Monday, we’ll be joining Barbara Lee and friends at Sweet’s Ballroom in
Oakland, CA for a major campaign rally that kicks off at 6:30 pm PST.

Barbara will also be rallying at 7pm PST tonight in Bakersfield,
California — so don’t miss it if you’re in the neighborhood!

We are proud of the strong and diverse multi-generational, multi-ethnic,
grassroots coalition backing Barbara. Now it’s time to turn our coalition
out to vote.

Join Congresswoman Lee and friends for rallies in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15158?t=1018&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]San Diego and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15159?t=1019&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Orange County on Saturday, March 2nd, and in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15160?t=1020&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Inland Empire and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15161?t=1021&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Los Angeles on Sunday March 3rd!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1022&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Our Revolution organizers and volunteers have already made 1.5 million
voter contacts into California. Pitch in $5, $27, or $50 to help us reach
our goal of making another half-million contacts before voting ends on
March 5th.

★ ★ ★

And, Our Revolution is supporting Lateefah Simon for Congress to succeed
Barbara Lee in the seat from California’s District 12.

If elected, Lateefah is sure to carry on Barbara’s legacy in the seat — as
a veteran organizer and advocate for civil rights and social justice.

She is a strong advocate for single-payer universal healthcare, reducing
military spending, putting peace first, and lifting up priorities of
housing, reproductive justice, and more.

As Barbara said, “Lateefah is from the community and for the community.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1023&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Organized people can beat organized money, and these races are going
to come down to our grassroots power. Pitch in today to fuel our GOTV
operation in 2024.

★ ★ ★

In California, Our Revolution is endorsing three great candidates to join
the Kern County Democratic Central Committee in District 3 — and make the
party more transparent and responsive to the grassroots.

Neel Sannappa is the chair of Our Revolution Kern County and has worked to
hold politicians accountable for voting against working families in Kern
County.

Megan Russell currently serves as a representative for ADEM AD35 and has
previously been the membership coordinator for Our Revolution Kern County.
Megan has lots of great experience in Community, Electoral, and Labor
Organizing and is currently an external Union Organizer with SEIU.

Ajaib Gill is a lawyer who is committed to criminal justice reform,
education, and our progressive platform. He would be a strong progressive
voice inside the party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1024&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]It’s critical that we continue to elect progressives at every level of
government. Chip in a one-time or monthly donation to advance our
priorities against the political establishment.

★ ★ ★

In total, Our Revolution has endorsed nearly 100 progressive candidates in
California, and we’re activating our grassroots army to power our massive
GOTV operation - from calling and texting to knocking doors.

You’ve met our slate in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13560?t=1025&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Sacramento, where we can elect Sean Frame to
the California Assembly and win a progressive majority on the Sacramento
City Council.

In [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13792?t=1026&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]San Francisco, we’ve endorsed two judges facing right-wing “tough
on crime” opponents and a host of progressives running to transform the
Democratic Party from the inside out at the county level.

We’ve also introduced you to Our Revolution’s slates in [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14282?t=1027&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Alameda
County, [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14387?t=1028&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Contra Costa County, and [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/1324?t=1029&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Southern California — where we
have powerhouses like Jovanka Beckles, who took on Chevron and won, and
Alex Mohajer, who would be the first openly gay Iranian man elected
anywhere in the world.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14159?t=1030&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Our Revolution is running a massive GOTV operation on the ground, on
the phones, by mail and through voter to voter conversations. Chip in to
help us build progressive power in California and beyond this election
year.

★ ★ ★

As the 2024 elections get into full swing, we’d love to hear from you
about candidates our members are excited about! Email our political team
at political@ourrevolution.com to nominate candidates for Our Revolution’s
endorsement.

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

Don’t miss Our Revolution’s LIVE California GOTV Rally this Tuesday with
Peace Candidate Barbara Lee for U.S. Senate, Barbara’s campaign chair U.S.
Rep. Ro Khanna, CA Assemblyman Ash Kalra, and Alex Mohajer for State
Senate (District 37), and other special guests!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/15402?t=1031&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]RSVP TO SECURE YOUR SPOT

★ ★ ★

You can help elect Barbara Lee from anywhere in the country by making
calls as part of Our Revolution’s Phone Bank Team. It’s a lot of fun, but
this is serious business because we know what it would mean to get a
powerhouse like Barbara in the U.S. Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12528?t=1032&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]PHONE BANK FOR BARBARA LEE

★ ★ ★

Every seat matters. That’s why Our Revolution is gearing up NOW for 2024
to expand our organizational capacity and our voter turnout operation for
the crucial battles to come.

Not only must we defeat Donald Trump and the far right, but we have got to
take back the House, defeat enemies of progress like Kyrsten Sinema in the
Senate, and elect amazing progressives like Barbara Lee to turn this ship
around.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13109?t=1033&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]If you can, please kick in a few bucks or commit to a recurring
donation to help us staff up and get to work — there’s no time to waste!

★ ★ ★

AIPAC lobbyists are already preparing to spend more than $100 MILLION to
try to unseat some of our strongest peace champions in Congress, including
Pramila Jayapal, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, Cori Bush, Summer Lee, and
others.

Progressives are under attack for demanding a Ceasefire and an end to the
killing of thousands of Palestinian civilians and children — and we must
have their back in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13830?t=1034&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Help fund our phone banks, texting, and voter-to-voter mobilization to
defend and expand progressive power in Congress and beyond. We must make
sure our most powerful anti-war voices are not silenced by big money in
2024.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1035&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ][IMG]

From boots on the ground to the halls of Congress — we are building an
organized progressive movement at every level of government. If you’re
already a member of Our Revolution, THANK YOU! If you’re not yet an
official member, please consider signing up for a recurring monthly
donation today!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1036&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]PLEASE SUPPORT OUR REVOLUTION

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1037&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13011?source=revreport&amount=&t=1038&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]WHEN WE ORGANIZE, WE WIN!

★ ★ ★

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=revreport._Ro8z9&t=1007&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=revreport.T4WXik&t=1008&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a recurring donation of just $5 or more a
month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=revreport.Wps0N4&t=1009&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=revreport.HCFlph&t=1010&akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=5364%2E5885482%2E6ik4bO

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

subject: Access my SECRET Mayorkas Memo

body:
EVERY conservative Republican needs to read this.

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: The U.S. is obligated to prevent genocide.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In response to the case brought by South Africa against Israel, the
International Court of Justice ruled that Israel’s government is plausibly
committing genocide.

The Court ordered Israel’s government to act immediately to prevent
further harm to the Palestinian people—and to stop “acts of genocide” such
as killing Palestinians and “causing serious bodily or mental harm” to
Palestinians.

This ruling also puts the U.S. government on notice for enabling
violations of the Genocide Convention. As a signer of the Genocide
Convention, the U.S. government is legally obligated to prevent genocide.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140357?t=1001&akid=33487%2E1203867%2E8gtXQj ]Sign to tell President Biden: To comply with the International Court of
Justice’s ruling to prevent genocide, you must suspend all weapons
transfers and military funding to Israel’s government. Stop enabling the
genocide of Palestinians, and instead push for a ceasefire.

SIGN NOW

With U.S. support, the Israeli government has killed more than 27,000
Palestinians in Gaza, forcibly displacing 2 million people within the
already-densely-packed Gaza strip.

President Biden has sent thousands of bombs to Israel’s military, while
blocking international efforts to stop the violence and watering down
attempts to secure sufficient humanitarian aid.

Meanwhile, Israel’s government is still starving Palestinians in Gaza and
depriving the trapped population of other basic needs for survival such as
water, shelter, and medical assistance.

As the biggest funder of Israel’s military, U.S. government leaders have
the power and the obligation to stop this unfolding genocide.

In addition to the order to prevent genocide, the International Court of
Justice (ICJ) also ordered Israel to prevent and punish incitement to
genocide, to immediately ensure “urgently needed basic services and
humanitarian assistance” to Gaza, and to report back within a month to the
court.

The only way to implement the Court’s orders is by facilitating a lasting
ceasefire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140357?t=1002&akid=33487%2E1203867%2E8gtXQj ]Please sign if you agree: The Biden administration must not only affirm
the legitimacy of the ICJ’s ruling and facilitate an immediate
ceasefire—it must comply with federal and international law by suspending
military assistance to the Israeli government.

ADD YOUR NAME

Let’s keep up the momentum and the pressure to end not only this genocide,
but also the apartheid system that’s rooted in the racist dehumanization
of Palestinians. Together, we’re demanding a world with equality and
dignity for all people.

In solidarity,

Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240224-33487-footer&t=1003&refcode2=33487_1203867_8gtXQj&akid=33487%2E1203867%2E8gtXQj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=33487%2E1203867%2E8gtXQj

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

**GOP super PAC makes first major Senate investment**
**“Montana is a top target for Republicans looking to take control of the Senate”**
—NBC News [**Rush a split donation to help fight back ASAP, win the race that will decide Senate control, and elect state and local Democrats »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38232?t=7&akid=20865%2E4449941%2Ek6Jn7q) | [DONATE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38232?t=8&akid=20865%2E4449941%2Ek6Jn7q)
---
Here’s the situation:

**The situation →** Two GOP super PACs just announced they’re dumping $50 million into Montana’s Senate race! $50 MILLION.

**Here’s the problem →** Experts across the country are saying Jon’s race could be the most competitive in the country, coming down to just a handful of votes. With the polls tied, an investment like this could sink our chances of winning if we don’t respond.

**Where you come in →** We’re proud to run a grassroots campaign, but that means our success entirely depends on your support. We need you to rush a donation to help us fight back ASAP.

**This is just the beginning. We’re expecting outside groups to spend astronomical amounts to defeat Jon Tester and buy this Senate seat. So we’re turning to you now:**
[**Rush a split donation between Jon Tester to help win his race and Fight for Reform to help elect state and state and local Democrats. Your contributions directly impact our ability to respond and overcome anything the GOP throws our way.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/38232?t=9&akid=20865%2E4449941%2Ek6Jn7q)

body:
#
Hi Derek, we say it a lot but it’s true: You’re a major part of how we’re able to power John’s work in the Senate. Let us explain.
We’re coming to our strongest supporters to ask: **[Will you donate your first $5 to support John’s work in the Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-1-8805&refcode2=8805_434096_KzVR34&akid=8805%2E434096%2EKzVR34)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240224-1?refcode=em20240224-8805&refcode2=8805_434096_KzVR34&akid=8805%2E434096%2EKzVR34)**
Here are 3 reasons that might convince you to chip in today:
1️⃣ John is working hard to stand up for PA’s working families down in DC, and we need to keep him in office.
2️⃣ Small donations really add up, and it’s what makes our movement so strong (strong enough to fight back against far right attacks + WIN).
3️⃣ It’s so important that we have a base of resources as we prepare for the tough fights ahead. With a Democratic majority so slim, we have to fight for every single Senate seat nationwide.

But we _cannot_ just sit back and do nothing. If the Supreme Court decides to take mifepristone off the market, this move would affect _every single_ person _ _ in America, regardless of what their state constitution says. _**We must fight back!**_

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: We all thought they were doomed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
Ukraine doesn’t just deserve our support. They deserve our admiration. We can learn a lot from them about what it means to fight for freedom.
|
---
Friend, Two years ago today, Russia launched its full-scale invasion of Ukraine. We all watched as a giant, military dictatorship tried to swallow its free, democratic neighbor. Almost everyone thought the Ukrainians—and their democracy—were doomed. We were wrong. The Ukrainians fought hard for their democracy and they destroyed half the Russian army. They’ve driven the Russian Black Sea Fleet from their coasts—and Ukraine doesn’t even have a navy! But I’ll tell you what impresses me most: In response to invasion, repression, murder, atrocities, fear, and privation, the Ukrainians have also reformed their democracy. They’ve stepped up the fight against corruption. They’ve brought their institutions up to EU standards. Remember: Ukraine has been fighting this war not just for the two years since February 2022, but for ten years, since Putin’s first invasion in 2014. And they’ve never given up on freedom and democracy. Ukraine doesn’t just deserve our support. They deserve our admiration. We can learn a lot from them about what it means to fight for freedom. Unfortunately, Republicans who initially supported Ukraine have since changed their tune. They want us to abandon our allies around the world and are even repeating Russian propaganda. On top of all this, the former president is now encouraging Vladimir Putin to attack NATO allies. **This is all unacceptable.** The Senate recently passed a bill for foreign aid, and Speaker Mike Johnson is preventing a vote on the bill. It’s time for House Republicans to support Ukraine, pass this bill, and help protect freedom around the world. Sarah Longwell
---

As a tried and true leader in Orange County who got her start on City Council, the choice between Kim and Michelle Steel is easy.

Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. Peter,

In a recent article about Fani Willis’ own testimony, several women including myself spoke about the ways in which we are singled out, picked apart, and subjected to attempts to invalidate and disqualify our work.

Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, taking on Trump for his interference in the 2020 election results in Georgia, is the latest target of baseless claims and false accusations. Similarly, NY Attorney General Letitia James faced some of the same unjust attacks throughout Trump’s fraud trial.

These two women are the latest chapter in Trump Republicans’ attempts to silence women.

[**But I’ve stood up to bullies throughout my life and my career — Trump is just another bully trying to silence those who dare to challenge his actions and hold him accountable. Will you chip in $10 now to support me as I continue to fight back against extremists like him?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79655678/457120597/-746082277?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KBG_20240223_FR_Trump_0_6MO_KeirBradford-Grey_NA_NA_Women&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzMjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTY2ODcyMDYtNDJkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jLxZcj0Yj7n2ykfpDpTcotzQHSsqxqyrIkHCpKj0xbc=) | **If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.**

This isn’t just about individual attacks on leaders like Fani Willis and Letitia James, it’s about the broader implications for women in roles across the country. We cannot continue to accept a reality where women are treated differently because of who we are and the positions we hold.

clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, In a recent article about Fani Willis’ own testimony, several women including myself spoke about the ways in which we are singled out, picked apart, and subjected to attempts to invalidate and disqualify our work. Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis, taking on Trump for his interference in the 2020 election results in Georgia, is the latest target of baseless claims and false accusations. Similarly, NY Attorney General Letitia James faced some of the same unjust attacks throughout Trump’s fraud trial. These two women are the latest chapter in Trump Republicans’ attempts to silence women. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = As a woman in politics, I’m no stranger to the pushback and racial attacks hurled towards those of us who fight tirelessly to do what’s right. Women are constantly under scrutiny — our every action dissected and criticized — all while working diligently to hold the powerful accountable and uphold the principles of our democracy. This isn’t just about individual attacks on leaders like Fani Willis and Letitia James, it’s about the broader implications for women in roles across the country. We cannot continue to accept a reality where women are treated differently because of who we are and the positions we hold. = | = Thank you for all your support, — Keir Bradford-Grey * | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

Peter – I introduced a bill that Ron DeSantis is going to _hate._

**I recently introduced the Fight Book Bans Act, a direct attack against DeSantis’ censorship in schools.** It’ll give school districts the funding to fight back when extremists like DeSantis try to ban books, control libraries, or otherwise mess with our students’ educations.

Because let’s be clear: Book bans aren’t just about the books. They’re an assault against our freedom. They hide _necessary_ truths. But with this bill, we’re making sure Black, brown, Hispanic, and LGBTQ+ stories get told.

[**_As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll never give up this fight. But I need your support to hold this seat against the fascists and special interests attacking students’ rights. Will you rush $27 to my campaign so I can keep fighting extremism, censorship, and fascism? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/sYQRqSsUApP2rotQEY-cxg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnvLotP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDIyNF9lbV9mcl9iMV9ib29rYmFuYmlsbF9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yY204bnptbU5jbENZaXhMV3VZaEo1T0tzMkImcmVmY29kZTI9MmNtOG56bW1OY2xDWWl4TFd1WWhKNU9LczJCJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJjbThuem1tTmNsQ1lpeExXdVloSjVPS3MyQlcDc3BjQgpl1C012mX3dBAnUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
**Peter, we have to act _now_ because the fascists are getting bolder by the minute.** Last year, Florida led the nation in this kind of censorship: _40% of ALL book bans nationwide happened in Florida schools._

School boards, school districts, and _students_ are on the frontlines of this war on education. **But I refuse to let fascists and Republican extremists erase the history of communities of color, or silence the voices of marginalized identities.**

That’s why we need to stand together in this fight, but I need your support to keep our movement strong – and keep me in Congress, where I can keep pushing for widespread change.

[**_My campaign needs to raise $10,500 today to keep fighting for students, democracy, and the truth. clean_body: | | ~~ Peter – I introduced a bill that Ron DeSantis is going to hate. I recently introduced the Fight Book Bans Act, a direct attack against DeSantis’ censorship in schools. It’ll give school districts the funding to fight back when extremists like DeSantis try to ban books, control libraries, or otherwise mess with our students’ educations. Because let’s be clear: Book bans aren’t just about the books. They’re an assault against our freedom. They hide necessary truths. But with this bill, we’re making sure Black, brown, Hispanic, and LGBTQ+ stories get told. ~~ Peter, we have to act now because the fascists are getting bolder by the minute. Last year, Florida led the nation in this kind of censorship: 40% of ALL book bans nationwide happened in Florida schools. School boards, school districts, and students are on the frontlines of this war on education. But I refuse to let fascists and Republican extremists erase the history of communities of color, or silence the voices of marginalized identities. That’s why we need to stand together in this fight, but I need your support to keep our movement strong – and keep me in Congress, where I can keep pushing for widespread change. ~~ | | ~~ ~~ | ~~ ~ | ~ Together in this fight, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. subject: 40 FBI Informants ! ! !
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e74bd39b7054d55a8aa218a8cfdea74&_e=efaJR9QdzsOj7ARBablOUrsX_wzLAuWhYOO53LFDVAsVghWieLGlALyEqdRaWKopgJ76H9g4m1yr-oF38WfM8HwdezgRHEp-uomXL6tuwiXZF9rdCm-5CeNfF0oBEGQ_LwDlPgkQUK1xi0RNTCygIugYSgvGWTo97qnsfSCKSgGEO_VJYdWym-w_jMjDSeXOlFbie-71KY_D2vXqlezWN1udZhZzfFI7MmExvFrecwzCIEOFQj-LozwDjPCs3oxUiefBodOnKZx4CekMGdy_PjSB1wZ2M5Enle2MYIEUN6J2Xh5Ec2NbSxh2KUFcN4jgz7npJLgJU7GCpkPWIG9fy1s_hAV_2Kui9RQczMBdqNBCENZBav-3QBubLxzrrmq-)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e74bd39b7054d55a8aa218a8cfdea74&_e=efaJR9QdzsOj7ARBablOUrsX_wzLAuWhYOO53LFDVAsVghWieLGlALyEqdRaWKopgJ76H9g4m1yr-oF38WfM8HwdezgRHEp-uomXL6tuwiXZF9rdCm-5CeNfF0oBEGQ_LwDlPgkQUK1xi0RNTCygIugYSgvGWTo97qnsfSCKSgGEO_VJYdWym-w_jMjDSeXOlFbie-71KY_D2vXqlezWN1udZhZzfFI7MmExvFrecwxwtKGSTrvFlihq6dcJRK6iRvy5xmF4qhTYQi27UF5-_6dFDUERpo_kCLFU-mw1E8jhEv-lVeQTmZJR_XGfHf6Eh5Z7WvoNiNzxbF_JUyYmTpiYjdth7CFdGjdDYcCyeB_QFqRMZDP1Q9uSOXsrC5x9)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e74bd39b7054d55a8aa218a8cfdea74&_e=efaJR9QdzsOj7ARBablOUrsX_wzLAuWhYOO53LFDVAsVghWieLGlALyEqdRaWKopgJ76H9g4m1yr-oF38WfM8HwdezgRHEp-uomXL6tuwiXZF9rdCm-5CeNfF0oBEGQ_LwDlPgkQUK1xi0RNTCygIugYSgvGWTo97qnsfSCKSgGEO_VJYdWym-w_jMjDSeXOlFbie-71KY_D2vXqlezWN1udZhZzfFI7MmExvFrecwyW5yxaQN_K_2SGmROpEMJdS9sICmBYW87wBLhyA4SHQYz70tIqjUrl-9N-6N5VjssnJsHG5F9CMTA1Hdvbg1q9nbGi50m1r3x2knaUM388tq9c7BUouE_XgoVOiOyzxqBqfiZIm6FKaN3LWamQ9EeV)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=6e74bd39b7054d55a8aa218a8cfdea74&_e=efaJR9QdzsOj7ARBablOUrsX_wzLAuWhYOO53LFDVAsVghWieLGlALyEqdRaWKopgJ76H9g4m1yr-oF38WfM8HwdezgRHEp-uomXL6tuwiXZF9rdCm-5CeNfF0oBEGQ_LwDlPgkQUK1xi0RNTCygIugYSgvGWTo97qnsfSCKSgGEO_VJYdWym-w_jMjDSeXOlFbie-71KY_D2vXqlezWN1udZhZzfFI7MmExvFrecwzQq9a3KSGpUFzEF9SnSfXuxc1J0Q68NGN56q_LgvGV442qTF2wYqG92tzS0von4H-QPxhzOEhQmXELCMBMLM2G2_ij2ajmPWpqi0fBJPrTiw9BMkxhx4jbxIZtuSIh4eBWvL1_I0B5cnRPzXH2hm4C)

name: Alsobrooks HQ
subject: Here's your weekly Team Alsobrooks Newsletter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13)

| | Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks, The past week on the campaign trail has been truly extraordinary! Thank you for all of your support, your commitment to our team is truly inspiring. Take a look below for some highlights from the campaign trail: In Upper Marlboro, we were joined by many friends, some of whom have been a part of Team Alsobrooks for almost 20 years. It means the world to us to know that these awesome people are providing support to the campaign in any way they can. They know that together we will stand up for families and communities across Maryland. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=25&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) Thank you to Selva Jayaraman and Prathiba Ramadoss for opening your home in Montgomery County for such an incredible dialogue. What an amazing way to spend our Saturday afternoon! Great to see Comptroller Brooke Lierman and to celebrate everyone’s birthday together! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=26&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=27&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) We had a wonderful conversation with members of the Caribbean American Community in Silver Spring. Special thanks to the Baird and Samuels families for gathering such a remarkable crowd and serving some delicious Caribbean food! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=28&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) What a spectacular way to kick off door knocking last Sunday. We were blown away by the amount of people who showed up to help us expand our campaign. This is how our people-powered movement wins – with everyone showing up and showing out to spread our message! Thank you to Congressman Jamie Raskin and Delegate Jheanelle Wilkins for getting folks fired up and hitting the pavement with us! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=29&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) We met with a fabulous group at Windsor Crossing Senior Community where we talked about the need for better representation in the U.S. Senate. Thank you to Elsie Jacobs for hosting an extraordinary event! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=30&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) We had an amazing visit to UMBC to learn more about the innovative research and work taking place on campus. It was great to meet with university leadership and students to hear more about all the exciting things happening on campus! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=31&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) We had a robust conversation with educators from Frederick County Public Schools about their mission to inspire, innovate, and motivate students. While we’ve made strides in education across the State, there is so much more we can do to support teachers, students, and parents. Successful school systems are imperative to shaping the next generations and their prosperity. [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=32&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) Later that evening we met with folks in Frederick and discussed our plans for moving Maryland forward. Thank you to Citizens for Responsible Growth for hosting such a fantastic gathering! [](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12308?t=23&amount=25&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13) **UPCOMING EVENTS** **Saturday, February 24** \- Salisbury Meet and Greet - **[RSVP Here](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12176?t=7&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13)**
**Sunday, February 25th** \- Easton Meet and Greet - **[RSVP Here](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/12177?t=8&akid=1114%2E52803%2EUTDm13)**

clean_body: | | | Greetings #TeamAlsobrooks, The past week on the campaign trail has been truly extraordinary! Thank you for all of your support, your commitment to our team is truly inspiring. Take a look below for some highlights from the campaign trail: In Upper Marlboro, we were joined by many friends, some of whom have been a part of Team Alsobrooks for almost 20 years. It means the world to us to know that these awesome people are providing support to the campaign in any way they can. They know that together we will stand up for families and communities across Maryland. Thank you to Selva Jayaraman and Prathiba Ramadoss for opening your home in Montgomery County for such an incredible dialogue. What an amazing way to spend our Saturday afternoon! Great to see Comptroller Brooke Lierman and to celebrate everyone’s birthday together! We had a wonderful conversation with members of the Caribbean American Community in Silver Spring. Special thanks to the Baird and Samuels families for gathering such a remarkable crowd and serving some delicious Caribbean food! What a spectacular way to kick off door knocking last Sunday. We were blown away by the amount of people who showed up to help us expand our campaign. This is how our people-powered movement wins – with everyone showing up and showing out to spread our message! Thank you to Congressman Jamie Raskin and Delegate Jheanelle Wilkins for getting folks fired up and hitting the pavement with us! We met with a fabulous group at Windsor Crossing Senior Community where we talked about the need for better representation in the U.S. Senate. Thank you to Elsie Jacobs for hosting an extraordinary event! We had an amazing visit to UMBC to learn more about the innovative research and work taking place on campus. It was great to meet with university leadership and students to hear more about all the exciting things happening on campus! We had a robust conversation with educators from Frederick County Public Schools about their mission to inspire, innovate, and motivate students. While we’ve made strides in education across the State, there is so much more we can do to support teachers, students, and parents. Successful school systems are imperative to shaping the next generations and their prosperity. Later that evening we met with folks in Frederick and discussed our plans for moving Maryland forward. Thank you to Citizens for Responsible Growth for hosting such a fantastic gathering! name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Rick Scott's biggest fear:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
downright bone-chilling
| | |
---
Friend, there's a lot that keeps Rick Scott up at night.
Medicare and Social Security help millions of Americans access affordable health care and retire with dignity. (_Horrifying!_)
The prospect of working families paying less in taxes than mega-millionaires like him. (_Terrifying!_)
Senate Democrats have passed legislation to boost our economy, create new jobs, protect our environment, and rebuild our infrastructure. (_Downright BONE-CHILLING!_)
**But there's one thing that Rick Scott’s most afraid of ... _Debbie Mucarsel-Powell._**
Debbie is everything that Rick Scott is not. She's a proud advocate for working families. She's a bold leader for reproductive rights. She's a lifelong public servant who's proven her commitment to Florida. She’s a full-time caretaker for her mother, who relies on programs that Rick Scott has tried to cut, like Social Security and Medicare. Debbie understands how these vital, life-saving programs make our communities better. She's a candidate who Florida voters truly believe in.
Debbie is hardworking, kind, and honest. **She's got what it takes to defeat Rick Scott. And scariest of all — s _he's polling 1 point ahead of him._**
Rick Scott knows he bought this seat last time. He knows this seat is his to lose. He knows that Florida voters are sick and tired of his lies and extremism. **That's why he's spent more on attack ads than any other GOP Senate candidate so far. Debbie is counting on your help to fight back. [Please, will you rush $5 to flip Florida blue and make Rick Scott's worst nightmare come true? In a race as close as this one, every single dollar counts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79657028/457122322/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk806-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTRjM2I4NmEtNDNkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oJmkO6yDQexXBSWyPzOHC1kgmZWm8chg7mgrNZTdioU=)**

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Invitation: Country Star John Rich + YOU
body:
Trust me, you've NEVER received an offer like this before. Never.

| |
---
| | | Y'all -

This is Marsha Blackburn. Trust me, you've NEVER received an offer like this before. Never.

Country star John Rich (from Big & Rich) is hosting a PRIVATE CONCERT - in his home - benefitting my fight to protect Tennessee and protect America. The guest list is short, and the night will be unforgettable.

_**[I'm setting aside two tickets for a lucky winner, and I'm personally inviting you to enter as a thank you for all of your recent support.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4e8716bb503a47a397da07adbd641b84&_e=v0UZfDGZ8Ot0NbhG7mLw95wdNtFnJzbpMD5pKLsXojlg6POJU4MzXKgV9ZbCp03XvZSHI6IWjDJXML1ZxVA4JaOheZ3pBGUaAsRW2JvInXQf6OJe-K2scMQg-BReZmS392qX0DAkdDPas9LmaYHChTDU7-IyjnTEHdnxl9zBV_Pj5iYi9jhlkFLLkZ2FtVLvS9lZ98GgZfvgXJeugk4mlUM9TEaWzr6lH9kVrOO7KPTP5ZI2eFQai74Ryh2rZ5p79rss_fCrCgSai8jOqOSulGZp3ivap5umKkK9_Zef_VVjTV-OZ8Jpkc7hktGn-azUYbyQPz9dXbk8RF0A-bwQMJaTe1ReIyL0jsWP-x_ghlIyhY2U_qAwCM09TDzMe1E9RAoGDAmspPsfgjV7WyX1RiZOaUT4NwLqzXm32WRdpP0%3D "I’m setting aside two tickets for a lucky winner, and I’m personally inviting you to enter as a thank you for all of your recent support.")**_
_*** Invitation for you ***_

**Who:** John Rich + Marsha Blackburn + YOU
**What:** A Night of Country Music with John Rich
**Where:** Nashville, Tennessee
---
| | | [Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4e8716bb503a47a397da07adbd641b84&_e=v0UZfDGZ8Ot0NbhG7mLw95wdNtFnJzbpMD5pKLsXojlg6POJU4MzXKgV9ZbCp03XvZSHI6IWjDJXML1ZxVA4JaOheZ3pBGUaAsRW2JvInXQf6OJe-K2scMQg-BReZmS392qX0DAkdDPas9LmaYHChTDU7-IyjnTEHdnxl9zBV_Pj5iYi9jhlkFLLkZ2FtVLvS9lZ98GgZfvgXJeugk4mlUM9TEaWzr6lH9kVrOO7KPTP5ZI2eFQai74Ryh2rZ5p7TYpNfqzhP3EzkH-UoIztHveIugIYPJNz4nzwraW_UV-zfFUB3DtIIvtpXQsjJYTFxp7DrnOUxlM8IfeSFsQMUN56zBL71-y2hJ6jhox1HPj3J63k1hPpnQy_l5jZKoMqLAnM9IynYTEweuR6OhQIAmc4P3cyP8NFypaGRMPuq-k%3D "Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win")
---
I've known John Rich for a long time. He loves conservative principles, he loves Tennessee, he loves country music, he loves God, and he loves this country. He and I share that in common.

**That 's why we get along so well - and something tells me you'd fit right in. **

Entering this unforgettable sweepstakes is simple. By chipping in any amount (yes, even just a few bucks), you'll be automatically entered to win. It won't take more than a few minutes of your time.

_**[The only thing I ask is that you enter as soon as possible. The window for entering is closing fast.](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4e8716bb503a47a397da07adbd641b84&_e=v0UZfDGZ8Ot0NbhG7mLw95wdNtFnJzbpMD5pKLsXojlg6POJU4MzXKgV9ZbCp03XvZSHI6IWjDJXML1ZxVA4JaOheZ3pBGUaAsRW2JvInXQf6OJe-K2scMQg-BReZmS392qX0DAkdDPas9LmaYHChTDU7-IyjnTEHdnxl9zBV_Pj5iYi9jhlkFLLkZ2FtVLvS9lZ98GgZfvgXJeugk4mlUM9TEaWzr6lH9kVrOO7KPTP5ZI2eFQai74Ryh2rZ5p7-RCOP7MjdxRjhhmGt6O3kFd_TN_HlX1fQGts-ZkYRmEiRNW09ZiAfLuUbcqrGQ0xjJfM46prl2OvzOTXJ1sCVDyu7eoKgqzCh4ZdXA0gmrXy2mmLUhx2-setJw-ui3wIhETWKB4IqSKK4wKBZntBeT3Ad4kM6aaG-FXc2-FO44Q%3D "The only thing I ask is that you enter as soon as possible. _If you put this off, and someone else wins, would you regret not responding in time? _

I'd really love to see you there. Make sure to enter now!

Country star John Rich (from Big & Rich) is hosting a PRIVATE CONCERT - in his home - benefitting my fight to protect Tennessee and protect America. The guest list is short, and the night will be unforgettable. "I’m setting aside two tickets for a lucky winner, and I’m personally inviting you to enter as a thank you for all of your recent support." * Invitation for you Who: John Rich + Marsha Blackburn + YOU What: A Night of Country Music with John Rich Where: Nashville, Tennessee | | | "Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win" I've known John Rich for a long time. He loves conservative principles, he loves Tennessee, he loves country music, he loves God, and he loves this country. He and I share that in common. That 's why we get along so well - and something tells me you'd fit right in. Entering this unforgettable sweepstakes is simple. By chipping in any amount (yes, even just a few bucks), you'll be automatically entered to win. It won't take more than a few minutes of your time. "The only thing I ask is that you enter as soon as possible. The window for entering is closing fast."** If you put this off, and someone else wins, would you regret not responding in time? I'd really love to see you there. Make sure to enter now! | | | "Accept Your Invite To Enter To Win" Thank you, Marsha Blackburn | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. Friend, my name is Tamie Wilson and I’m a Democrat, business owner, and strong woman running to DEFEAT Jim Jordan and flip his seat into Democratic hands come November.

**[Before we go any further, I have to ask: Can I count on you to donate $30 (or whatever you can afford) to help me send Jim Jordan into political retirement?](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTQwODUzODk4OTU5OTI1NDMsXCJyXCI6MTE0MDg1NDE0NjEzMDI2NDAzfSIsInMiOiJjMjFjMjA4YmNhMzA4OTVjIn0)**

**Let’s be honest: Jim Jordan is a fraud, liar, and he’s actively working to undermine our democracy. Frankly, our country can’t afford another term of Jim Jordan in Congress.

** His vanity run for Speaker, his obstruction of an immigration deal, his support for Trump’s election lies, and so much more have proven beyond a shadow of a doubt: **Jim Jordan doesn’t belong in Congress!** Earlier this week in New York, we saw that Democrats CAN win tough seats when they run principled, efficient campaigns.

I’m running that same playbook here in Ohio. And I’m confident that, _with your support,_ we can beat Jim Jordan at the ballot box and save our democracy from the radical right.

**Are you with me? If so, click this special link to donate TODAY and help us build our campaign:****[secure.actblue.com/twOH](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTQwODUzODk5MDc1MjY4ODIsXCJyXCI6MTE0MDg1NDE0NjEzMDI2NDAzfSIsInMiOiJjMTJmYmUwMWUxNWRmODBmIn0)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, my name is Tamie Wilson and I’m a Democrat, business owner, and strong woman running to DEFEAT Jim Jordan and flip his seat into Democratic hands come November. | | | | | Let’s be honest: Jim Jordan is a fraud, liar, and he’s actively working to undermine our democracy. Frankly, our country can’t afford another term of Jim Jordan in Congress. His vanity run for Speaker, his obstruction of an immigration deal, his support for Trump’s election lies, and so much more have proven beyond a shadow of a doubt: Jim Jordan doesn’t belong in Congress! Earlier this week in New York, we saw that Democrats CAN win tough seats when they run principled, efficient campaigns. I’m running that same playbook here in Ohio. And I’m confident that, with your support, we can beat Jim Jordan at the ballot box and save our democracy from the radical right. Are you with me? If so, click this special link to donate TODAY and help us build our campaign: Supporters like you are the engine that powers this campaign. I couldn’t be more grateful. Your friend, Tamie Wilson | | | | | | | Tamie Wilson Candidate for Congress (OH-4) | | | | | | | | Mail checks to: Tamie Wilson for US 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

Since they regained the House majority, Republicans have launched a relentless barrage of attacks on women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community and our most vulnerable citizens -- prioritizing their extreme base over real issues facing Americans.

We need a fighter to represent CA-30. **Laura is that fighter.**

She is a proven progressive leader who has been at the forefront of efforts to protect and expand our supply of affordable housing, defend reproductive health care and protect our scenic mountains and rivers.

I know we can count on Laura to be a critical ally as we tackle the real challenges facing California and the country.

**But Laura’s primary is one of the most crowded in the state, and with the March 5 primary around the corner, we need to ensure she has the resources to progress to the November ballot.**

[**Please make a $3 contribution to Laura's campaign today. clean_body: | = Hi friend, it’s Judy Chu, proudly representing California’s 28th Congressional District and member of the Congressional Progressive Caucus. I’m asking today for your support for Laura Friedman, the best choice to succeed Adam Schiff in Congress in CA-30. = | **= Since they regained the House majority, Republicans have launched a relentless barrage of attacks on women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community and our most vulnerable citizens -- prioritizing their extreme base over real issues facing Americans. We need a fighter to represent CA-30. Laura is that fighter. She is a proven progressive leader who has been at the forefront of efforts to protect and expand our supply of affordable housing, defend reproductive health care and protect our scenic mountains and rivers. I know we can count on Laura to be a critical ally as we tackle the real challenges facing California and the country. But Laura’s primary is one of the most crowded in the state, and with the March 5 primary around the corner, we need to ensure she has the resources to progress to the November ballot. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your time and support, Judy Chu | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! | | Peter — I'm sure your inboxes are currently filled with emails asking for donations, especially as we get closer to the March 5th primary. I know it can be a lot — even my inbox winds up looking a little crowded (sometimes with emails like this one from my opponents 😉). Sometimes, supporters at our events will ask me — do email donations really make a difference for our campaign? **My answer? Donations from these emails make an even bigger difference than most people realize.** This campaign's key strength is our grassroots base of donors and supporters. Over the past year, thousands of people like you in CA-30 and across the state (and country!) have pitched in to help us grow our movement into something viable — **a movement that is connecting with voters all across our district and is ready to head straight to Washington.** All of the donations we've received via email over the last few months — $100 from Toluca Lake, $25 from West Hollywood, $10 from Glendale, and countless more — have funded our outreach efforts tremendously, funding our digital and mail efforts and helping our team knock more doors. Rival campaigns are focused on spending thousands on polling, ads, and outreach, but there is one thing that our team has that other 'frontrunners' in this race don't — **a grassroots base of supporters made up of people like you, Peter.** [**We are just ten days out from our March 5th primary. Whether you have given before or this is your first donation, I'd be honored if you could give whatever you can today to support our campaign and help us come out on top. name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: Are you on board? Join Team Biden-Harris for the State of the Union!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The State of the Union is fast approaching, and President Biden is counting on this team to rally behind him. | | |
---
Peter: The State of the Union is fast approaching -- circle Thursday, March 7 on your calendars! -- and President Biden is counting on this team to rally behind him and say you are, "On Board.” While the opposition is busy flooding the airwaves, the President and Vice President are counting on this team to share their message of positivity and progress. The State of the Union is a big moment to shine a light on that story! There are a few ways that you can show you're on board today:
1. **Host a Watch Party:** [Yes, you! Set the stage, invite your friends and neighbors, and host a watch party. **Will you commit to vote in the 2024 elections? **

_This link to our LIVE POLL was generated for dpwillis67@gmail.com only. Deadline: 11:59 p.m._

Right now, **Emerge is readying hundreds of bold Democratic women to run for office THIS YEAR. **With Emerge women running for office up and down the ballot, we can fight the MAGA agenda at every level of our government and secure our essential rights for generations to come.
We’ve seen major successes every year, from stopping the red wave in 2022 to building powerful Democratic trifectas in battleground states. Emerge women just held the Virginia state Senate and flipped the House of Delegates blue! **But none of those wins would be possible without Emerge supporters like you. **
From abortion access to the future of voting rights and our democracy, the stakes in the November elections couldn’t be higher. **That’s why the GOP is counting on our movement to step back, slow down, and stay quiet. We can’t let that happen. **
**Together, our dedication to our communities and our rights must be stronger than the GOP’s cynical and dangerous tactics. But we have to know if supporters like you can hold the line in this fight. Please, Peter, we’re asking 5,000 Emerge supporters including you to make a commitment right now:**
| | **Will you commit to vote in the 2024 elections? **

One year ago, January 6 Peaceful Protester Kevin Seefried was sentenced to three years in federal prison.

Did he attack the U.S. Capitol Police? No.

Did he break windows? No.

**Kevin was sentenced to three years in prison because he carried a Confederate flag through the U.S. Capitol building on Jan. 6, 2021.**

The NBC News headline says it all:

“Man who carried a Confederate Flag in the Capitol on Jan. 6 is sentenced to 3 years.”

**You’ll notice there isn’t one word there about the crimes he allegedly committed ... just the flag.**

U.S. District Judge Trevor McFadden, incredibly a Trump appointee, blasted Ken’s carrying of the flag as "shocking" and "outrageous." Just goes to show that all of the establishment judges on the DC Federal Court are compromised, if not corrupt!

**Kevin carried the flag only as a symbol of protest, not to support racism or slavery. And the Confederate Flag is not such a symbol in any event, but instead Southern pride!**

But that didn’t save him ... neither did his forced public apology.

What’s worse, the federal prosecutor wanted Kevin to serve 70 months – 5 years and 10 months – in prison for his “crimes!”

**Meanwhile, Black Lives Matter and Antifa thugs who’ve rioted, burned down businesses, beaten, and terrorized everyday Americans haven’t even been ARRESTED!**

This is outrageous!

**To be frank, I feel a growing sense of urgency about January 6 patriots. They need a legal breakthrough SOON.**

And you’re the key to making these pivotal fights as effective as possible.

**[Patriot, please help fully fund these critical fights for our innocent fellow Americans with your best gift right now of $25, $50, $100 or more.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxcjz2PozAQQH_N0IHMjDGkoLg7RIpI12-1MrYJXjExMSYo_35FFG2x7XtP86F5mf34bKH-C4iTtysgAv0BxPvHznH74ss5Xy7nkN_Vf64Oi_8AMT0X95O-pxSOtZ8PWneZbWm0QmauLWvRNKKkirKpbQZra9UMozBNRYpKWykzDIhO2kGZU-ZbFCgFoixPAgkLXUtVoiQ7khKVrECK155Cs4ve6HJNu44xBC5M4Gxup5SW9XVYD9iP0TkbeNfJTEV0j0dhAmC_RL-GWz6GmI-zvuY85IGB-i3x5xq2aBxQ9ysCVIdmZ_3GQF3gNzGaF-2vN6COhzdLLh7NHktApTlstwTUYZXF1i67n2e_qhqkuL5-MYG_AwAA__-yuXwy)**

In Justice,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
