name: Alaskans For Honest Elections
subject: We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Honest Elections, 2521 E Mtn Village Dr #904 Wasilla, AK 99654 Phillip Izon, Director Approved This Message
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65da840d9d98413dcd9f2106&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65d8edc104287265c0875ca2%26ss_email_id%3D65da840d9d98413dcd9f2106%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2BDid%2BIt%252C%2BRepeal%2Bof%2BRCV%2Bis%2Bon%2Bthe%2Bballot%2521%2521%2521%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-02-25T00%253A04%253A35Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65d8edc104287265c0875ca2&l=en-US&s=fnB7BsbLTfOoXgZfewC4AnWc77Y%3D)
---
|
---
|
---
### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
#### **How did we get here?**
---
**October / November 2022, Before the November 2022 election, we initiated a petition, bravely submitting it on November 23rd, a day marked with anticipation for election results. Our action was more than just timely; it was a testament to our foresight and commitment to our cause. We submitted our signatures to remove**[**#RankedChoiceVoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65da840d9d98413dcd9f2106&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65d8edc104287265c0875ca2&l=en-US&s=OHaeikTR1AIVK0uOb8vBNzkBvJM%3D)**prior to knowing the results. Why? We like most of Alaska knew what the results would be. Alaskans didn't show up to vote. Alaska had disheartening voter turnout in 2022 (44.38%), which was the lowest in state history and coincided with the first use of ranked choice voting. Our group, though underfunded and inexperienced, was driven by a belief in our mission, standing as true underdogs in the face of daunting opposition. Our adversaries were formidable, backed by immense "dark money" interests. Yet, each attack, each challenge only strengthened our resolve. Even when faced with espionage and false narratives, our spirit remained unbroken, fueled by an unwavering determination. Now, a year later, we stand stronger and more knowledgeable. We've unraveled the complexities of the "RCV Dragon," understanding its foundation in dark political maneuvers. We see ranked choice voting as a threat to the very fabric of our Alaskan Republic, an obstacle that must be overcome. This story is not just about a struggle; it's a call to action. It's an invitation to join a movement to protect and uplift the democratic process. The incredible effort of over 700 volunteers, gathering over 40,000 signatures – far exceeding the required 26,000 – is a testament to what can be achieved through collective effort and unwavering dedication. Join this crusade to remove ranked choice voting in 2024. Be a part of this historic moment, and help steer Alaska towards a future where every vote truly counts, and our republic thrives in its purest form. Your voice, your support, can be the difference in this pivotal chapter of Alaskan history.**
---
#### **Where We Go From Here?**
---
---
|
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon
---

**The Pro-RCV Group Hired a “SPY” & “LIED” “STOLE” & Lost Anyway!!!****Imagine a scene straight out of a spy novel: The Pro-Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) group, in a twist of espionage, allegedly hired a 'spy' to infiltrate and disrupt the grassroots movement against RCV, and Stole 2 of our Petition Books, which we filed a Police Report on. But the plot thickens. In a bold move, the Pro-RCV group and their attorney attempted to persuade the State of Alaska to shut down our constitutional right to petition the government. Fortunately, the State stood firm and declined their request.****This isn’t fiction. It’s the reality of our ongoing battle to uphold our Republic in Alaska. We emerged victorious in this clash, but the war is far from over.****Our determination is stronger than ever, reflected in the over 34,000 signatures we've gathered so far, a number that continues to grow each day.****Our focus now turns to Anchorage Districts 14 through 18, where our efforts need to intensify. Below, you'll find an up-to-date chart detailing our progress and the work that lies ahead. Your support and participation are crucial. Join us in this fight to preserve our right to petition and shape the future of voting in Alaska.**

---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**

Share with 5-10 people. | | | | | We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality. Press Release FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASEAlaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting Anchorage, Alaska– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans."This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger)."We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state."We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon. | | | | We Did The Impossible We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024 How did we get here? October / November 2022, Before the November 2022 election, we initiated a petition, bravely submitting it on November 23rd, a day marked with anticipation for election results. Our action was more than just timely; it was a testament to our foresight and commitment to our cause. We submitted our signatures to remove to knowing the results. Why? We like most of Alaska knew what the results would be. Alaskans didn't show up to vote. Alaska had disheartening voter turnout in 2022 (44.38%), which was the lowest in state history and coincided with the first use of ranked choice voting. Our group, though underfunded and inexperienced, was driven by a belief in our mission, standing as true underdogs in the face of daunting opposition. Our adversaries were formidable, backed by immense "dark money" interests. Yet, each attack, each challenge only strengthened our resolve. Even when faced with espionage and false narratives, our spirit remained unbroken, fueled by an unwavering determination. Now, a year later, we stand stronger and more knowledgeable. We've unraveled the complexities of the "RCV Dragon," understanding its foundation in dark political maneuvers. We see ranked choice voting as a threat to the very fabric of our Alaskan Republic, an obstacle that must be overcome. This story is not just about a struggle; it's a call to action. It's an invitation to join a movement to protect and uplift the democratic process. The incredible effort of over 700 volunteers, gathering over 40,000 signatures – far exceeding the required 26,000 – is a testament to what can be achieved through collective effort and unwavering dedication. Join this crusade to remove ranked choice voting in 2024. Be a part of this historic moment, and help steer Alaska towards a future where every vote truly counts, and our republic thrives in its purest form. Your voice, your support, can be the difference in this pivotal chapter of Alaskan history. Where We Go From Here? | The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon In a land of breathtaking mountains and icy wonders, a story unfolds – a tale of determination and unity among the people of Alaska. This is the story of how over 700 Alaskan volunteers, driven by a shared purpose, embarked on a quest to challenge the mighty Ranked Choice Voting Dragon. It began as a murmur among the people, a shared sentiment that grew into a roaring call for change. The Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, a formidable creature reigning over the electoral landscape, needed to be confronted. To do this, a band of brave volunteers united, each one as determined as the other, each one a proud Alaskan. Their mission was daunting: to gather 40,000 signatures from across the vast and rugged terrain of Alaska, a number far exceeding the required 26,000. This was no small feat in a land where distances are great and the elements unforgiving. But the spirit of Alaskans is strong and resilient, born of the land they call home. From the fishing villages to the snow-capped peaks, from the bustling streets of Anchorage to the remote corners of the wilderness, these volunteers ventured. They worked tirelessly, their voices echoing the sentiment of thousands, their efforts a testament to their dedication to their cause and to their state. In every signature collected, there was a story – a story of an Alaskan who believed in the power of unity and the importance of their voice. Each signature was a pledge, a commitment to the vision of a different future, a future shaped by the will of the people. As they reached and surpassed their goal, the volunteers knew that their journey was about more than signatures. It was a journey of empowerment, a demonstration of what can be achieved when Alaskans come together for a common purpose. Their effort, By Alaskans, For Alaskans, was a beacon of hope and a symbol of the indomitable Alaskan spirit. And so, the story of these volunteers, their quest against the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon, became a legend, a reminder of the power of unity and the strength of the Alaskan heart. It was a story that would be told for generations, inspiring others to stand together, for their state, for their beliefs, and for each other.Thank You All for Your Support,~Phil Izon 550+ Petition Books Returned Mail your petition book after getting it notarized to: Phil Izon - 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla, AK 99654 - Call if you need helptel:+19078028116 Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: The looming threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Putin will not stop. If he succeeds in conquering Ukraine he will move on to the Baltic States, Finland, Poland. NATO states.
#
For 75 years, NATO has kept the peace.
It was a peace brokered by strength — by a mutual commitment between European and American democracies to defend one another. Not perfect, but an incredible achievement.
That peace is at risk.
Russia invaded Ukraine on this day two years ago. That invasion led to bipartisan cooperation and a massive humanitarian and military aid package aimed at helping Ukraine fight off Russian invaders and defend its people.
Over the last two years that bipartisan cooperation has degraded. Republicans in the House and Senate take their orders from Trump, and Trump seems to take his directly from Putin.
Puppets for Putin, whose imperialist aims put the whole of Europe at risk. Putin will not stop. If he succeeds in conquering Ukraine he will move on to the Baltic States, Finland, Poland. NATO states.
And if that happens, it would cause World War III. That conflict will not spare American troops and American families.
VoteVets was founded by Veterans of Iraq and Afghanistan. We worked for years to stop those wars, and to make sure Veterans got the care they earned when they came home.
We know war. That’s why we’re working to prevent the next one.
And we need your help.
**[Please, help us push Congressional Republicans to pass aid for Ukraine. Add your name and demand action. We have to help them hold the line, because there is too much at risk to let them fall.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240223_vv_em_ukraine/?source=em240224-1-30?refcode2=24926.3013755.dBbNXo&akid=24926%2E3013755%2EdBbNXo)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240223_vv_em_ukraine/?source=em240224-1-30?refcode2=24926.3013755.dBbNXo&akid=24926%2E3013755%2EdBbNXo)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=24926%2E3013755%2EdBbNXo).

Hungary Gives Nod To Sweden’s NATO Bid After Months Of Holding Out

Hungary has given the go-ahead for Sweden to join NATO after holding
out for over a year, The New York Times reported Friday. Hungary was
the last NATO member to ratify Sweden’s bid to join the alliance, but
Prime Minister Viktor Orban said Friday the time had come to approve
it, according to NYT.

name: Sen. Rosen (D-NV)
subject: What matters to you, friend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
I got into politics because I wanted to shine a light on the issues that mattered most to working-class families like mine.
Growing up as the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence at a young age.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79661595/457129639/2128632416?amounts=250,,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3517-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWJmNmQ0ZS00OGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UiZd_4WJNBiu452v6Zw3dYQwcDQ4Tvl6oSG2J4NmFY=)
**Who I am and where I come from is why I will always fight to shine a light on the real issues Americans face, like finding good-paying jobs and lowering everyday costs.**
But right now, polls are showing me locked in a _dead heat_ against my extremist GOP opponent who is determined to bring all our progress to a grinding halt.
I'm the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts are saying Nevada will likely decide Senate _and_ White House control. This race is a critical moment for all Americans to show what issues matter most to us.
**[Will you give $5 or more right now to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and shine a light on the issues that matter most to Americans instead of the MAGA agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79661596/457129640/2128632416?amounts=250,,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3517-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWJmNmQ0ZS00OGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3UiZd_4WJNBiu452v6Zw3dYQwcDQ4Tvl6oSG2J4NmFY=)**

We have five days until our February fundraising deadline.
Kirsten is running to be a voice for all Arizonans — not a puppet for Donald Trump.
Her opponent has voted to restrict abortion access nationwide, take away resources from veterans and LGBTQ+ communities, slash clean energy jobs, and leave our border communities unsupported.
In 2022, Kirsten lost to her opponent by 1% — despite being outspent 6:1.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Media outlets claim Trump is attempting to “move to the center” on abortion. That’s a dangerous mischaracterization.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Donald Trump is an anti-abortion extremist. Any other description is a dangerous mischaracterization.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
News recently broke that Trump privately supports a 16-week federal abortion ban across the country — a ban that would erase access in states that have passed abortion protections. As the New York Times reported, "One thing Mr. Trump likes about a 16-week federal ban on abortions is that it’s a round number." So, we’re just picking numbers that feel fun. Got it. I like numbers too, so let me throw one out there: about a year after Trump’s Supreme Court justices helped overturn _Roe_ , 61 percent of Americans said they disagreed with that ruling. In fact, most people in our country want to see individuals and their doctors making decisions about abortion, not extremist politicians. Another thing: Media outlets claimed this was Trump’s attempt to "move to the center" on abortion ahead of the general election. **I just need to make this loud and clear: A national abortion ban that would take away a right that women now have in 23 states is not "moving to the center" on abortion rights. It’s continuing to swerve way over to the right.** [**It’s no secret that Donald Trump is an anti-abortion extremist. Any other description is a dangerous mischaracterization. So can you please split a contribution between the Biden-Harris campaign and our re-election campaign to strengthen our abortion rights movement and prevent MAGA extremists from passing a national ban?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=8&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa)
---

---
The vast majority of Americans agree that the government shouldn’t interfere with people’s personal decisions on abortion. The GOP and anti-abortion extremists know this, so they worked for years to force their unpopular agenda through hijacking the courts. But now that they’ve gotten their wish and overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , voters have been fighting back. In election after election ever since — in Kansas, in Michigan, in Ohio, and in Virginia — they keep reminding anti-abortion extremists how out of touch they really are. Now the GOP is attempting to soften and message-test their anti-abortion stances ahead of the 2024 election. They’re afraid of sounding too extreme. But here’s Donald Trump’s extreme anti-abortion record:
* He appointed anti-choice Supreme Court justices who overturned _Roe v. Wade_
* He’s boasted about being the president who “got rid of _Roe v. Wade_ ”
* He supports a national ban
* He said there has to be "some form of punishment" for women who get abortions

I won’t stop calling out the GOP’s extremism and fighting for the right to an abortion nationwide. That means electing pro-choice Democrats and ending the filibuster so we can codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. That means reversing right-wing takeover of our Supreme Court by working to expand and rebalance it. And that means supporting local candidates and ballot measures that will defend abortion rights at the state level. Wherever you are in America, if you care about abortion rights, if you care about protecting the right of people to have access to abortion, understand this: Donald Trump and the Republicans are coming for you — even if you live in a "safe" state right now. That’s why it’s so critical that we keep the White House and maintain our Senate majority. [**So please split a donation of $28 between my re-election and the Biden-Harris campaign so we can push back against MAGA Republicans' out-of-touch extremism and pass national abortion protections.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1900?amount=28&t=14&akid=1941%2E4032634%2EVGhyJa) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---

name: The Diem Team
subject: What is Dennis Kucinich doing at CPAC?
body:

body:
I want you to know that as Governor of Virginia, I will continue to defend our democracy, uphold our institutions, and protect our rights.

|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662441/457132245/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-24_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDliZTM4YWMtNGFkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VrRksXe3I8nzzR1nS3bWekFDKe5UscoQnncMxhKnwpA=)

| Peter,

Last month, I sent out a campaign survey to hear from people like you on which issues matter most to you and what you hope our campaign will prioritize.

We received an overwhelming number of responses from people everywhere, but one response that stood out was **concern for our democracy.**

In these last few weeks, it has become abundantly clear that Donald Trump is expected to be the Republican nominee for president this November.

As a Member of Congress and former CIA officer, I have taken an oath multiple times to protect and defend the Constitution, and I’ve seen how fragile democracy is, especially when extremists are undermining our institutions and sowing distrust. Like many Americans, I have been proud that our institutions held, not just during his four-year presidency but in the aftermath of the 2020 election and amid the efforts he led to undermine and overturn the results of that election.

However, our institutions did not hold on their own. They held because of people supporting them and protecting them – people across the spectrum from Administration appointees to Members of Congress to local and state elected officials to our fellow Americans willing to speak the truth.

**I want you to know that as Governor of Virginia, I will continue to defend our democracy, uphold our institutions, and protect our rights.[_I need your help, though. Will you join us today with a contribution?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662442/457132246/1993432125?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-02-24_Z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDliZTM4YWMtNGFkMy1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VrRksXe3I8nzzR1nS3bWekFDKe5UscoQnncMxhKnwpA=)**

Like many Americans, I have been proud that our institutions held, not just during his four-year presidency but in the aftermath of the 2020 election and amid the efforts he led to undermine and overturn the results of that election. However, our institutions did not hold on their own. They held because of people supporting them and protecting them – people across the spectrum from Administration appointees to Members of Congress to local and state elected officials to our fellow Americans willing to speak the truth. I want you to know that as Governor of Virginia, I will continue to defend our democracy, uphold our institutions, and protect our rights.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = = If you wish to receive fewer emails, . If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: I’m running for Congress for our kids
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
Our children deserve better than our current dysfunctional Congress

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662625/457132835/1433120897?refcode=email_022424_education&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZiZDkzZC00YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDZqUp6MhgcZj-8YNcevs6k8Dy_klsvi07POutl4bBA=) Since launching our campaign last month, a lot of people have asked me: why did you decide to run for Congress?

The reason is simple, and it’s the same reason I’ve had for taking on every challenge throughout my career: _for our children._

**[I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you agree that our children deserve better than our current dysfunctional Congress, I hope you’ll chip in to help me win in Michigan>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662626/457132836/1433120897?refcode=email_022424_education&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZiZDkzZC00YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDZqUp6MhgcZj-8YNcevs6k8Dy_klsvi07POutl4bBA=)**

Growing up, even when times were tough, my parents always told my sisters and me: “You are smart. You are powerful. You're going to college... Period.” It was never a question.

And thanks to their hard work, my sisters and I were the first people in our extended family to go to college.

**My own experiences have taught me that education is the game-changer in kids’ lives. A good, solid education from a young age determines the course of the rest of any child’s life.**

So as a Mom, making sure our kids had a good education was my top priority. That meant when any one of our kids was struggling in school, I was on the phone with the principal to try to get them the support they needed. But it is hard...

**Unfortunately, too many kids aren’t getting the education they deserve – and we need leaders who will adjust our priorities and drive better outcomes for our kids.**

This is an issue I have worked on for a long time. I was the Executive Director of the Michigan Headstart Association, where we fought for under-served preschoolers. I was Chief of Staff at the Michigan Department of Education, where we re-imagined public education in Michigan. I worked for The Skillman Foundation, where we drastically improved high school graduation rates in overlooked Detroit neighborhoods.

And in the State Senate, I created a plan to address the growing childcare crisis and passed a bill to empower teachers to focus more on our kids than standardized test scores.

My focus has always been improving the lives of Michigan’s kids and helping families find stability. That’s what I’ll keep doing in Congress – address the childcare crisis, improve teacher pay, and make sure every child in America has the opportunity to succeed.

**We can’t keep sacrificing our kids' education to political arguments. We need _real leaders_ in Congress who will get past all the dysfunction, put our kids first, and invest in our teachers and schools.

[If you’re like me and believe nothing is more important than supporting our kids and making sure they have every opportunity to thrive, will you chip in to help me win this race and get to Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662627/457132837/1433120897?refcode=email_022424_education&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZiZDkzZC00YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDZqUp6MhgcZj-8YNcevs6k8Dy_klsvi07POutl4bBA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79662628/457132838/1433120897?refcode=email_022424_education&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWZiZDkzZC00YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YDZqUp6MhgcZj-8YNcevs6k8Dy_klsvi07POutl4bBA=)

clean_body: Our children deserve better than our current dysfunctional Congress = Since launching our campaign last month, a lot of people have asked me: why did you decide to run for Congress? The reason is simple, and it’s the same reason I’ve had for taking on every challenge throughout my career: for our children. = Growing up, even when times were tough, my parents always told my sisters and me: “You are smart. You are powerful. You're going to college... Period.” It was never a question. And thanks to their hard work, my sisters and I were the first people in our extended family to go to college. My own experiences have taught me that education is the game-changer in kids’ lives. A good, solid education from a young age determines the course of the rest of any child’s life. So as a Mom, making sure our kids had a good education was my top priority. That meant when any one of our kids was struggling in school, I was on the phone with the principal to try to get them the support they needed. But it is hard... Unfortunately, too many kids aren’t getting the education they deserve – and we need leaders who will adjust our priorities and drive better outcomes for our kids. This is an issue I have worked on for a long time. I was the Executive Director of the Michigan Headstart Association, where we fought for under-served preschoolers. I was Chief of Staff at the Michigan Department of Education, where we re-imagined public education in Michigan. I worked for The Skillman Foundation, where we drastically improved high school graduation rates in overlooked Detroit neighborhoods. And in the State Senate, I created a plan to address the growing childcare crisis and passed a bill to empower teachers to focus more on our kids than standardized test scores. My focus has always been improving the lives of Michigan’s kids and helping families find stability. That’s what I’ll keep doing in Congress – address the childcare crisis, improve teacher pay, and make sure every child in America has the opportunity to succeed. We can’t keep sacrificing our kids' education to political arguments. We need real leaders in Congress who will get past all the dysfunction, put our kids first, and invest in our teachers and schools. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for taking the time to read this, Kristen | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. out for over a year, The New York Times reported Friday. Hungary was
the last NATO member to ratify Sweden’s bid to join the alliance, but

it, according to NYT.

Peter,

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: RE: upcoming Election
body:
|
---
| | Hi Peter - a lot of patriots don't like voting by mail and would prefer to vote in person.

But did you know that you can vote _**IN PERSON**_ starting today?

**You don't have to wait for Election Day on March 5. Early voting centers across Orange County are opening up TODAY to vote early and in person! **

Remember: _If you vote early, it allows our campaign to focus our remaining resources on persuading and turning out the Republicans who are less likely to vote._

**Voting early is one of the most helpful things you can do to help our campaign compete in these final days:**

1\. [Find your nearest open voting center at the link here.](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=dd8d546aab&e=86e91e802d)
2\. Visit the vote center during open hours - make sure it's open!
3\. Vote in person!

[**However you plan to vote, PLEASE rush in a contribution of $25, $50, or $100 TODAY to help us reach those lower-propensity Republican voters we need to turn out!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=66f0660cbe&e=86e91e802d)

Ten days left!

Team Max Ukropina

body:
Taking back the House this year is just as crucial as it was in 2016, 2018, and the years after.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79663508/457135635/-974650127?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2024-02-24_z&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGZiODg0NS00ZmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZaUqqH09js8OKOHlUSl2RgkYoCZZo9w4Cz8iJTncOy0=)

| Peter,

After Donald Trump won the New Hampshire Republican primary, he is one step closer to becoming the Republican nominee.

In the four years he was in office, he set the foundation for overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , weakened our social safety net, and led the January 6th insurrection. He set a precedent for anti-Democratic, hateful, and divisive rhetoric that we’ve yet to overcome. The New Hampshire results remind us we’ve got a tough road ahead of us.

Taking back the House this year is just as crucial as it was in 2016, 2018, and the years after. **As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I’m working to help elect Latino progressives to Congress. I can’t do it without your help, Peter. In the four years he was in office, he set the foundation for overturning Roe v. Wade , weakened our social safety net, and led the January 6th insurrection. He set a precedent for anti-Democratic, hateful, and divisive rhetoric that we’ve yet to overcome. The New Hampshire results remind us we’ve got a tough road ahead of us. Taking back the House this year is just as crucial as it was in 2016, 2018, and the years after. As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I’m working to help elect Latino progressives to Congress. I can’t do it without your help, Peter. = | = | = | = | = | = Grateful, Linda * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. clean_body: We wanted to check in on how you are feeling about 2024. | | | Dear Peter, With just a few weeks to go before some of the first big primary elections of the year, we wanted to take a few minutes to check in and hear your thoughts about 2024. Can you take our short WFP member pulse survey for February to let us know how you're feeling and what is motivating you right now? Whether you've completed one of our surveys recently or you're participating for the first time, we would love to hear from you today. You can start by answering the first question here: At the Working Families Party, we have already started in on an ambitious agenda for this year, Peter: from defending our champions in Congress, to ending Republican control of the House, to winning governing power for working people in states and communities — all while blocking the authoritarian right and recruiting, training, and electing exciting new candidates who will fight for working people. With an agenda this big — and with Republican billionaires and super PACs already spending millions in attacks to try and drown out our voices — we know we have our work cut out for us. **That's why we are counting on you for your support, your ideas, and your participation. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. ** Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

I’m honored to receive my hometown county endorsement, and I am thrilled to see that our grassroots movement is growing by the day.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79664241/457138223/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDQ2MjRhYi01MGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nRplr9AcKwvtIKWYfjAY9j9xGN39Qa42zSlEMpynG8Q=&emci=d045519b-64d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=4d4624ab-50d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=26261389)

| | I'm excited to share that the Burlington County Democrats just endorsed our campaign at their convention, winning over 90% of the total votes! **I'm honored to receive my hometown county endorsement, and I am thrilled to see that our grassroots movement is growing by the day.** We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. Our momentum is strong and people across the state are fired up in this election. I keep saying the opposite of democracy is apathy, and it's clear that New Jerseyans are NOT apathetic about this election. I'll keep fighting for the issues we care about most, and I'm ready to keep building our team person by person. The truth is, we're up against a lot. That's why our team made the goal of raising $150,000 before the end of the quarter to start building our voter turnout operations and make sure our message isn't drowned out by my opponents' big money. clean_body: I’m honored to receive my hometown county endorsement, and I am thrilled to see that our grassroots movement is growing by the day. | | | | I'm excited to share that the Burlington County Democrats just endorsed our campaign at their convention, winning over 90% of the total votes! I'm honored to receive my hometown county endorsement, and I am thrilled to see that our grassroots movement is growing by the day. We have a chance to change the broken politics of New Jersey, and your grassroots support is what makes it possible. Our momentum is strong and people across the state are fired up in this election. I keep saying the opposite of democracy is apathy, and it's clear that New Jerseyans are NOT apathetic about this election. I'll keep fighting for the issues we care about most, and I'm ready to keep building our team person by person. The truth is, we're up against a lot. That's why our team made the goal of raising $150,000 before the end of the quarter to start building our voter turnout operations and make sure our message isn't drowned out by my opponents' big money. = Onward to Hunterdon! # FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Peter,

Election season is upon us and the future of our country is at stake.

Make no mistake, this is as serious as it gets. Election integrity in America is no longer a sure thing.
**
It’s for exactly this reason that our nation needs The New York Sun.**
---
| | [JOIN THE SUN FOR 1¢ →](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3a84564e7378479fad861059772fa9e8&_e=oV5JyzRnslMTZ5fVTiXEFffrb38y6LtZKEJ-mYqC39NWqiycgtKP_kndBVZUHHv2qYrr4J0sMY5ge-EqEz7kjfI2T7cay7IpoOrNOUniaEnzl8NeZ2tgf3Ox8ko8o1TFthbB0o1C2SFNlNX4AUpqOrQfyqja-Rs__2y5gGw_dr5T-4Yt9BpABD7_dHkRnhShyXYS88keHZhDtFN_1Nga5SoTVUue7D03hLpRkDy4Y03Z8u6jgWRpDldIkJBJHjLUzsvx1YiY1m3LinlRI-XHZPycgfwqr8s-UuOyylbqr_ZaaaYbmmBb7eRI-TBPjnPhfFCvLXEb0Pr2spvcPcUvLWxSUo4p9qbHxguUYDwRB5WNj_6JoM8gViAdj5pSzbH5sj2T1osMDOdqrsOjAXCkAg%3D%3D)
---
| | It’s a tenacious newspaper that pulls no punches in the battle for truth. It has been since it was founded in 1833. The Sun will watch this election like the press hawk that it is. **It will expose any and all misdeeds.****
****
** There’s no paper in this country that’s covered the prosecution by Democrats of their chief political opponent as doggedly as the Sun has. Its reporters, editors and analysts miss nothing and know exactly where the Constitution stands every step of the way.

I’ll be there too, publishing my thoughts as we go in my exclusive weekly Sun column.

I don’t have to tell you though that we’ll be up against a media machine that is many times our size. The cards will be stacked against us.

That's why we need every American to join us. If we win the battle for truth, we can take back our country. And I know that if we join together we will win.

Membership in the Sun starts at just a penny a day. Don’t delay. We need you with us.
---

Hey, Peter,

Did you know that Matt Dolan **DOMINATED** in the Ohio debate? We know your schedule is hectic so we will let you know just what transpired at this debate.

Here is what you NEED to know...

body:
Keeping children away from their parents is wrong.

| [ ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=509805a6e6fd4e91b0a59180943b270c&_e=al7CcreKtMDTZ3K6glVDP2a_0DOqgR6RzIgO06EHAZ_ZA2quZSw9P67ddt_5wE6fz3zCg72yTYhmJ8ed2r3gFUgp04Wu-0jQCpyzorb_RbNJU28qjJWuYYhP3oQ9Gb4d311beK9OT6fU9lQOSk9BwExvCTQv9e9kkSsmYNn6MLWl75WK_smTneP29Urevy9p6rnBpZjBhYbAqNNku5bYAJQKDHnNxMEY2b1JaG0lDN3mMn_1rAn-OQh0SyMsgN3xv3-hLgd57WGEdczkBYq2ao0AP21WXCkvpYo7zk6EJDlK4qlwUOYNFgXSdac5-USW)

They’re coming for your children.

I don’t know if you’ve seen the news, but a couple in Indiana had their child removed from their home for "improper pronoun usage."

Keeping children away from their parents - when there is no abuse or neglect - **is wrong. And I’m fighting to stop it.**
[**Join My Fight**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=509805a6e6fd4e91b0a59180943b270c&_e=al7CcreKtMDTZ3K6glVDP2a_0DOqgR6RzIgO06EHAZ_ZA2quZSw9P67ddt_5wE6fz3zCg72yTYhmJ8ed2r3gFUgp04Wu-0jQCpyzorb_RbNJU28qjJWuYYhP3oQ9Gb4dbo3Q0M4WFKhUCMFa9EHWkdVeZC287AYphqi2vGn9-RuGNvxKD7DblH3SHpdSLKHE6yzj678cAgHUIfUL_RddaI37K16gL4KbBZs-48iQBPKovRkUW2ClvG-Ai31DqEDCLY8DVOhDruQMILnO5jaI334rUSmZ7n6wCqyytWq4Vu83lsSl0A3ArOHtWy2xmSfd)
**It’s just another woke politician trying to make a headline & put their woke agendas before our children.**

I will not sit idly by as children across the country are removed from safe and loving homes because their parents refuse to go along with the left’s radical gender ideology.

I’m working in Congress to stop state agencies from taking children away from parents who refuse to bow to woke gender insanity. And with your help, I’ll take that fight to the U.S. Senate.

| [ **STOP WOKE IDEOLOGIES** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=509805a6e6fd4e91b0a59180943b270c&_e=al7CcreKtMDTZ3K6glVDP2a_0DOqgR6RzIgO06EHAZ_ZA2quZSw9P67ddt_5wE6fz3zCg72yTYhmJ8ed2r3gFUgp04Wu-0jQCpyzorb_RbNJU28qjJWuYYhP3oQ9Gb4dbo3Q0M4WFKhUCMFa9EHWkUI92BWdTdB_18o5Yk7n_HBAPz_nyu7lbbBUwbhL2estlA54WGVmjgzT01Il598cnjt_tVnPN9qSG2OMAWVnfTldW7OU1yQ8pNlLTpLezLqrjpWMMhIE4qnZIOyJn7FF1JdlBcWt3OClywnWRQkHiwoDk8U96ImN0JLpyzh6KcdY)

subject: a stark contrast:

body:
What we’ve seen happening in the Republican-led Congress lately is downright embarrassing:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79664999/457140160/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjVlMTBkYy01NGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TEAEA6dTjpkkfXMqg1RwLJbubDfpjGF0pjV8GJSgRBw=) What we’ve seen happening in the Republican-led Congress lately is downright embarrassing:
* They brought us to the brink of a government shutdown _multiple times_
* They ousted their own Speaker and left the House without a leader for weeks
* They refuse to do anything but play outlandish political games

Let’s contrast that with what Briana’s been fighting for in the House of Delegates:
* Passing paid family leave, so no one has to choose between their paycheck and caring for their family when they’re sick
* Protecting veterans from predatory Veterans Affairs benefits claim sharks
* Requiring schools to stock and train staff on how to administer life-saving medication in case of an opioid overdose

**Briana is working every single day to bring people together and actually pass laws that’ll make life easier for Virginians. Can you imagine if Congress focused on results instead of grinding progress to a halt?** [_**That’s why we need to send Briana to Congress in November and make sure Democrats take back the House. But this race will be incredibly competitive – and expensive – so we need your help to raise $5,000 more before our February deadline. name: Hirono HQ
subject: “Achingly little margin for error”
body:
|
#
Peter, did you see this headline? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79665311/457140972/240141381?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmMzYmJmNy01NmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_gmeDIpNK06KqdCOYOfntIII9xwKP8aN8yX5jHorB0=) **According _CNN_ , “For Senate Democrats, 2024 is the year of living dangerously.”** **[Rush in a donation to protect Mazie’s seat and our razor-thin, pro-choice Senate majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79665312/457140973/240141381?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20240224_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmMzYmJmNy01NmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v_gmeDIpNK06KqdCOYOfntIII9xwKP8aN8yX5jHorB0=)** If you didn’t catch the article, here are the cliff notes:
* This is the toughest election for Senate Democrats this _entire decade_ : _“The ceiling is clearly lower for Democrats than for Republicans. It leaves Democrats, even in good years,**with achingly little margin for error to build a Senate majority.”**_

* November won’t just decide control of the Senate next year, but for **_years_ after.**

* It’s not just about the Senate majority — if Democrats lose the Senate this November, Mitch McConnell could refuse to seat any potential Supreme Court nominations recommended by President Biden — which could make the court **_even more_ extreme than it currently is.**

**Peter, all of this underscores just how urgent it is that we protect _every single Senate seat_ , including Mazie’s.** Republicans know that they have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to retake the Senate majority _and expand it_ (!!!) — and with outside spending expected to reach **record levels** in the 2024 election, we have to be prepared for any right-wing attacks against Mazie that attempt to muddy the waters for Hawaii voters. **[So please, chip in $10 or more to help us re-elect Mazie, fend off GOP attacks, and surge support to Democrats in battleground states across the country. clean_body: | Peter, did you see this headline? = According CNN , “For Senate Democrats, 2024 is the year of living dangerously.” = If you didn’t catch the article, here are the cliff notes: This is the toughest election for Senate Democrats this entire decade : “The ceiling is clearly lower for Democrats than for Republicans. It leaves Democrats, even in good years,with achingly little margin for error to build a Senate majority.” November won’t just decide control of the Senate next year, but for years after. It’s not just about the Senate majority — if Democrats lose the Senate this November, Mitch McConnell could refuse to seat any potential Supreme Court nominations recommended by President Biden — which could make the court even more extreme than it currently is. Peter, all of this underscores just how urgent it is that we protect every single Senate seat , including Mazie’s. Republicans know that they have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to retake the Senate majority and expand it (!!!) — and with outside spending expected to reach record levels in the 2024 election, we have to be prepared for any right-wing attacks against Mazie that attempt to muddy the waters for Hawaii voters. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **=** = | **=** = | | **=** = | **=** = | | **=** = | **=** =** Thank you for your support, Hirono HQ Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

Peter!

This year's election is in full swing, and the Republican-led Congress has not only been more chaotic, but they've continued to propose policies that would only harm the American people.

Instead of addressing issues and concerns that matter to the American people, Republicans continue to advocate for cuts to healthcare, Medicaid, and Social Security while putting our planet closer and closer to the point of no return—all with just a **slim 4-seat majority.**

clean_body: Take our one-question poll Peter! This year's election is in full swing, and the Republican-led Congress has not only been more chaotic, but they've continued to propose policies that would only harm the American people. Instead of addressing issues and concerns that matter to the American people, Republicans continue to advocate for cuts to healthcare, Medicaid, and Social Security while putting our planet closer and closer to the point of no return—all with just a slim 4-seat majority. There's absolutely zero room for us to come up short, so we need to know where you stand regarding our nation's democracy. | | | Last year, extreme right-wing legislators in the House threatened to shut down our government, roll back the progress we've made, and enact policies that would have threatened hard-working families. Now, in 2024, they've continued these same attacks with just a slim 4-seat majority. It's time we put all of that to an end, but to do it, we'll need your help. Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. clean_body: Friend, before voting ends, I have a special message for my top supporters............................................................................................................................. | | | | POLLS CLOSE IN 3 HOURS! Friend, here is my special message: When we win in a few short hours, Democrats, the Globalist Swamp, and the Washington “Elite” will claim our victory doesn’t mean anything. They will say our MAGA Movement is struggling. They will say we missed expectations, and that our MASSIVE victory is actually a FAILURE. Worst of all? They will say my strongest supporters like YOU are ready to ABANDON me. BUT I KNOW YOU’LL NEVER ABANDON ME! I KNOW YOU’LL HAVE MY BACK! I KNOW I CAN COUNT ON YOU TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! We’re HOURS away from the polls closing, and before that happens, I need you to send a message they will NEVER forget. | Join me today. With you by my side, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! May God bless you, | | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20869%2E4449941%2EmRFBNo)
---
**Liz Cheney just made our day!!!** Now that Trump has been removed from ballots in Colorado and Maine, _voters across the country are DEMANDING that he is removed from their state’s ballot._

**So we’re launching an urgent petition to show that local voters want Trump removed from their ballot!** [**We need you to make your voice heard! Add your name to demand Trump is disqualified from running for office »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240224_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20869%2E4449941%2EmRFBNo) | [600 LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND TRUMP IS DISQUALIFIED FROM RUNNING »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240224_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20869%2E4449941%2EmRFBNo)
---
**BAD NEWS:** Donald Trump might be facing 90+ indictments, but he’s SOARING in the polls against President Biden. **We might elect a CRIMINAL in 2024??**

**BUT THERE’S HOPE:** We can still kick Trump off the ballot in states across the country using the 14th Amendment! **_But we need a HUGE outpour of support to make it happen:_**
[**Add your name to demand Trump be disqualified from running for office in your state »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240224_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20869%2E4449941%2EmRFBNo)
[600 LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND TRUMP IS DISQUALIFIED FROM RUNNING »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240224_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20869%2E4449941%2EmRFBNo)
---
We need your voice now.

– FFR

Trump used his time to spew his signature lies and anti-democratic rhetoric. Trump’s speech is sure to fire up his right-wing cronies – and grassroots Democrats nationwide are stepping up to turn this event into a net loss for his Republican allies. name: Katie Porter
subject: The way we’re “doing Congress” isn't working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=38194%2E3422442%2Eqbf9oU)
Derek, since getting to Congress in 2019 I’ve been shaking that place up—demanding COVID testing be free for all Americans, leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks, and holding powerful CEOs accountable.
**Simply put, I’m a single mom of three who “does Congress” differently than most of my colleagues.**
* I’m one of just eleven (out of 435!) Members of Congress who **doesn't take federal lobbyist money.**
* I’m the only candidate in this race who has**never taken corporate PAC money** , and I fully support banning it.
* When Congress brought back “earmarks” in 2021 (after they were banned under President Obama because the process leads to corruption and waste) I was the only Democrat to oppose their return.

**Now, powerful special interests and establishment, career politicians are coming after us. Super PACs have spent $7 million dollars attacking me with a dishonest ad. My opponent, funded by decades of corporate PAC checks, is outspending us three to one.**
**But despite all that, a recent poll shows us one single point ahead of our Republican opponent, and if we beat him—we advance to the general election.[Is there anything you can give right now to help me take our fight to the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240224-2?refcode=em20240224-38194&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=38194_3422442_qbf9oU&akid=38194%2E3422442%2Eqbf9oU)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240224-2?refcode=em20240224-38194&refcode2=38194_3422442_qbf9oU&akid=38194%2E3422442%2Eqbf9oU)
Thanks so much,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240224-38194&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=38194_3422442_qbf9oU&akid=38194%2E3422442%2Eqbf9oU)**
---

name: Padora Finance Team
subject: Bumping John’s message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
We wanted to bump John’s message, because we’ve set a pretty enormous goal for ourselves this month.
__ | | | We wanted to bump John’s message, because we’ve set a pretty enormous goal for ourselves this month. Over the next few days, we need to raise ANOTHER $12,000 to ensure that John stays ahead of Lauren Boebert and has the resources he’ll need to win this race. This was going to be a difficult race before Boebert jumped in. And she’s not making it any easier. [**So please rush a donation of any amount to help John win this race.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmv2EUcxmJgAYtzoIMGV_74wAa3R_FaHsHDBX8rHTxv5QlhmzHl1P_go0Hw2P07ee0WdkZEmSVb4P79gJjfaUvwHVGwnLwqt-c6LqDIpwLnS61gEZtxGPRzDE29MyHKIQyxiOi_olS1clL1S_btL01HbQIPC2FgAGT4jIJ858x_D9EHlkQT7qInbRkkf1aQt7eHyc5OMetdeKQeMbf0mZKmmqdk_58FeZqoJYKWgwSLWULF_U3GEvqxfIpNWTfsFA4x69dWgsILC39lmEl214y279I5XqUXTJvAqyyY7X40HtsyZ-A3sxwj0fwomCNMSvHlcLadaIYRQqXdbLflS5TdNuftyKsEJA-YIf7aBd2jOtDGxVsAPRS2g5xrBfF-Ya2BUcyofcFWBZXYxDRCu8Jj4%3D) We’re grateful for anything you can give. – Padora Finance Team _\-------- Begin original message --------_ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmv2EUcxmJgAYtzoIMGV_74wAa3R_FaHsHDBX8rHTxv5QXQ89ouru_P9kW8QmroVqA-TuIE4XZylXaq4GJO7UHbTwtxXcjLax9JcJcYyQFfadb157v9rVnrm4tzumNxgG4jJ_JI0srcCYqxu5Y7R6NousQOGpNHJGvU07EnmiN4ETalzTCiIVhkZWzFgJeyYAeSZNk9fHpXcOuKBWrW059TLuInQraMs6hIXcy_F-FDO7TxvJLfh6v0egdvxNO-TxaEJvl47cje1uXv7zC_zfHAX-XAipnKlDbls_JZJWx1MuHNivXtRs1XgsIRUUMPNWUAbQGEUCDx7_tOY2B4lGSlnmzxz0jDTO9ZBaHRmJaTEpDF7URMZpe3-RrX9tlearug%3D%3D) Hi folks, Not sure if you’ve heard, but 2024 is a leap year – meaning we’ve got one extra day in February, which my finance team gleefully informed me means one extra day of fundraising. _**What a delight!**_ You know I hate asking for money. But all jokes aside, fundraising IS going to be critical to winning this race. Because with all the crap she brings along with her, Lauren Boebert definitely brings a lot of money from big-time MAGA donors. I’m not going to complain, I welcome a challenge. This was always going to be a tough race to win whether Boebert was part of it or not. But I am asking if you’ll help me rise to the challenge of keeping up with my fundraising goals. [**Will you rush a donation of $5, $10, or $25 to my campaign to help me out?**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmv2EUcxmJgAYtzoIMGV_74wAa3R_FaHsHDBX8rHTxv5QlhmzHl1P_go0Hw2P07ee0WdkZEmSVb4P79gJjfaUvwHVGwnLwqt-c6LqDIpwLnS61gEZtxGPRzDE29MyHKIQyxiOi_olS1clL1S_btL01HbQIPC2FgAGT4jIJ858x_D9EHlkQT7qInbRkkf1aQt7eHyc5OMetdeKQeMbf0mZKmmqdk_58FeZqoJYKWgwSLWUXi6B_MGT9Trtq601CoeQltiJkzoyQOEcJ7AA0QJ_T4Hl1ebojuo2ELGby6wZjwN3aLkcJyNmabuJVEaaVwS9oso_i6LGtrjW1zf8bpwzo7oS5s8bCYHiCN86lXQlGsIeoGmJNiXyZxTTpZiMWqs0NWV_fSBsfUaqk6WRwyoiSNw%3D) The team tells me we’ve got to raise another $12,000 between now and March 1st to stay in the driver’s seat of this race. And if that’s what they tell me we need to do, I’m committed to doing it. [**So what do you say? Can you help me and my team hit this goal by donating any amount today?**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmv2EUcxmJgAYtzoIMGV_74wAa3R_FaHsHDBX8rHTxv5QlhmzHl1P_go0Hw2P07ee0WdkZEmSVb4P79gJjfaUvwHVGwnLwqt-c6LqDIpwLnS61gEZtxGPRzDE29MyHKIQyxiOi_olS1clL1S_btL01HbQIPC2FgAGT4jIJ858x_D9EHlkQT7qInbRkkf1aQt7eHyc5OMetdeKQeMbf0mZKmmqdk_58FeZqoJYKWgwSLWU6kjehunqA4hybs-ezeWFp25BN5uY0VNtrxFg0dF-50IVzQG0VWjvQouLKmZT3mGL9zzHMYS1t6Lxwj7y4JsdUSgzqPXjUoSQtFL0jsxsdMC1vu25l-Z71XwAeIZgh3UsCYBZMrE509ea2Y7l_Z6H1mMHBAINvHd-Ns7TIogd0J4%3D) Thank you so much! Best, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. [WEBSITE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmoE3-mnatp_PBCxHq-6vsgdA3en1r7yDNhjDtsibN7u0cg_piuNMVBO5jZUOSsyOXsv8G4s7hWObwa-AMRhoPuCQYo72bcmRzmfFISPR_z8SluHwrpVpLCOkOgUVoo8EWAcOdtcmuETu1gpuWgb97y6Dpc8Zoe6WqdRhNIKc4yPBHTORMijQ_Ejdj8mTdJBT3A%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=451a11a9aa9649139d37163394c3222b&_e=EBiqMLRrOr-wuVI7VySdmv2EUcxmJgAYtzoIMGV_74wAa3R_FaHsHDBX8rHTxv5QlhmzHl1P_go0Hw2P07ee0WdkZEmSVb4P79gJjfaUvwHVGwnLwqt-c6LqDIpwLnS61gEZtxGPRzDE29MyHKIQyxiOi_olS1clL1S_btL01HbQIPC2FgAGT4jIJ858x_D9EHlkQT7qInbRkkf1aQt7eHyc5OMetdeKQeMbf0mZKmkavHe9qmmZCGf0ZQWFfbgq4Ui8UHIqdYPPehXV36vaovaoho4dvXejlGOl-5RzZh87CAksRmMVa1c2tHgqUxhIt3_ALqFOAO8Dhu1jSnsBVrM3X39ruNTvYwOSMSFltMKKsjntyZIAiAKd-cQgr_nQP05ipEO5Q3DcwOZA88uXtqspfOj3xpZu0cw7dj3hLKIWApciepCjn9pOJFi3WhXK) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: We wanted to bump John’s message, because we’ve set a pretty enormous goal for ourselves this month. | | | We wanted to bump John’s message, because we’ve set a pretty enormous goal for ourselves this month. Over the next few days, we need to raise ANOTHER $12,000 to ensure that John stays ahead of Lauren Boebert and has the resources he’ll need to win this race. This was going to be a difficult race before Boebert jumped in. And she’s not making it any easier. We’re grateful for anything you can give. – Padora Finance Team \-------- Begin original message -------- Hi folks, Not sure if you’ve heard, but 2024 is a leap year – meaning we’ve got one extra day in February, which my finance team gleefully informed me means one extra day of fundraising. What a delight! You know I hate asking for money. But all jokes aside, fundraising IS going to be critical to winning this race. Because with all the crap she brings along with her, Lauren Boebert definitely brings a lot of money from big-time MAGA donors. I’m not going to complain, I welcome a challenge. This was always going to be a tough race to win whether Boebert was part of it or not. But I am asking if you’ll help me rise to the challenge of keeping up with my fundraising goals. The team tells me we’ve got to raise another $12,000 between now and March 1st to stay in the driver’s seat of this race. And if that’s what they tell me we need to do, I’m committed to doing it. Thank you so much! Best, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

Y’all, I have something I need to say. **Marsha Blackburn and the radical GOP are going to end our democracy as we know it — if we let them.** Marsha supported the Big Lie of election fraud in 2020. She was ready to help steal the presidential election away from the people. She’s also a leading proponent of a national abortion ban and regularly opposes voting rights legislation. **Our fundamental rights are not safe as long as she remains in the Senate.** Folks, the future of our democracy is still in our hands. The 2024 elections might be our _best_ opportunity to defeat Marsha Blackburn. We have a real shot at defeating her and returning this Senate seat to the people. But I’ll be blunt: Missing a single one of our financial goals could derail our campaign. Marsha has millions of dollars at her disposal thanks to corporate PACs and special interests like the gun lobby. Meanwhile, I don’t take a CENT of corporate PAC money because I want you to know that I’m only accountable to Tennesseans. Our margin of error is small. **[My fundraising goal for February is $200,000 — and it’s a stretch. But I believe we can get there with your help. Please rush in a $5 donation before our deadline on Thursday. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

Hi Derek, it’s Adam Schiff.
We have another big weekend across California — early voting is happening statewide. **There are just 10 days left.**
**We need the resources _right now_ to fund our get-out-the-vote (GOTV) efforts**. California has mailed ballots to every single registered voter, which means we can’t wait until our end-of-month deadline or primary day when people are voting _today._
**[Can you pitch in $3 or whatever you can spare for our final GOTV push? I don’t take corporate PAC money — every dollar and every contribution we receive is the fuel for our people-powered movement.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240224_PM2_V2_S1&email=&amount=3&t=17&akid=5670%2E5257348%2ECV_MHn)**

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The first ballots in this critical race are being cast right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter, as I write this, early voting has officially begun in Ohio's primary election. **The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance, and I need you by my side more than ever. Let me explain**.

No matter which GOP opponent wins this primary, we're facing an uphill battle to defend Ohio's must-win seat. Polls show us statistically tied, and Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top target for defeat. **Now, his dark-money super PACs just made their largest ad reservation in a single state ever to attack me on the airwaves and drown out our pro-worker message.**

Experts say Ohio could decide Senate control, and I simply can't fight back against these attacks without your support, Peter. With voters casting their primary ballots right now, we're running out of time to raise the resources we need to start the general election off strong.
