clean_body: | Peter, as I write this, early voting has officially begun in Ohio's primary election. The fate of the Senate hangs in the balance, and I need you by my side more than ever. Let me explain. No matter which GOP opponent wins this primary, we're facing an uphill battle to defend Ohio's must-win seat. Polls show us statistically tied, and Mitch McConnell has personally named me a top target for defeat. Now, his dark-money super PACs just made their largest ad reservation in a single state ever to attack me on the airwaves and drown out our pro-worker message. Experts say Ohio could decide Senate control, and I simply can't fight back against these attacks without your support, Peter. With voters casting their primary ballots right now, we're running out of time to raise the resources we need to start the general election off strong. That's why we set a goal to raise $100,000 in the next 48 hours so we can fuel our voter outreach efforts, TV ads, and more. And I'm personally counting on you to help me get there. The GOP’s inaction and chaos are putting us at risk | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667021/457146040/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTY3ZjMzOS02NGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7anEJZZ2RB6u3DiV5pQIilLMYSNXxoozE2H5CP6R1ls=&emci=2ec3e7f9-8cd2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=9167f339-64d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=15529135) | I will keep this short because it’s a Saturday. I remain so disappointed and shocked by House Republicans’ continued path of chaos and dysfunction. Not only did they waste taxpayer dollars and precious time impeaching Sec. Mayorkas, the first time a cabinet secretary has been impeached in nearly 150 years, but they did so while cutting other legislative work short and sending members home early. All this happened while the government has not been funded and we are days away from the threat of a shutdown. They continue to put partisan policies first and kick the ball down the road when it comes to the work that we were sent to Washington to do – legislate to support our children, invest in good-paying jobs, and help American families make ends meet. This is why we need to flip the House in November. Our country cannot face another two years of dysfunction, inaction, and an inability to govern. My re-election campaign has become one of the most closely watched in the nation because flipping the House blue means keeping swing districts like CT-05 in the hands of Democrats like me. [**With so much at stake and just a few months left to take action, please consider donating whatever you can so we can reach our February fundraising goal before it’s too late!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667022/457146041/1352647135?refcode=E7149-20240225-EOM5-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTY3ZjMzOS02NGQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7anEJZZ2RB6u3DiV5pQIilLMYSNXxoozE2H5CP6R1ls=) – Jahana

name: Team Kennedy
subject: A Friend in the White House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
A recent MSNBC poll reports that 28% of black voters support RFK Jr. for President!

|
---
| | | **[A recent MSNBC poll reports that 28% of black voters support RFK Jr. for President!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
It’s Black History Month and the Kennedy for President campaign has celebrated with speeches, events, and old fashioned door-knocking in urban communities.
RFK Jr.’s work is getting noticed by CNN, The Hill, and other news outlets– and his campaigning to African Americans during Black History Month is being _attacked by the Biden Administration._
But more importantly, his tireless work is picking up major support from the Black community.
A recent MSNBC poll reports that 28% of black voters support RFK Jr. for President!
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=3)
The reason why is simple: _Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. cares and he is advocating strongly for policies that heal, that offer a remedy, not only for the sake of Black people, but for the well being of the entire nation!_
RFK Jr. will not blame or shame anyone or any racial group–he is appealing to the conscience of Americans of all races who want to repair the wounds of history.
RFK Jr. has offered real policies to transform and inspire our country to...
* Rebuild and Re-Invest in Distressed Zip Codes
* Reform Prisons & Restore Inmates
* Respect & Protect the Police
* Revive American Schools
* Heal the Addicted
* Inspire the Youth

Our goal to Heal the Divide in America comes down to three things: 1\. Ballot Access, 2. Funding, and 3. You.
Your gift today will help put RFK Jr. on the ballot in 50 states; your gift today will jump start hope and inspire the imagination of a new generation of voters who have not given up on the promise of America. We can and we must do better!
[Please give to support our campaign today as we are closing our budget deficit for February.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=4)
[DONATE NOW](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=5)
[Peter, we need to hear from supporters like you again in the next few days.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=6)
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=7)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=NeYFSHY3wLA-A6ZQ4K_eCvyPLw9XUBWykYMXk8oA7_J_3Q_g_ArGpQEnreGd3k1h&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=black_battleground_2_24_24_nd3&n=13)

name: Ben Wikler
subject: The nightmare of gerrymandering is over. Fair maps are here. WOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
Republicans rigged the state. But democracy is back.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667463/457147550/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMwOWM2YS02OWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DekHZl63AsB1KGTquH9Q5l52B1hSV8kCae3JFyqknA=&emci=20d34349-35d2-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=d2c09c6a-69d3-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=43566853)

| | The long, dark night of ultra-partisan gerrymandering is over, and a new day for democracy now dawns in the Badger State.

**On Monday morning, a new set of state legislative maps were signed into law for Wisconsin.** These maps are graded “A” for fairness by the head of the nonpartisan Princeton Gerrymandering Project. The current maps scored an F.

With the stroke of a pen, Wisconsin went from a “democracy desert” to, well, a democracy. This was all possible because of you, our team of grassroots supporters.

[**_I’m going to ask you to split a $25 donation between the Democratic Parties of Wisconsin and Georgia_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667464/457147551/1472937826?refcode=20240224.2_DPW_2WI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMwOWM2YS02OWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DekHZl63AsB1KGTquH9Q5l52B1hSV8kCae3JFyqknA=), but I want to tell you how we got here:

Wisconsin’s gerrymandering crisis began in 2011, when Republican lawmakers drew legislative lines that guaranteed even landslide election losses wouldn’t cost them their majorities. The result was one of the most egregious, extreme partisan gerrymanders in American political history.

In 2012 and 2018, Wisconsin voters overwhelmingly voted for Democratic majorities in the legislature but Republicans won huge majorities of the seats. In 2020 and 2022, Democrats won major statewide victories, but Republicans won near-supermajorities.

All the while, Republican politicians in Wisconsin have used their power to restrict access to the ballot, remove authorities that voters had entrusted to statewide elected officials like the Governor and Attorney General, and smash the freedoms of workers to organize and advocate for themselves.

_For thirteen years, the democracy-proof legislature has been laying siege to democracy itself._

But those statewide victories added up. In 2018, 2020, and 2023, voters built a new progressive majority on the State Supreme Court. By electing Governor Evers and preventing GOP supermajorities, they stopped hard-right maps from being signed into law. And last year, a civic uprising prevented Republicans from impeaching Janet Protasiewicz. In December, the Supreme Court ruled that Wisconsin’s legislative maps were unconstitutional.

This wasn’t easy. This team had to knock on doors, call phones, chip in, share our views with friends and online—year after year, election after election, never giving up even when it felt like all was lost.

_But we did it._

**Today, the work doesn’t end. The candidate recruitment process now goes into overdrive. And at the same time, we remain vigilant in case Republican politicians in Madison and their allies once again, through the courts or any other strategy, attempt to thwart majority rule.**

Today, we commit to doing the work, ending the malign speakership of Robin Vos, breaking the GOP supermajority in the State Senate, and paving the way towards a Democratic state Senate majority in 2026.

I’d be remiss if I didn’t ask. The number of competitive legislative seats will triple so we’ll need triple the support, Peter. [**_Can you chip in a $25 split donation between WisDems and GA Dems to help us organize voters in every corner of Wisconsin and Georgia where Democrats have the chance to win?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667465/457147552/1472937826?refcode=20240224.2_DPW_2WI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmMwOWM2YS02OWQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DekHZl63AsB1KGTquH9Q5l52B1hSV8kCae3JFyqknA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately, split between the Democratic Parties of Georgia and Wisconsin:_

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Sinema’s decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kyrsten Sinema has just over a month to decide whether she runs for re-election in Arizona.
#

Peter, one way or another, this race is going to change over the next few weeks.
Kyrsten Sinema has just over a month to decide whether she runs for re-election in Arizona.
If she does run, it’s a three-way race. It’ll be tough. She can’t win, but she could pull enough voters her way to give the edge to Kari Lake — and that would be an absolute disaster.
If she doesn’t run, it’s just Ruben and Kari head-to-head in Arizona. That means the GOP establishment doesn’t have to split their attacks between two candidates, and they can focus all of their efforts on tearing Ruben apart.
Either way, this is going to be one of the most expensive and competitive elections in the entire country. We’re gearing up for the fight of our lives out in Arizona.
And we could really use your help.
[**If you could chip in $3 today it’d mean a lot to Ruben’s chances this November. He’s facing down millions in attack ads, and anything you can give would help him fight back.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240224-2-120&t=1&akid=1992%2E734936%2ER9lRVW)

body:

Team, it’s Andrea. I wanted to reach out personally after the horrific and deeply upsetting decision out of Alabama this week. The latest ruling out of Alabama shows that extremist Republicans will stop at nothing to attack our reproductive freedom and insert themselves into our private healthcare decisions. Overturning _Roe v. Wade_ was just the start for them. **It's more important than ever to have a pro-choice House Majority that will defend the right to choose, codify Roe v Wade into federal law, and put a stop to these assaults on our reproductive freedom. ** That starts with defending this seat from extremists who want to flip it red and roll back reproductive rights. **[I’m in this fight all the way and if you’re with me, will you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can today to my re-election campaign to defend reproductive freedom in Oregon and nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667626/457148065/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTNhMWQzNi02YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h1cFkds5athmthIxPcejZT56gYaH-Z3QOmFxOYZakU4=)** | _[CONTRIBUTE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667627/457148066/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTNhMWQzNi02YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h1cFkds5athmthIxPcejZT56gYaH-Z3QOmFxOYZakU4=)_
---
**If Republicans want to roll back your reproductive freedoms, they’ll have to go through me.**
I will _always_ fight to protect reproductive freedom and I’m running for Congress to ensure that every woman has the right to make their own personal medical decisions without interference.
This fight is far from over. If extreme Republicans have it their way, they’ll pass a national, total abortion ban. **Republicans are fighting hard to expand their razor-thin majority and pass more of their extreme agenda, and my seat is one of their top targets. **
**[It may be a tough road ahead, but we are not powerless. I’m fighting every day to stop the far-right’s extreme, anti-choice agenda and protect our fundamental freedoms. I hope you’ll consider chipping in to my reelection campaign to keep me in the fight for reproductive freedom for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79667628/457148067/1032217744?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.24_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTNhMWQzNi02YmQzLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h1cFkds5athmthIxPcejZT56gYaH-Z3QOmFxOYZakU4=) **

name: Biden Poll
subject: Your President Biden Rating >> -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | We're conducting a nationwide poll of top Democrats to verify strong support for President Biden before the next election -- and we've selected you to represent Pennsylvania. ****Please answer to the best of your ability and do not include input from others.****

Thank you for participating,

Team DSCC

name: Rep. Jim Jordan
subject: I would truly appreciate your name on my list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Hey there - it's Jim Jordan. My primary is in 24 days on March 19th. Today, I'm asking for your help. Will you offer me your personal endorsement? It’s Rep. Jim Jordan. We were just reviewing our records and noticed your status is still pending. Will you please confirm before midnight tonight?

| [](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_e=9rmbcNwx-33i4B91at-kHn6rZ8MR67Y3Ia40er-BNJCXaj5C_yQj_ELDo3FcC1xyI60I1-bpDDQJY8X7f5sTpaC_V1JqLXBcfLWpYkFXNAPdz3ep0dva8yN0GX6QSHe_1ISaJb0DlaEH1l92XVIbg0UH2eKvsScG6ow4OrXtRvqmVQ4THFCukudybUAFirt6qCCGmO92nrXsXr2jKcueYoNSlX0mFKaV8aEE9GjMBDcs9zgwHi3uhGYX6kFWcVnKgP8_sevUofMcfjhLS2qELhaX-qFsOhL5zv54j-xw3va0JkcvDq2rvyMtLVmaPNOkwHCbJlzkAWP2cSikZk7oBIdwtRazxgpWsyfEerHb0JUswo_H0IE6LleTiRyGWLGtPnUgQfA69FQsOQdi6BFo9MzF9dSN9PBjpPPDH8pLqml_X2dP2rnqyYrF5_Txe626lsbFl7vOJYsaZJeMrBGd-5UNAcmJNaZyhlf-WVcfjq0XQz2eESiofi615cPocvXPkeRuPYFyyqRza-rSdxbe1g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Some say that our district should be safe for Republicans in November, but with almost half the district as “new territory,” we are not taking any chances. **The way people lose is to forget who they are, where they come from and who they represent.** I’ve seen former colleagues make this mistake before; I made a vow to myself to never become complacent.

So, here we are once again, **eight months until Election Day!**

I’m gearing up for the general election and **[I would truly appreciate seeing your name on the list of supporters who have personally endorsed me for reelection.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_e=9rmbcNwx-33i4B91at-kHn6rZ8MR67Y3Ia40er-BNJCXaj5C_yQj_ELDo3FcC1xyI60I1-bpDDQJY8X7f5sTpaC_V1JqLXBcfLWpYkFXNAPdz3ep0dva8yN0GX6QSHe_1ISaJb0DlaEH1l92XVIbg0UH2eKvsScG6ow4OrXtRvqmVQ4THFCukudybUAFirt6qCCGmO92nrXsXr2jKcueYoNSlX0mFKaV8aEE9GjMBDcs9zgwHi3uhGYX6kFWcVnKgP8_sevUofMcfjhLS2qELhaX-qFsOhL5zv54j-xw3va0JkcvDq2rvyMtLVmaPNOkwHCbJlzkAWP2cSikZk7oBIdwtRazxgpWsyfEerHb0JUswo_H0IE6LleTiRyGWLGtUDZPg93mLKPF8ad7EDJUpOErZ9EQ8SFO-o1TRkTWkDzyvhooymFGLNa5vfBqWYr2-QbyEvZxajxPk_POae6x0aqDi4mj6FvUsZiY4ewxxnlGH-8Xet313O-xNWNnMgdC9JMF8hqnQPKZmKHL73GOtg%3D%3D)** I’m asking if you have the time, please consider doing so today.

[](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_e=9rmbcNwx-33i4B91at-kHn6rZ8MR67Y3Ia40er-BNJCXaj5C_yQj_ELDo3FcC1xyI60I1-bpDDQJY8X7f5sTpaC_V1JqLXBcfLWpYkFXNAPdz3ep0dva8yN0GX6QSHe_1ISaJb0DlaEH1l92XVIbg0UH2eKvsScG6ow4OrXtRvqmVQ4THFCukudybUAFirt6qCCGmO92nrXsXr2jKcueYoNSlX0mFKaV8aEE9GjMBDcs9zgwHi3uhGYX6kFWcVnKgP8_sevUofMcfjhLS2qELhaX-qFsOhL5zv54j-xw3va0JkcvDq2rvyMtLVmaPNOkwHCbJlzkAWP2cSikZk7oBIdwtRazxgpWsyfEerHb0JUswo_H0IE6LleTiRyGWLGtitmH_USzI0Ltt2geeB-DEy9SpJ43qKprl9fohQ1I3XQLrUAlgyoh_JO5hNN9BS7HXPdxr8nD65h9pr0UzKQfnPaFZY60XD1Op_GiO2Bcmft8ljRCBbed82ARkQJntNbqgxIaBNzrnr_Oy8TwGMgAIQ%3D%3D)
As a front-line Republican and steadfast ally of President Trump, Democrats have long targeted me for electoral defeat in November's election. They don't like debating with me with regard to important legislation in the House, and **they cannot stand how we're helping the American public come to the realization that Democrats are more focused on partisanship than getting things done for the American people**.

So, if you agree with me that:
1. **We need to secure the southern border**
2. **We should defund sanctuary cities**
3. **All life is sacred and should be protected at all costs**

**[Please consider endorsing my campaign for re-election today!](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_e=9rmbcNwx-33i4B91at-kHn6rZ8MR67Y3Ia40er-BNJCXaj5C_yQj_ELDo3FcC1xyI60I1-bpDDQJY8X7f5sTpaC_V1JqLXBcfLWpYkFXNAPdz3ep0dva8yN0GX6QSHe_1ISaJb0DlaEH1l92XVIbg0UH2eKvsScG6ow4OrXtRvqmVQ4THFCukudybUAFirt6qCCGmO92nrXsXr2jKcueYoNSlX0mFKaV8aEE9GjMBDcs9zgwHi3uhGYX6kFWcVnKgP8_sevUofMcfjhLS2qELhaX-qFsOhL5zv54j-xw3va0JkcvDq2rvyMtLVmaPNOkwHCbJlzkAWP2cSikZk7oBIdwtRazxgpWsyfEerHb0JUswo_H0IE6LleTiRyGWLGtBszU-KyBW0A_LcjUqPPMwv5o7MwEm8FE6LGkiH2HoYmrCi8_hazaXN8uc0YRhElnwKKCvUInd9uLw3Z0RvUfhQ2Clu8Ppnwi0eUsJPsRMY4hoUG55VH_uMJ3NSz2LYYovuwYufXLu-VCKICZtrkTLQ%3D%3D)**

**Please help me reach our goal of finding 20,000 endorsements by the end of this week**. We’re just 408 short at the moment, but we’re confident that the hill isn’t too steep.

Let’s get this done. **[Please send your endorsement today.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/u/click?_t=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_m=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_e=9rmbcNwx-33i4B91at-kHn6rZ8MR67Y3Ia40er-BNJCXaj5C_yQj_ELDo3FcC1xyI60I1-bpDDQJY8X7f5sTpaC_V1JqLXBcfLWpYkFXNAPdz3ep0dva8yN0GX6QSHe_1ISaJb0DlaEH1l92XVIbg0UH2eKvsScG6ow4OrXtRvqmVQ4THFCukudybUAFirt6qCCGmO92nrXsXr2jKcueYoNSlX0mFKaV8aEE9GjMBDcs9zgwHi3uhGYX6kFWcVnKgP8_sevUofMcfjhLS2qELhaX-qFsOhL5zv54j-xw3va0JkcvDq2rvyMtLVmaPNOkwHCbJlzkAWP2cSikZk7oBIdwtRazxgpWsyfEerHb0JUswo_H0IE6LleTiRyGWLGtoQb-xCaEafQD-h6oyxX4o3_HXbDWzovUnBfJD_BUtE_1RxxjDhBAFHssU3kK5GcnJlp0kuiE-bYmzquC0OzN0ed6f7GPQ_u4nBMQAaEN4ujBIFkLNyoVH561unDbDZwX_44_D6iSEoLfclD6hRlm1g%3D%3D)**

Thanks,
Jim Jordan

Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.teamjimjordan.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1b0bebbf1097419382210464ab5da85c&_s=ebe6658882e548ffab4265b6292199f3&_t=6_HbfZ_9T10L07PYJUkH10jNKOgoGJGQD63zilJjHQyTwFvtX1R3YIFj7BJTc8JphpsdWFXHzoQ_E58ZTRUSRTWWKZ0dcHVQPJUJUDhO2zE%3D)

| | Dear Friends,
Today we are officially 10 days away from Primary Election Day, and we need your help to reach as many voters as possible! We invite you to join us tomorrow for our Long Beach Weekend of Action.
Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or new to political action, your presence will make a huge difference. Our grassroots approach means every conversation, every piece of campaign literature, and every interaction counts.
Here are the details you need to know: When: February 25, 2024Time: 1 PM - 3 PMMeeting Point: 800 Orizaba Ave, Long Beach, CA 90804
Even if you are available to join us for 30 minutes or an hour, we would greatly appreciate it! Let's come together to show CA-42 the strength of people-powered politics. We can't wait to see you there!

Here are the details you need to know: When: February 25, 2024Time: 1 PM - 3 PMMeeting Point: 800 Orizaba Ave, Long Beach, CA 90804 Even if you are available to join us for 30 minutes or an hour, we would greatly appreciate it! Let's come together to show CA-42 the strength of people-powered politics. We can't wait to see you there! | | | | | Con ganas y sin miedo, Nicole | | | | This email was created with Wix. | | | This email was sent from .

body:
Here’s what you need to know
#
Peter — here are three reasons why your donation of $3 or more today will help us take advantage of our most competitive and affordable chance to flip a GOP-held U.S. Senate seat in 2024:
1. **Josh Hawley is seriously vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his Senate seat with only 51% of the vote. After he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6, he became the least popular GOP U.S. Senator up for re-election this year — with even lower approval ratings than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott.
2. **We’re building the grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley.** After outraising Hawley in 2023 and earning major endorsements from groups like the Missouri AFL-CIO, End Citizens United, and League of Conservation Voters, we’re proving that Lucas Kunce is a real force to be reckoned with in this election. Multiple polls have proved it too — already finding this race between Lucas and Hawley in a _statistical tie._
3. **Every $1 here in Missouri can go nearly five times as far compared to states like Texas and Florida.** Because of our state’s small media markets, we’ll be able to reach Missourians with Lucas’ message early and often for a fraction of what it would cost in those other big states.

We’re building the record-breaking, people-powered movement that can defeat Josh Hawley and elect a real warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But the only way we’ll be able to get our election-winning message in front of voters is with support from real people like you. **So we’re asking:**
**[Will you add a donation of any amount — even just $3 — today? Lucas doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so we mean it when we say a donation of any amount really makes a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43970?refcode=em20240224-4898&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4898%2E614464%2EiyJiW1)**
